## File: lib/http_eio/server_metrics.ml
````ocaml
  1: (* Copyright (c) 2026 Eta contributors. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT *)
  2: 
  3: module Meter = Eta_http.Observability.Server.Meter
  4: module Semconv = Eta_http.Observability.Server.Semconv
  5: 
  6: type t = {
  7:   runtime : Eta_http.Server.Error.t Eta.Runtime.t;
  8:   attrs : (string * string) list;
  9: }
 10: 
 11: let cons_opt key value attrs =
 12:   match value with None -> attrs | Some value -> (key, value) :: attrs
 13: 
 14: let cons_int_opt key value attrs =
 15:   match value with
 16:   | None -> attrs
 17:   | Some value -> (key, string_of_int value) :: attrs
 18: 
 19: let bool value = if value then "true" else "false"
 20: 
 21: let transport_attrs (connection : Server_types.Connection_info.t) =
 22:   [
 23:     ( "eta_http.server.protocol",
 24:       Eta_http.Server.Error.protocol_to_string connection.protocol );
 25:     ("eta_http.server.tls", bool connection.tls);
 26:   ]
 27:   |> cons_opt "network.protocol.alpn" connection.alpn_protocol
 28: 
 29: let connection_attrs (connection : Server_types.Connection_info.t) =
 30:   [
 31:     ("eta_http.server.connection_id", connection.id);
 32:     ("network.protocol.name", "http");
 33:   ]
 34:   @ transport_attrs connection
 35:   |> cons_opt "client.address" connection.peer.address
 36:   |> cons_int_opt "client.port" connection.peer.port
 37: 
 38: let connection ~runtime ~connection =
 39:   { runtime; attrs = connection_attrs connection }
 40: 
 41: let request ~runtime ~connection ~emit_url_full request =
 42:   {
 43:     runtime;
 44:     attrs =
 45:       Semconv.request_attrs ~emit_url_full request
 46:       @ transport_attrs connection;
 47:   }
 48: 
 49: let run t effect =
 50:   ignore (Eta.Runtime.run t.runtime effect : (unit, Eta_http.Server.Error.t) Eta.Exit.t)
 51: 
 52: let validate_non_negative name value =
 53:   if value < 0 then
 54:     invalid_arg ("Eta_http_eio.Server_metrics." ^ name ^ ": value must be >= 0")
 55: 
 56: let counter name t make value =
 57:   validate_non_negative name value;
 58:   if value > 0 then run t (make t.attrs value)
 59: 
 60: let active_connections t value =
 61:   run t (Meter.active_connections ~attrs:t.attrs value)
 62: 
 63: let active_streams t value = run t (Meter.active_streams ~attrs:t.attrs value)
 64: 
 65: let requests_in_flight t value =
 66:   run t (Meter.requests_in_flight ~attrs:t.attrs value)
 67: 
 68: let shutdown_active t value =
 69:   run t (Meter.shutdown_active ~attrs:t.attrs value)
 70: 
 71: let requests_total t value =
 72:   counter "requests_total" t
 73:     (fun attrs value -> Meter.requests_total ~attrs value)
 74:     value
 75: 
 76: let request_body_bytes t value =
 77:   counter "request_body_bytes" t
 78:     (fun attrs value -> Meter.request_body_bytes ~attrs value)
 79:     value
 80: 
 81: let response_body_bytes t value =
 82:   counter "response_body_bytes" t
 83:     (fun attrs value -> Meter.response_body_bytes ~attrs value)
 84:     value
 85: 
 86: let stream_resets t value =
 87:   counter "stream_resets" t
 88:     (fun attrs value -> Meter.stream_resets ~attrs value)
 89:     value
 90: 
 91: let protocol_errors t value =
 92:   counter "protocol_errors" t
 93:     (fun attrs value -> Meter.protocol_errors ~attrs value)
 94:     value
 95: 
 96: let request_started t = requests_in_flight t 1
 97: 
 98: let request_finished t =
 99:   requests_total t 1;
100:   requests_in_flight t 0
101: 
102: let stream_started t = active_streams t 1
103: let stream_finished t = active_streams t 0
````

## File: lib/http_eio/server_metrics.mli
````ocaml
 1: (** Runtime-backed HTTP server metric emission. *)
 2: 
 3: type t
 4: 
 5: val connection :
 6:   runtime:Eta_http.Server.Error.t Eta.Runtime.t ->
 7:   connection:Server_types.Connection_info.t ->
 8:   t
 9: 
10: val request :
11:   runtime:Eta_http.Server.Error.t Eta.Runtime.t ->
12:   connection:Server_types.Connection_info.t ->
13:   emit_url_full:bool ->
14:   Eta_http.Server.Request.t ->
15:   t
16: 
17: val active_connections : t -> int -> unit
18: val active_streams : t -> int -> unit
19: val requests_in_flight : t -> int -> unit
20: val requests_total : t -> int -> unit
21: val request_body_bytes : t -> int -> unit
22: val response_body_bytes : t -> int -> unit
23: val stream_resets : t -> int -> unit
24: val protocol_errors : t -> int -> unit
25: val shutdown_active : t -> int -> unit
26: 
27: val request_started : t -> unit
28: val request_finished : t -> unit
29: val stream_started : t -> unit
30: val stream_finished : t -> unit
````

## File: test/http/test_eta_http_h2_support.ml
````ocaml
  1: open Test_eta_http_support
  2: 
  3: let h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs =
  4:   iovecs
  5:   |> Eta_http_eio.H2.Writer.cstructs_of_iovecs
  6:   |> List.map Cstruct.to_string
  7:   |> String.concat ""
  8: 
  9: let h2_feed_client client data =
 10:   let rec loop off =
 11:     if off < String.length data then (
 12:       let len = String.length data - off in
 13:       let buffer = Bigstringaf.of_string ~off ~len data in
 14:       let consumed = H2.Client_connection.read client buffer ~off:0 ~len in
 15:       if consumed <= 0 then Alcotest.fail "client consumed no h2 bytes";
 16:       loop (off + consumed))
 17:   in
 18:   loop 0
 19: 
 20: let h2_feed_server server data =
 21:   let rec loop off =
 22:     if off < String.length data then (
 23:       let len = String.length data - off in
 24:       let buffer = Bigstringaf.of_string ~off ~len data in
 25:       let consumed = H2.Server_connection.read server buffer ~off:0 ~len in
 26:       if consumed <= 0 then Alcotest.fail "server consumed no h2 bytes";
 27:       loop (off + consumed))
 28:   in
 29:   loop 0
 30: 
 31: let rec h2_drain_server_output server acc =
 32:   match H2.Server_connection.next_write_operation server with
 33:   | `Write iovecs ->
 34:       let data = h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs in
 35:       H2.Server_connection.report_write_result server (`Ok (String.length data));
 36:       h2_drain_server_output server (data :: acc)
 37:   | `Yield -> String.concat "" (List.rev acc)
 38:   | `Close _ ->
 39:       H2.Server_connection.report_write_result server `Closed;
 40:       String.concat "" (List.rev acc)
 41: 
 42: let h2_drain_client_to_server client server =
 43:   match H2.Client_connection.next_write_operation client with
 44:   | `Write iovecs ->
 45:       let data = h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs in
 46:       H2.Client_connection.report_write_result client (`Ok (String.length data));
 47:       h2_feed_server server data;
 48:       true
 49:   | `Yield -> false
 50:   | `Close _ ->
 51:       H2.Client_connection.report_write_result client `Closed;
 52:       false
 53: 
 54: let h2_drain_server_to_client server client =
 55:   match H2.Server_connection.next_write_operation server with
 56:   | `Write iovecs ->
 57:       let data = h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs in
 58:       H2.Server_connection.report_write_result server (`Ok (String.length data));
 59:       h2_feed_client client data;
 60:       true
 61:   | `Yield -> false
 62:   | `Close _ ->
 63:       H2.Server_connection.report_write_result server `Closed;
 64:       false
 65: 
 66: let h2_pump_pair ?(limit = 10_000) client server =
 67:   let rec loop remaining =
 68:     if remaining <= 0 then Alcotest.fail "h2 pump did not quiesce"
 69:     else
 70:       let client_progress = h2_drain_client_to_server client server in
 71:       let server_progress = h2_drain_server_to_client server client in
 72:       if client_progress || server_progress then loop (remaining - 1)
 73:   in
 74:   loop limit
 75: 
 76: let h2_cstruct_chunks ~chunk_size data =
 77:   let rec loop off acc =
 78:     if off >= String.length data then List.rev acc
 79:     else
 80:       let len = min chunk_size (String.length data - off) in
 81:       let buffer = Bigstringaf.of_string ~off ~len data in
 82:       loop (off + len) (Cstruct.of_bigarray buffer :: acc)
 83:   in
 84:   loop 0 []
 85: 
 86: type h2_read_result = {
 87:   mutable status : int option;
 88:   body : Buffer.t;
 89:   mutable eof : bool;
 90:   mutable client_errors : int;
 91:   mutable stream_errors : int;
 92: }
 93: 
 94: let h2_read_result () =
 95:   {
 96:     status = None;
 97:     body = Buffer.create 32;
 98:     eof = false;
 99:     client_errors = 0;
100:     stream_errors = 0;
101:   }
102: 
103: let h2_schedule_body result body =
104:   let rec loop () =
105:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read body
106:       ~on_eof:(fun () -> result.eof <- true)
107:       ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
108:         Buffer.add_string result.body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
109:         loop ())
110:   in
111:   loop ()
112: 
113: let h2_pp_client_error = function
114:   | `Malformed_response msg -> "malformed_response:" ^ msg
115:   | `Invalid_response_body_length _ -> "invalid_response_body_length"
116:   | `Protocol_error (code, msg) ->
117:       Format.asprintf "protocol_error:%a:%s" H2.Error_code.pp_hum code msg
118:   | `Exn exn -> "exn:" ^ Printexc.to_string exn
119: 
120: type h2_mux_result = {
121:   mutable mux_status : int option;
122:   mux_body : Buffer.t;
123:   mutable mux_eof : bool;
124:   mutable mux_stream_errors : string list;
125:   mutable mux_client_errors : string list;
126:   mutable mux_stream : Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.stream option;
127:   mutable mux_release : Eta_http.H2.Stream_state.release option;
128: }
129: 
130: let h2_mux_result () =
131:   {
132:     mux_status = None;
133:     mux_body = Buffer.create 128;
134:     mux_eof = false;
135:     mux_stream_errors = [];
136:     mux_client_errors = [];
137:     mux_stream = None;
138:     mux_release = None;
139:   }
140: 
141: let h2_mux_create ?max_concurrent ?config result () =
142:   Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.create ?max_concurrent ?config
143:     ~error_handler:(fun error ->
144:       result.mux_client_errors <- h2_pp_client_error error :: result.mux_client_errors)
145:     ()
146: 
147: let h2_schedule_mux_body mux result stream body =
148:   let rec loop () =
149:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read body
150:       ~on_eof:(fun () ->
151:         Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.mark_complete mux stream;
152:         result.mux_eof <- true)
153:       ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
154:         Buffer.add_string result.mux_body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
155:         loop ())
156:   in
157:   loop ()
158: 
159: let h2_open_mux_request ?(meth = `GET) ?body ?(target = "/") ?(tag = 0) mux
160:     result =
161:   let request =
162:     H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
163:       ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "api.example.test" ])
164:       meth target
165:   in
166:   match
167:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request mux ~tag request
168:       ~error_handler:(fun stream error ->
169:         result.mux_stream <- Some stream;
170:         result.mux_stream_errors <-
171:           h2_pp_client_error error :: result.mux_stream_errors)
172:       ~response_handler:(fun stream response response_body ->
173:         result.mux_stream <- Some stream;
174:         result.mux_status <- Some (H2.Status.to_code response.status);
175:         h2_schedule_mux_body mux result stream response_body)
176:   with
177:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected _) ->
178:       Error `Admission_rejected
179:   | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed -> Error `Connection_closed
180:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
181:       Error (`Request_failed message)
182:   | Ok opened ->
183:       result.mux_stream <- Some opened.stream;
184:       (match body with
185:       | None -> ()
186:       | Some body -> H2.Body.Writer.write_string opened.request_body body);
187:       H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body;
188:       Ok opened
189: 
190: let h2_server_read_body reqd ~on_done =
191:   let body = H2.Reqd.request_body reqd in
192:   let buffer = Buffer.create 4096 in
193:   let rec loop () =
194:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read body
195:       ~on_eof:(fun () -> on_done (Buffer.contents buffer))
196:       ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
197:         Buffer.add_string buffer (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
198:         loop ())
199:   in
200:   loop ()
201: 
202: 
203: let h2_frame_header ~length ~frame_type ~flags ~stream_id =
204:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length ~frame_type:(Other frame_type) ~flags
205:     ~stream_id
206: 
207: let h2_uint32 = Eta_http.H2.Frame.uint32
208: 
209: let h2_settings_frame = Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
210: 
211: let h2_goaway_no_error = Eta_http.H2.Frame.goaway_no_error
212: 
213: let h2_payload = Eta_http.H2.Frame.payload
214: 
215: let h2_observe_security data =
216:   let security = Eta_http.H2.Security.create () in
217:   let bs = Bigstringaf.of_string ~off:0 ~len:(String.length data) data in
218:   Eta_http.H2.Security.observe security bs ~off:0 ~len:(String.length data)
````

## File: test/http/test_eta_http_h2_writer.ml
````ocaml
 1: open Test_eta_http_support
 2: 
 3: let test_h2_writer_drains_client_preface_and_request () =
 4:   let client =
 5:     H2.Client_connection.create
 6:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected client h2 error")
 7:       ()
 8:   in
 9:   let request =
10:     H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
11:       ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "api.example.test" ])
12:       `GET "/writer"
13:   in
14:   let request_body =
15:     H2.Client_connection.request client request
16:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected stream h2 error")
17:       ~response_handler:(fun _ _ -> ())
18:   in
19:   H2.Body.Writer.close request_body;
20:   let buffer = Buffer.create 256 in
21:   let flow = Eio.Flow.buffer_sink buffer in
22:   (match Eta_http_eio.H2.Writer.drain_client ~flow client with
23:   | Yield { written } ->
24:       Alcotest.(check bool) "wrote bytes" true (written > 24)
25:   | Close { code; _ } -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected close code=%d" code);
26:   let output = Buffer.contents buffer in
27:   let preface = "PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n" in
28:   Alcotest.(check string) "connection preface" preface
29:     (String.sub output 0 (String.length preface));
30:   match Eta_http_eio.H2.Writer.drain_client ~flow client with
31:   | Yield { written = 0 } -> ()
32:   | Yield { written } -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected extra write=%d" written
33:   | Close { code; _ } -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected second close code=%d" code
34: 
35: let test_h2_writer_blocked_write_teardown () =
36:   with_test_clock @@ fun _sw _clock rt ->
37:   let client =
38:     H2.Client_connection.create
39:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected client h2 error")
40:       ()
41:   in
42:   let request =
43:     H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
44:       ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "api.example.test" ])
45:       `GET "/blocked-writer"
46:   in
47:   let request_body =
48:     H2.Client_connection.request client request
49:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected stream h2 error")
50:       ~response_handler:(fun _ _ -> ())
51:   in
52:   H2.Body.Writer.close request_body;
53:   let started = Eta.Channel.create ~capacity:1 () in
54:   let blocked = Eta.Channel.create ~capacity:1 () in
55:   let write_started = ref false in
56:   let write _iovecs =
57:     let signal =
58:       if !write_started then Eta.Effect.unit
59:       else (
60:         write_started := true;
61:         Eta.Channel.try_send started () |> Eta.Effect.map (fun _ -> ()))
62:     in
63:     signal
64:     |> Eta.Effect.bind (fun () ->
65:            Eta.Channel.recv blocked |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () -> 1))
66:   in
67:   let eff =
68:     Eta.Supervisor.scoped
69:       {
70:         run =
71:           (fun supervisor ->
72:             let open Eta.Supervisor.Scope in
73:             let* _writer =
74:               start supervisor
75:                 (lift (Eta_http_eio.H2.Writer.run_client ~write client))
76:             in
77:             let* _ = lift (Eta.Channel.recv started) in
78:             pure ());
79:       }
80:   in
81:   (match Eta.Runtime.run rt eff with
82:   | Eta.Exit.Ok () -> ()
83:   | Eta.Exit.Error cause ->
84:       Alcotest.failf "blocked writer scope failed: %a"
85:         (Eta.Cause.pp (fun fmt -> function
86:           | `Closed -> Format.pp_print_string fmt "closed"
87:           | `Closed_with_error _ ->
88:               Format.pp_print_string fmt "closed_with_error"))
89:         cause);
90:   Alcotest.(check bool) "write started" true !write_started
````

## File: test/http/test_eta_http_support.ml
````ocaml
 1: module Loaded = Eta_http
 2: 
 3: let reclaim_eio_backend () =
 4:   Gc.full_major ();
 5:   Gc.compact ()
 6: 
 7: let run_linux_eio ?fallback f =
 8:   reclaim_eio_backend ();
 9:   Fun.protect ~finally:reclaim_eio_backend (fun () ->
10:       (* Keep normal queue capacity, but avoid per-runtime fixed-buffer
11:          memlock pressure in this many-short-schedulers test binary. *)
12:       Eio_linux.run ?fallback ~queue_depth:64 ~n_blocks:1 f)
13: 
14: let run_eio f =
15:   match Sys.getenv_opt "EIO_BACKEND" with
16:   | Some ("linux" | "io-uring") -> run_linux_eio f
17:   | None | Some "" ->
18:       run_linux_eio ~fallback:(fun _ -> Eio_main.run f) f
19:   | _ -> Eio_main.run f
20: 
21: let with_test_clock f =
22:   run_eio @@ fun stdenv ->
23:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
24:   let clock = Eta_test.Test_clock.create () in
25:   let rt =
26:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock:(Eio.Stdenv.clock stdenv)
27:       ~sleep:(Eta_test.Test_clock.sleep clock)
28:       ~now_ms:(fun () -> Eta_test.Test_clock.now_ms clock)
29:       ()
30:   in
31:   f sw clock rt
32: 
33: let with_traced_test_clock f =
34:   run_eio @@ fun stdenv ->
35:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
36:   let clock = Eta_test.Test_clock.create () in
37:   let tracer = Eta.Tracer.in_memory () in
38:   let rt =
39:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock:(Eio.Stdenv.clock stdenv)
40:       ~sleep:(Eta_test.Test_clock.sleep clock)
41:       ~now_ms:(fun () -> Eta_test.Test_clock.now_ms clock)
42:       ~tracer:(Eta.Tracer.as_capability tracer) ()
43:   in
44:   f sw clock rt tracer
45: 
46: let contains haystack needle =
47:   let h_len = String.length haystack in
48:   let n_len = String.length needle in
49:   let rec loop index =
50:     index + n_len <= h_len
51:     && (String.equal needle (String.sub haystack index n_len)
52:        || loop (index + 1))
53:   in
54:   n_len = 0 || loop 0
55: 
56: let body_size_cap = 1_048_576
57: 
58: let expect_body_too_large label ~limit = function
59:   | Eta.Exit.Error
60:       (Eta.Cause.Fail
61:         { Eta_http.Error.kind = Body_too_large { limit = actual; length }; _ }) ->
62:       Alcotest.(check int) (label ^ " limit") limit actual;
63:       Alcotest.(check bool) (label ^ " length") true (length > limit)
64:   | Eta.Exit.Ok body ->
65:       Alcotest.failf "%s accepted %d bytes" label (Bytes.length body)
66:   | Eta.Exit.Error cause ->
67:       Alcotest.failf "%s unexpected failure: %a" label
68:         (Eta.Cause.pp Eta_http.Error.pp)
69:         cause
70: 
71: let retry_response ?(headers = []) ?(release = fun () -> Eta.Effect.unit) status =
72:   Eta_http.Response.make ~status ~headers
73:     ~body:(Eta_http.Body.Stream.of_bytes ~release [])
74:     ()
75: 
76: let retry_client responses =
77:   let attempts = ref 0 in
78:   let request _ =
79:     let index = min !attempts (Array.length responses - 1) in
80:     incr attempts;
81:     Eta.Effect.pure (responses.(index) ())
82:   in
83:   ( attempts,
84:     Eta_http.Client.make_custom ~protocol:Eta_http.Client.H1 ~request
85:       ~stats:(fun () ->
86:         Eta.Effect.pure
87:           {
88:             Eta_http.Client.protocol = H1;
89:             active = 0;
90:             idle = 0;
91:             capacity = 0;
92:             opened = !attempts;
93:             released = 0;
94:           })
95:       ~shutdown:(fun () -> Eta.Effect.unit) )
````

````

 2: opam-version: "2.0"
 3: synopsis: "Eio transport adapter for eta-http"
 4: description:
 5:   "eta_http_eio provides Eio-backed HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, TLS, and WebSocket transport adapters for eta-http."
 6: depends: [
 7:   "ocaml" {>= "5.2.0"}

 9:   "eta"
````
