## File: http-testsuite/lib/adversarial.ml
````ocaml
  1: (** Adversarial / CVE replay fixtures.
  2:    Each fixture is an in-process malicious server.
  3:    Acceptance: eta-http returns a typed error within a deadline, and resource
  4:    bounds are respected. *)
  5: 
  6: open Types
  7: open Eio.Std
  8: 
  9: let rss_kb = Util.rss_kb
 10: let fd_count = Util.fd_count
 11: let minor_words (x, _, _, _) = x
 12: let major_words (_, x, _, _) = x
 13: 
 14: let timeout_error ~url ~deadline_sec =
 15:   let timeout_ms = max 1 (int_of_float (deadline_sec *. 1000.0)) in
 16:   Eta_http.Error.make ~method_:"GET" ~uri:url
 17:     (Total_request_timeout { timeout_ms = Some timeout_ms })
 18: 
 19: let cve_scenario_filter =
 20:   lazy
 21:     (match Sys.getenv_opt "ETA_HTTP_TESTSUITE_CVE_SCENARIOS" with
 22:     | None | Some "" -> None
 23:     | Some raw ->
 24:         Some
 25:           (raw |> String.split_on_char ','
 26:           |> List.map String.trim
 27:           |> List.filter (fun item -> not (String.equal item ""))))
 28: 
 29: let cve_scenario_selected name =
 30:   match Lazy.force cve_scenario_filter with
 31:   | None -> true
 32:   | Some names -> List.exists (String.equal name) names
 33: 
 34: let add_cve_result name run results =
 35:   if cve_scenario_selected name then run () :: results else results
 36: 
 37: (** Generic runner: spawns a malicious server, makes one eta-http request,
 38:     and records metrics. *)
 39: let run_malicious_request ?consume_response ~env ~name ~server_fn ~url_builder
 40:     ~deadline_sec () =
 41:   let fd_base = fd_count () in
 42:   let start = Util.now_ms () in
 43:   let gc_before = Util.gc_stat () in
 44:   let port = Util.random_port () in
 45:   let server_done, resolve_server = Eio.Promise.create () in
 46:   Eio.Switch.run (fun sw ->
 47:       let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 48:       let socket =
 49:         Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
 50:           (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 51:       in
 52:       Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw (fun () ->
 53:           Eio.Switch.run (fun conn_sw ->
 54:               let flow, _addr = Eio.Net.accept ~sw:conn_sw socket in
 55:               Fun.protect
 56:                 ~finally:(fun () ->
 57:                     try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ();
 58:                     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_server ()))
 59:                 (fun () -> try server_fn ~env flow with _ -> ()));
 60:           `Stop_daemon);
 61:       let url = url_builder port in
 62:       let client = Eta_http_eio.Client.make ~sw ~net:(Eio.Stdenv.net env) () in
 63:       let request = Eta_http.Request.make "GET" url in
 64:       let rt = Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock:(Eio.Stdenv.clock env) () in
 65:       let consume_response =
 66:         match consume_response with
 67:         | Some consume -> consume
 68:         | None ->
 69:             fun (response : Eta_http.Response.t) ->
 70:               Util.body_to_string response.body |> Eta.Effect.map (fun _ -> `Ok)
 71:       in
 72:       let result =
 73:         Eta_http.request client request
 74:         |> Eta.Effect.bind consume_response
 75:         |> Eta.Effect.timeout_as
 76:              (Eta.Duration.ms (max 1 (int_of_float (deadline_sec *. 1000.0))))
 77:              ~on_timeout:(timeout_error ~url ~deadline_sec)
 78:         |> Eta.Runtime.run rt
 79:         |> function
 80:         | Eta.Exit.Ok `Ok -> `Completed
 81:         | Eta.Exit.Error cause ->
 82:             let msg = Format.asprintf "%a" (Eta.Cause.pp Eta_http.Error.pp) cause in
 83:             `Error msg
 84:       in
 85:       ignore (Eta.Runtime.run rt (Eta_http.Client.shutdown client));
 86:       let duration_ms = Util.now_ms () -. start in
 87:       let peak_rss = rss_kb () in
 88:       let fd_after = fd_count () in
 89:       let gc_after = Util.gc_stat () in
 90:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_server ());
 91:       let error_variant, eta_error =
 92:         match result with
 93:         | `Timeout -> Some "total_request_timeout", Some "deadline exceeded"
 94:         | `Error e -> Some "connection_closed", Some e
 95:         | `Completed -> None, None
 96:       in
 97:       { name;
 98:         passed = (result <> `Completed);
 99:         skipped = None;
100:         deadline_respected = (result <> `Completed);
101:         peak_rss_kb = peak_rss;
102:         error_variant;
103:         eta_error;
104:         duration_ms;
105:         fd_baseline = fd_base;
106:         fd_after;
107:         minor_words_during = minor_words gc_after -. minor_words gc_before;
108:         major_words_during = major_words gc_after -. major_words gc_before;
109:       })
110: 
111: (** Server-side runner: starts an Eta H1 server and drives it with a raw
112:     malicious client. *)
113: let tcp_port = function
114:   | `Tcp (_, port) -> port
115:   | `Unix _ -> invalid_arg "expected TCP listener"
116: 
117: let read_h1_response ?(max_bytes = 64 * 1024) flow =
118:   let buffer = Buffer.create 256 in
119:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
120:   let rec loop total =
121:     if total >= max_bytes then Buffer.contents buffer
122:     else
123:       let len = min (Cstruct.length scratch) (max_bytes - total) in
124:       match Eio.Flow.single_read flow (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len) with
125:       | 0 -> Buffer.contents buffer
126:       | read ->
127:           Buffer.add_string buffer
128:             (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 read));
129:           loop (total + read)
130:       | exception End_of_file -> Buffer.contents buffer
131:   in
132:   loop 0
133: 
134: let h1_status response =
135:   if
136:     String.length response >= 12
137:     && String.starts_with ~prefix:"HTTP/1.1 " response
138:   then
139:     try Some (int_of_string (String.sub response 9 3)) with
140:     | Failure _ -> None
141:   else None
142: 
143: let h1_status_line response =
144:   match String.index_opt response '\r' with
145:   | Some index -> String.sub response 0 index
146:   | None -> response
147: 
148: let h1_adversarial_config ?request_header_timeout ?request_body_timeout
149:     ?max_request_header_bytes ?max_trailer_bytes () =
150:   let limits =
151:     {
152:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits with
153:       max_request_header_bytes =
154:         Option.value max_request_header_bytes
155:           ~default:
156:             Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits.max_request_header_bytes;
157:       max_trailer_bytes =
158:         Option.value max_trailer_bytes
159:           ~default:Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits.max_trailer_bytes;
160:     }
161:   in
162:   let timeouts =
163:     {
164:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
165:       request_header_timeout =
166:         Option.value request_header_timeout
167:           ~default:
168:             Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts.request_header_timeout;
169:       request_body_timeout =
170:         Option.value request_body_timeout
171:           ~default:Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts.request_body_timeout;
172:     }
173:   in
174:   let server = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with limits; timeouts } in
175:   {
176:     Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
177:     backlog = 1;
178:     max_connections = 8;
179:     server;
180:   }
181: 
182: let h1_body_draining_handler request =
183:   Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.Eta_http.Server.Request.body
184:   |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
185:          Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
186:            ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
187:            ())
188: 
189: let run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name ?config ~expected_status
190:     ~deadline_sec client_fn =
191:   let fd_base = fd_count () in
192:   let start = Util.now_ms () in
193:   let gc_before = Util.gc_stat () in
194:   let result =
195:     try
196:       Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
197:       let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
198:       let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
199:       let socket =
200:         Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
201:           (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
202:       in
203:       let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
204:       let config =
205:         Option.value config ~default:(h1_adversarial_config ())
206:       in
207:       let server =
208:         Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h1_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket
209:           h1_body_draining_handler
210:       in
211:       let flow =
212:         Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
213:       in
214:       Fun.protect
215:         ~finally:(fun () ->
216:           (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
217:           Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
218:         (fun () ->
219:           try
220:             let response =
221:               Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock deadline_sec (fun () ->
222:                   client_fn ~clock flow)
223:             in
224:             `Response response
225:           with
226:           | Eio.Time.Timeout -> `Timeout
227:           | exn -> `Error (Printexc.to_string exn))
228:     with exn -> `Error (Printexc.to_string exn)
229:   in
230:   let duration_ms = Util.now_ms () -. start in
231:   let peak_rss = rss_kb () in
232:   let fd_after = fd_count () in
233:   let gc_after = Util.gc_stat () in
234:   let passed, deadline_respected, error_variant, eta_error =
235:     match result with
236:     | `Response response -> (
237:         match h1_status response with
238:         | Some status ->
239:             ( status = expected_status,
240:               true,
241:               Some (Printf.sprintf "h1_status_%d" status),
242:               Some (h1_status_line response) )
243:         | None ->
244:             ( false,
245:               true,
246:               Some "h1_malformed_response",
247:               Some (h1_status_line response) ))
248:     | `Timeout -> (false, false, Some "deadline_exceeded", Some "timeout")
249:     | `Error message -> (false, true, Some "exception", Some message)
250:   in
251:   {
252:     name;
253:     passed;
254:     skipped = None;
255:     deadline_respected;
256:     peak_rss_kb = peak_rss;
257:     error_variant;
258:     eta_error;
259:     duration_ms;
260:     fd_baseline = fd_base;
261:     fd_after;
262:     minor_words_during = minor_words gc_after -. minor_words gc_before;
263:     major_words_during = major_words gc_after -. major_words gc_before;
264:   }
265: 
266: let h2_client_preface = "PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
267: 
268: let h2_request_block ?(method_ = "GET") ?(path = "/")
269:     ?(authority = Some "example.test") () =
270:   let headers =
271:     [
272:       Malicious_h2.hpack_literal ~name:":method" ~value:method_;
273:       Malicious_h2.hpack_literal ~name:":scheme" ~value:"http";
274:       Malicious_h2.hpack_literal ~name:":path" ~value:path;
275:     ]
276:   in
277:   let headers =
278:     match authority with
279:     | None -> headers
280:     | Some authority ->
281:         headers
282:         @ [ Malicious_h2.hpack_literal ~name:":authority" ~value:authority ]
283:   in
284:   String.concat "" headers
285: 
286: let h2_request_headers ?(end_headers = true) ?(end_stream = true) ~stream_id
287:     ?method_ ?path ?authority () =
288:   let flags =
289:     (if end_headers then 0x04 else 0x00)
290:     lor (if end_stream then 0x01 else 0x00)
291:   in
292:   Malicious_h2.frame ~ty:0x01 ~flags ~stream_id
293:     (h2_request_block ?method_ ?path ?authority ())
294: 
295: let h2_frame_header ~length ~ty ~flags ~stream_id =
296:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length ~frame_type:(Other ty) ~flags ~stream_id
297: 
298: let h2_adversarial_config ?request_header_timeout ?request_body_timeout
299:     ?idle_timeout ?unread_body_policy ?security_config () =
300:   let timeouts =
301:     {
302:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
303:       request_header_timeout =
304:         Option.value request_header_timeout
305:           ~default:
306:             Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts.request_header_timeout;
307:       request_body_timeout =
308:         Option.value request_body_timeout
309:           ~default:Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts.request_body_timeout;
310:       idle_timeout =
311:         Option.value idle_timeout
312:           ~default:Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts.idle_timeout;
313:     }
314:   in
315:   let server =
316:     {
317:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default with
318:       timeouts;
319:       unread_body_policy =
320:         Option.value unread_body_policy
321:           ~default:Eta_http.Server.Config.default.unread_body_policy;
322:     }
323:   in
324:   {
325:     Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
326:     backlog = 1;
327:     max_connections = 8;
328:     server;
329:     h2_security_config = security_config;
330:   }
331: 
332: let h2_basic_handler _request =
333:   Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
334: 
335: let write_all_string flow s = Eio.Flow.write flow [ Cstruct.of_string s ]
336: 
337: let read_h2_until_close ?(max_bytes = 64 * 1024) flow =
338:   let buffer = Buffer.create 256 in
339:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
340:   let rec loop total =
341:     if total >= max_bytes then `Data_limit (Buffer.contents buffer)
342:     else
343:       let len = min (Cstruct.length scratch) (max_bytes - total) in
344:       match Eio.Flow.single_read flow (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len) with
345:       | 0 -> `Closed (Buffer.contents buffer)
346:       | read ->
347:           Buffer.add_string buffer
348:             (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 read));
349:           loop (total + read)
350:       | exception End_of_file -> `Closed (Buffer.contents buffer)
351:   in
352:   loop 0
353: 
354: let run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name ?config ~deadline_sec client_fn =
355:   let fd_base = fd_count () in
356:   let start = Util.now_ms () in
357:   let gc_before = Util.gc_stat () in
358:   let result =
359:     try
360:       Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
361:       let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
362:       let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
363:       let socket =
364:         Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
365:           (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
366:       in
367:       let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
368:       let config =
369:         Option.value config ~default:(h2_adversarial_config ())
370:       in
371:       Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw
372:         (fun () ->
373:           Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
374:           let flow, peer = Eio.Net.accept ~sw:conn_sw socket in
375:           let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
376:             Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
377:           in
378:           Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw:conn_sw ~clock
379:             ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.flow)
380:             ~peer ~config ~runtime_factory h2_basic_handler;
381:           `Stop_daemon);
382:       let flow =
383:         Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
384:       in
385:       Fun.protect
386:         ~finally:(fun () ->
387:           try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ())
388:         (fun () ->
389:           try
390:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock deadline_sec (fun () ->
391:                 match (try client_fn flow; Ok () with exn -> Error exn) with
392:                 | Ok () -> read_h2_until_close flow
393:                 | Error _ -> `Closed "")
394:           with
395:           | Eio.Time.Timeout -> `Timeout
396:           | exn -> `Error (Printexc.to_string exn))
397:     with exn -> `Error (Printexc.to_string exn)
398:   in
399:   let duration_ms = Util.now_ms () -. start in
400:   let peak_rss = rss_kb () in
401:   let fd_after = fd_count () in
402:   let gc_after = Util.gc_stat () in
403:   let passed, deadline_respected, error_variant, eta_error =
404:     match result with
405:     | `Closed response ->
406:         (true, true, Some "h2_connection_closed", Some (string_of_int (String.length response)))
407:     | `Data_limit response ->
408:         ( false,
409:           true,
410:           Some "h2_data_limit",
411:           Some (string_of_int (String.length response)) )
412:     | `Timeout -> (false, false, Some "deadline_exceeded", Some "timeout")
413:     | `Error message -> (false, true, Some "exception", Some message)
414:   in
415:   {
416:     name;
417:     passed;
418:     skipped = None;
419:     deadline_respected;
420:     peak_rss_kb = peak_rss;
421:     error_variant;
422:     eta_error;
423:     duration_ms;
424:     fd_baseline = fd_base;
425:     fd_after;
426:     minor_words_during = minor_words gc_after -. minor_words gc_before;
427:     major_words_during = major_words gc_after -. major_words gc_before;
428:   }
429: 
430: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
431:    1. CVE-2023-44487 — HTTP/2 Rapid Reset
432:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
433: let cve_2023_44487 ~env =
434:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"cve_2023_44487_rapid_reset"
435:     ~deadline_sec:2.0
436:     (fun flow ->
437:       let frames =
438:         String.concat ""
439:           (List.init 101 (fun index ->
440:                let stream_id = (index * 2) + 1 in
441:                h2_request_headers ~end_stream:false ~stream_id ()
442:                ^ Malicious_h2.rst_stream_frame ~stream_id 8))
443:       in
444:       write_all_string flow
445:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame [] ^ frames))
446: 
447: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
448:    2. CVE-2024-27919 / CVE-2024-28182 — CONTINUATION flood
449:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
450: let cve_2024_27919 ~env =
451:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env
452:     ~name:"cve_2024_27919_continuation_flood" ~deadline_sec:2.0
453:     (fun flow ->
454:       let continuations =
455:         String.concat ""
456:           (List.init 9 (fun _ ->
457:                Malicious_h2.continuation_frame ~end_headers:false ~stream_id:1
458:                  (String.make 8192 'x')))
459:       in
460:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
461:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
462:        ^ h2_request_headers ~end_headers:false ~stream_id:1 ()
463:        ^ continuations)
464:         flow)
465: 
466: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
467:    3. HPACK bomb
468:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
469: let hpack_bomb ~env =
470:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"hpack_bomb" ~deadline_sec:2.0
471:     (fun flow ->
472:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
473:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
474:        ^ h2_frame_header ~length:(300 * 1024) ~ty:0x01 ~flags:0x04
475:            ~stream_id:1)
476:         flow)
477: 
478: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
479:    4. HTTP/2 DoS family CVE-2019-9511..9518
480:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
481: let dos_family ~env =
482:   [
483:     run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"dos_ping_flood"
484:       ~deadline_sec:2.0
485:       (fun flow ->
486:         Eio.Flow.copy_string
487:           (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
488:          ^ String.concat ""
489:              (List.init 101 (fun _ ->
490:                   Malicious_h2.ping_frame ~ack:false "pingflood")))
491:           flow);
492:     run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"dos_settings_flood"
493:       ~deadline_sec:2.0
494:       (fun flow ->
495:         Eio.Flow.copy_string
496:           (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
497:          ^ String.concat ""
498:              (List.init 10 (fun _ ->
499:                   Malicious_h2.settings_frame [ (0x3, 100); (0x4, 65535) ])))
500:           flow);
501:     run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"dos_empty_frames_flood"
502:       ~deadline_sec:2.0
503:       (fun flow ->
504:         Eio.Flow.copy_string
505:           (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
506:          ^ h2_request_headers ~end_stream:false ~stream_id:1 ()
507:          ^ String.concat ""
508:              (List.init 101 (fun _ ->
509:                   Malicious_h2.data_frame ~end_stream:false ~stream_id:1 "")))
510:           flow);
511:   ]
512: 
513: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
514:    5. WINDOW_UPDATE accounting
515:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
516: let window_update ~env =
517:   let security_config =
518:     {
519:       Eta_http.H2.Security.default_config with
520:       max_window_update_per_connection = 2;
521:     }
522:   in
523:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"window_update_accounting"
524:     ~config:(h2_adversarial_config ~security_config ()) ~deadline_sec:2.0
525:     (fun flow ->
526:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
527:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
528:        ^ String.concat ""
529:            (List.init 3 (fun _ ->
530:                 Malicious_h2.window_update_frame ~stream_id:0 1)))
531:         flow)
532: 
533: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
534:    6. DATA slowloris (h1)
535:    Server sends 1 byte every few seconds indefinitely.
536:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
537: let slowloris_h1_server ~env ~delay_sec flow =
538:   let buf = Cstruct.create 4096 in
539:   (try
540:      let n = Eio.Flow.single_read flow buf in
541:      ignore (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub buf 0 n))
542:    with _ -> ());
543:   let header = "HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-Length: 100\r\n\r\n" in
544:   Eio.Flow.copy_string header flow;
545:   for _i = 1 to 100 do
546:     try
547:       Eio.Flow.copy_string "x" flow;
548:       Eio.Time.sleep (Eio.Stdenv.clock env) delay_sec
549:     with _ -> ()
550:   done
551: 
552: let data_slowloris ~env =
553:   run_malicious_request ~env ~name:"data_slowloris_h1"
554:     ~server_fn:(fun ~env flow -> slowloris_h1_server ~env ~delay_sec:5.0 flow)
555:     ~url_builder:(fun port -> Printf.sprintf "http://127.0.0.1:%d/" port)
556:     ~deadline_sec:3.0 ()
557: 
558: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
559:    7. Decompression bomb
560:    Server serves a gzip-encoded body that expands to many MB.
561:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
562: let decompression_bomb_server ~env flow =
563:   let temp_dir = Filename.concat (Filename.get_temp_dir_name ()) "decomp_bomb" in
564:   Util.mkdir_p temp_dir;
565:   let bomb_path = Filename.concat temp_dir "bomb.gz" in
566:   Malicious_h2.generate_gzip_bomb ~path:bomb_path ~expanded_bytes:(50 * 1024 * 1024);
567:   let buf = Cstruct.create 4096 in
568:   (try
569:      let n = Eio.Flow.single_read flow buf in
570:      ignore (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub buf 0 n))
571:    with _ -> ());
572:   let header =
573:     "HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nContent-Type: text/plain\r\nContent-Encoding: gzip\r\n\r\n"
574:   in
575:   Eio.Flow.copy_string header flow;
576:   let ic = open_in_bin bomb_path in
577:   Fun.protect
578:     ~finally:(fun () -> close_in_noerr ic)
579:     (fun () ->
580:        let chunk = Bytes.create 65536 in
581:        let rec loop () =
582:          match input ic chunk 0 (Bytes.length chunk) with
583:          | 0 -> ()
584:          | n ->
585:              Eio.Flow.copy_string (Bytes.sub_string chunk 0 n) flow;
586:              loop ()
587:        in
588:        loop ())
589: 
590: let decompression_bomb ~env =
591:   run_malicious_request ~env ~name:"decompression_bomb"
592:     ~server_fn:decompression_bomb_server
593:     ~url_builder:(fun port -> Printf.sprintf "http://127.0.0.1:%d/" port)
594:     ~consume_response:(fun (response : Eta_http.Response.t) ->
595:       let decoded =
596:         Eta_http.Body.Transducer.gzip_decode ~max_decoded_bytes:(1024 * 1024)
597:           response.body
598:       in
599:       Eta_http.Body.Stream.read_all decoded |> Eta.Effect.map (fun _ -> `Ok))
600:     ~deadline_sec:10.0 ()
601: 
602: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
603:    8. H1 server adversarial clients
604:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
605: let h1_slowloris_headers ~env =
606:   let config =
607:     h1_adversarial_config
608:       ~request_header_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
609:       ()
610:   in
611:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_slowloris_headers" ~config
612:     ~expected_status:408 ~deadline_sec:1.0
613:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
614:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
615:         "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\nX-Slow: " flow;
616:       read_h1_response flow)
617: 
618: let h1_slow_body ~env =
619:   let config =
620:     h1_adversarial_config
621:       ~request_body_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
622:       ()
623:   in
624:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_slow_body" ~config
625:     ~expected_status:408 ~deadline_sec:1.0
626:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
627:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
628:         ("POST /echo HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n"
629:        ^ "Connection: close\r\nContent-Length: 5\r\n\r\nhe")
630:         flow;
631:       read_h1_response flow)
632: 
633: let h1_invalid_chunk ~env =
634:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_invalid_chunk"
635:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
636:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
637:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
638:         ("POST /echo HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n"
639:        ^ "Connection: close\r\nTransfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n\r\n"
640:        ^ "z\r\nboom\r\n")
641:         flow;
642:       read_h1_response flow)
643: 
644: let h1_cl_te_smuggling ~env =
645:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_cl_te_smuggling"
646:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
647:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
648:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
649:         ("POST /echo HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n"
650:        ^ "Connection: keep-alive\r\nContent-Length: 4\r\n"
651:        ^ "Transfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n\r\n"
652:        ^ "0\r\n\r\nGET /healthz HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n\r\n")
653:         flow;
654:       read_h1_response flow)
655: 
656: let h1_duplicate_content_length ~env =
657:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_duplicate_content_length"
658:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
659:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
660:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
661:         ("POST /echo HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n"
662:        ^ "Connection: keep-alive\r\nContent-Length: 5\r\n"
663:        ^ "Content-Length: 5\r\n\r\nhello"
664:        ^ "GET /healthz HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n\r\n")
665:         flow;
666:       read_h1_response flow)
667: 
668: let h1_missing_host ~env =
669:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_missing_host"
670:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
671:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
672:       Eio.Flow.copy_string "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n" flow;
673:       read_h1_response flow)
674: 
675: let h1_duplicate_host ~env =
676:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_duplicate_host"
677:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
678:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
679:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
680:         ("GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\nHost: shadow.test\r\n"
681:        ^ "Connection: close\r\n\r\n")
682:         flow;
683:       read_h1_response flow)
684: 
685: let h1_invalid_host ~env =
686:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_invalid_host"
687:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
688:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
689:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
690:         "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: bad/name\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n"
691:         flow;
692:       read_h1_response flow)
693: 
694: let h1_invalid_request_target ~env =
695:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_invalid_request_target"
696:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
697:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
698:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
699:         "GET noslash HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n"
700:         flow;
701:       read_h1_response flow)
702: 
703: let h1_absolute_form_host_conflict ~env =
704:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_absolute_form_host_conflict"
705:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
706:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
707:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
708:         ("GET http://example.test/conflict HTTP/1.1\r\n"
709:        ^ "Host: shadow.test\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n")
710:         flow;
711:       read_h1_response flow)
712: 
713: let h1_header_flood ~env =
714:   let config = h1_adversarial_config ~max_request_header_bytes:64 () in
715:   let flood = String.make 256 'x' in
716:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_header_flood" ~config
717:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
718:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
719:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
720:         ("GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\nX-Flood: " ^ flood
721:        ^ "\r\n\r\n")
722:         flow;
723:       read_h1_response flow)
724: 
725: let h1_oversized_trailers ~env =
726:   let config = h1_adversarial_config ~max_trailer_bytes:8 () in
727:   run_eta_h1_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h1_oversized_trailers" ~config
728:     ~expected_status:400 ~deadline_sec:1.0
729:     (fun ~clock:_ flow ->
730:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
731:         ("POST /echo HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.test\r\n"
732:        ^ "Connection: close\r\nTransfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n\r\n"
733:        ^ "0\r\nX-Too-Large: value\r\n\r\n")
734:         flow;
735:       read_h1_response flow)
736: 
737: let h2_slow_preface_timeout ~env =
738:   let config =
739:     h2_adversarial_config
740:       ~request_header_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
741:       ()
742:   in
743:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h2_slow_preface_timeout"
744:     ~config ~deadline_sec:1.0
745:     (fun flow -> Eio.Flow.copy_string "PRI * " flow)
746: 
747: let h2_slow_headers_timeout ~env =
748:   let config =
749:     h2_adversarial_config
750:       ~request_header_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
751:       ()
752:   in
753:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h2_slow_headers_timeout"
754:     ~config ~deadline_sec:1.0
755:     (fun flow ->
756:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
757:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
758:        ^ h2_frame_header ~length:64 ~ty:0x01 ~flags:0x04 ~stream_id:1)
759:         flow)
760: 
761: let h2_slow_body_timeout ~env =
762:   let config =
763:     h2_adversarial_config
764:       ~request_body_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
765:       ~idle_timeout:(Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50))
766:       ~unread_body_policy:(Eta_http.Server.Config.Drain_up_to 64)
767:       ()
768:   in
769:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h2_slow_body_timeout" ~config
770:     ~deadline_sec:1.0
771:     (fun flow ->
772:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
773:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
774:        ^ h2_request_headers ~method_:"POST" ~end_stream:false ~stream_id:1 ()
775:        ^ Malicious_h2.data_frame ~end_stream:false ~stream_id:1 "he")
776:         flow)
777: 
778: let h2_invalid_request_target ~env =
779:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h2_invalid_request_target"
780:     ~deadline_sec:1.0
781:     (fun flow ->
782:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
783:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
784:        ^ h2_request_headers ~path:"noslash" ~stream_id:1 ())
785:         flow;
786:       Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `Send)
787: 
788: let h2_missing_authority ~env =
789:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"h2_missing_authority"
790:     ~deadline_sec:1.0
791:     (fun flow ->
792:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
793:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
794:        ^ h2_request_headers ~authority:None ~stream_id:1 ())
795:         flow;
796:       Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `Send)
797: 
798: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
799:    8. GOAWAY churn
800:    Server sends GOAWAY repeatedly while continuing to accept streams.
801:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
802: let goaway_churn ~env =
803:   run_eta_h2c_adversarial_client ~env ~name:"goaway_churn" ~deadline_sec:2.0
804:     (fun flow ->
805:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
806:         (h2_client_preface ^ Malicious_h2.settings_frame []
807:        ^ Malicious_h2.goaway_frame ~last_stream_id:0 ~error_code:0 ()
808:        ^ Malicious_h2.goaway_frame ~last_stream_id:0 ~error_code:0 ())
809:         flow)
810: 
811: (* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
812:    Orchestration
813:    --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
814: 
815: let run_all ~env =
816:   let results = [] in
817:   let results =
818:     add_cve_result "cve_2023_44487_rapid_reset"
819:       (fun () -> cve_2023_44487 ~env)
820:       results
821:   in
822:   let results =
823:     add_cve_result "cve_2024_27919_continuation_flood"
824:       (fun () -> cve_2024_27919 ~env)
825:       results
826:   in
827:   let results =
828:     add_cve_result "hpack_bomb" (fun () -> hpack_bomb ~env) results
829:   in
830:   let dos_names =
831:     [ "dos_ping_flood"; "dos_settings_flood"; "dos_empty_frames_flood" ]
832:   in
833:   let dos_results =
834:     if List.exists cve_scenario_selected dos_names then
835:       dos_family ~env
836:       |> List.filter (fun (result : adversarial_result) ->
837:              cve_scenario_selected result.name)
838:     else []
839:   in
840:   let results = dos_results @ results in
841:   let results =
842:     add_cve_result "window_update_accounting"
843:       (fun () -> window_update ~env)
844:       results
845:   in
846:   let results =
847:     add_cve_result "data_slowloris_h1"
848:       (fun () -> data_slowloris ~env)
849:       results
850:   in
851:   let results =
852:     add_cve_result "decompression_bomb"
853:       (fun () -> decompression_bomb ~env)
854:       results
855:   in
856:   let results =
857:     add_cve_result "h1_slowloris_headers"
858:       (fun () -> h1_slowloris_headers ~env)
859:       results
860:   in
861:   let results =
862:     add_cve_result "h1_slow_body" (fun () -> h1_slow_body ~env) results
863:   in
864:   let results =
865:     add_cve_result "h1_invalid_chunk"
866:       (fun () -> h1_invalid_chunk ~env)
867:       results
868:   in
869:   let results =
870:     add_cve_result "h1_cl_te_smuggling"
871:       (fun () -> h1_cl_te_smuggling ~env)
872:       results
873:   in
874:   let results =
875:     add_cve_result "h1_duplicate_content_length"
876:       (fun () -> h1_duplicate_content_length ~env)
877:       results
878:   in
879:   let results =
880:     add_cve_result "h1_missing_host" (fun () -> h1_missing_host ~env) results
881:   in
882:   let results =
883:     add_cve_result "h1_duplicate_host"
884:       (fun () -> h1_duplicate_host ~env)
885:       results
886:   in
887:   let results =
888:     add_cve_result "h1_invalid_host" (fun () -> h1_invalid_host ~env) results
889:   in
890:   let results =
891:     add_cve_result "h1_invalid_request_target"
892:       (fun () -> h1_invalid_request_target ~env)
893:       results
894:   in
895:   let results =
896:     add_cve_result "h1_absolute_form_host_conflict"
897:       (fun () -> h1_absolute_form_host_conflict ~env)
898:       results
899:   in
900:   let results =
901:     add_cve_result "h1_header_flood" (fun () -> h1_header_flood ~env) results
902:   in
903:   let results =
904:     add_cve_result "h1_oversized_trailers"
905:       (fun () -> h1_oversized_trailers ~env)
906:       results
907:   in
908:   let results =
909:     add_cve_result "h2_slow_preface_timeout"
910:       (fun () -> h2_slow_preface_timeout ~env)
911:       results
912:   in
913:   let results =
914:     add_cve_result "h2_slow_headers_timeout"
915:       (fun () -> h2_slow_headers_timeout ~env)
916:       results
917:   in
918:   let results =
919:     add_cve_result "h2_slow_body_timeout"
920:       (fun () -> h2_slow_body_timeout ~env)
921:       results
922:   in
923:   let results =
924:     add_cve_result "h2_invalid_request_target"
925:       (fun () -> h2_invalid_request_target ~env)
926:       results
927:   in
928:   let results =
929:     add_cve_result "h2_missing_authority"
930:       (fun () -> h2_missing_authority ~env)
931:       results
932:   in
933:   let results =
934:     add_cve_result "goaway_churn" (fun () -> goaway_churn ~env) results
935:   in
936:   List.rev results
````

## File: lib/http_eio/server.ml
````ocaml
  1: (* Copyright (c) 2026 Eta contributors. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT *)
  2: 
  3: type shutdown = Server_types.shutdown =
  4:   | Graceful of Eta.Duration.t
  5:   | Immediate
  6: 
  7: type domain_policy = Server_types.domain_policy =
  8:   | Single_domain
  9:   | Recommended
 10:   | Additional of int
 11: 
 12: type runtime_factory = Server_types.runtime_factory
 13: 
 14: type time = Server_types.time = {
 15:   sleep : Eta.Duration.t -> unit;
 16:   with_timeout : 'a. Eta.Duration.t -> (unit -> 'a) -> 'a;
 17: }
 18: 
 19: module Connection_info = Server_types.Connection_info
 20: module Config = Server_types.Config
 21: module Stats = Server_types.Stats
 22: 
 23: let live_time = Server_types.live_time
 24: 
 25: type connection =
 26:   | H1 of H1_server_connection.t
 27:   | H2 of H2_server_connection.t
 28: 
 29: type raw_flow = [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t
 30: 
 31: let set_tcp_nodelay flow =
 32:   match Eio_unix.Resource.fd_opt flow with
 33:   | None -> ()
 34:   | Some fd ->
 35:       Eio_unix.Fd.use fd
 36:         (fun unix_fd -> Unix.setsockopt unix_fd Unix.TCP_NODELAY true)
 37:         ~if_closed:(fun () -> ())
 38: 
 39: let accepted_flow ~peer flow =
 40:   let flow = (flow :> raw_flow) in
 41:   (match peer with `Tcp _ -> set_tcp_nodelay flow | `Unix _ -> ());
 42:   flow
 43: 
 44: type pending_tls = {
 45:   id : int;
 46:   flow : raw_flow;
 47: }
 48: 
 49: type https_connection_stats =
 50:   | Https_h1 of H1_server_connection.stats
 51:   | Https_h2 of H2_server_connection.stats
 52: 
 53: type t = {
 54:   stop : unit Eio.Promise.t;
 55:   stop_resolver : unit Eio.Promise.u;
 56:   mutex : Eio.Mutex.t;
 57:   mutable connections : connection list;
 58:   mutable pending_tls : pending_tls list;
 59:   mutable close_listeners : (unit -> unit) list;
 60:   mutable shutdown_policy : shutdown option;
 61:   stats : Server_stats.Listener.t;
 62: }
 63: 
 64: let default_runtime_factory ~clock ~sw ~connection:_ () =
 65:   Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
 66: 
 67: let additional_domains domain_policy domain_manager =
 68:   match (domain_policy, domain_manager) with
 69:   | Single_domain, _ | _, None -> None
 70:   | Recommended, Some dm ->
 71:       Some (dm, max 0 (Domain.recommended_domain_count () - 1))
 72:   | Additional n, Some dm -> Some (dm, n)
 73: 
 74: let validate_domain_policy = function
 75:   | Additional n when n < 0 ->
 76:       invalid_arg "Eta_http_eio.Server.Additional must be >= 0"
 77:   | Single_domain | Recommended | Additional _ -> ()
 78: 
 79: let peer_of_sockaddr = function
 80:   | `Tcp (address, port) ->
 81:       {
 82:         Eta_http.Server.Request.address =
 83:           Some (Format.asprintf "%a" Eio.Net.Ipaddr.pp address);
 84:         port = Some port;
 85:       }
 86:   | `Unix path -> { Eta_http.Server.Request.address = Some path; port = None }
 87: 
 88: let h1_connection_id =
 89:   let next = Atomic.make 0 in
 90:   fun () ->
 91:     let id = Atomic.fetch_and_add next 1 + 1 in
 92:     "h1-" ^ string_of_int id
 93: 
 94: let pending_tls_id =
 95:   let next = Atomic.make 0 in
 96:   fun () -> Atomic.fetch_and_add next 1 + 1
 97: 
 98: let h1_connection_info peer =
 99:   {
100:     Connection_info.id = h1_connection_id ();
101:     peer = peer_of_sockaddr peer;
102:     protocol = Eta_http.Server.Error.H1;
103:     tls = false;
104:     alpn_protocol = None;
105:   }
106: 
107: let h2_tls_connection_id =
108:   let next = Atomic.make 0 in
109:   fun () ->
110:     let id = Atomic.fetch_and_add next 1 + 1 in
111:     "h2-tls-" ^ string_of_int id
112: 
113: let https_h1_connection_info peer (epoch : Tls_eio.epoch) =
114:   {
115:     Connection_info.id = h1_connection_id ();
116:     peer = peer_of_sockaddr peer;
117:     protocol = Eta_http.Server.Error.H1;
118:     tls = true;
119:     alpn_protocol = epoch.alpn_protocol;
120:   }
121: 
122: let https_h2_connection_info peer (epoch : Tls_eio.epoch) =
123:   {
124:     Connection_info.id = h2_tls_connection_id ();
125:     peer = peer_of_sockaddr peer;
126:     protocol = Eta_http.Server.Error.H2;
127:     tls = true;
128:     alpn_protocol = epoch.alpn_protocol;
129:   }
130: 
131: let create () =
132:   let stop, stop_resolver = Eio.Promise.create () in
133:   {
134:     stop;
135:     stop_resolver;
136:     mutex = Eio.Mutex.create ();
137:     connections = [];
138:     pending_tls = [];
139:     close_listeners = [];
140:     shutdown_policy = None;
141:     stats = Server_stats.Listener.create ();
142:   }
143: 
144: let with_lock t f =
145:   Eio.Mutex.lock t.mutex;
146:   Fun.protect ~finally:(fun () -> Eio.Mutex.unlock t.mutex) f
147: 
148: let shutdown_connection policy = function
149:   | H1 connection -> H1_server_connection.shutdown connection policy
150:   | H2 connection -> H2_server_connection.shutdown connection policy
151: 
152: let register_connection t connection =
153:   let shutdown_policy =
154:     with_lock t (fun () ->
155:         Server_stats.Listener.opened_connection t.stats;
156:         t.connections <- connection :: t.connections;
157:         t.shutdown_policy)
158:   in
159:   Option.iter (fun policy -> shutdown_connection policy connection)
160:     shutdown_policy
161: 
162: let register_transitioned_connection t connection =
163:   let shutdown_policy =
164:     with_lock t (fun () ->
165:         t.connections <- connection :: t.connections;
166:         t.shutdown_policy)
167:   in
168:   Option.iter (fun policy -> shutdown_connection policy connection)
169:     shutdown_policy
170: 
171: let register_pending_tls t flow =
172:   let pending = { id = pending_tls_id (); flow } in
173:   let shutdown_requested =
174:     with_lock t (fun () ->
175:         Server_stats.Listener.opened_connection t.stats;
176:         t.pending_tls <- pending :: t.pending_tls;
177:         Option.is_some t.shutdown_policy)
178:   in
179:   if shutdown_requested then (
180:     (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
181:     try Eio.Flow.close flow with _ -> ());
182:   pending
183: 
184: let unregister_pending_tls ?(closed = true) t pending =
185:   with_lock t (fun () ->
186:       let before = List.length t.pending_tls in
187:       t.pending_tls <-
188:         List.filter
189:           (fun current -> current.id <> pending.id)
190:           t.pending_tls;
191:       if closed && List.length t.pending_tls <> before then
192:         Server_stats.Listener.closed_connection t.stats)
193: 
194: let same_connection left right =
195:   match (left, right) with
196:   | H1 left, H1 right -> left == right
197:   | H2 left, H2 right -> left == right
198:   | H1 _, H2 _ | H2 _, H1 _ -> false
199: 
200: let unregister_connection t connection =
201:   with_lock t (fun () ->
202:       let before = List.length t.connections in
203:       t.connections <-
204:         List.filter
205:           (fun current -> not (same_connection current connection))
206:           t.connections;
207:       if List.length t.connections <> before then
208:         Server_stats.Listener.closed_connection t.stats)
209: 
210: let connections t = with_lock t (fun () -> t.connections)
211: let pending_tls t = with_lock t (fun () -> t.pending_tls)
212: 
213: let register_listener t socket =
214:   let close () = try Eio.Resource.close socket with _ -> () in
215:   let shutdown_requested =
216:     with_lock t (fun () ->
217:         match t.shutdown_policy with
218:         | None ->
219:             t.close_listeners <- close :: t.close_listeners;
220:             false
221:         | Some _ -> true)
222:   in
223:   if shutdown_requested then close ()
224: 
225: let close_listeners t =
226:   let listeners =
227:     with_lock t (fun () ->
228:         let listeners = t.close_listeners in
229:         t.close_listeners <- [];
230:         listeners)
231:   in
232:   List.iter (fun close -> close ()) listeners
233: 
234: let record_tls_handshake t =
235:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.tls_handshake t.stats)
236: 
237: let record_tls_handshake_failure t =
238:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.tls_handshake_failure t.stats)
239: 
240: let record_alpn_h1 t =
241:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.alpn_h1 t.stats)
242: 
243: let record_alpn_h2 t =
244:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.alpn_h2 t.stats)
245: 
246: let record_alpn_rejected t =
247:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.alpn_rejected t.stats)
248: 
249: let record_listener_error t =
250:   with_lock t (fun () -> Server_stats.Listener.listener_error t.stats)
251: 
252: let listener_error_callback on_error exn =
253:   Option.iter (fun on_error -> on_error exn) on_error
254: 
255: let tracked_listener_error t on_error exn =
256:   record_listener_error t;
257:   listener_error_callback on_error exn
258: 
259: let stats t =
260:   with_lock t (fun () ->
261:       Server_stats.Listener.snapshot t.stats
262:         ~active_connections:
263:           (List.length t.connections + List.length t.pending_tls))
264: 
265: let close_pending_tls t =
266:   List.iter
267:     (fun pending ->
268:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown pending.flow `All with _ -> ());
269:       try Eio.Flow.close pending.flow with _ -> ())
270:     (pending_tls t)
271: 
272: let with_pending_tls ?on_tls_pending_start ?on_tls_pending_ready
273:     ?on_tls_pending_close flow f =
274:   let raw_flow = (flow :> raw_flow) in
275:   let pending = Option.map (fun start -> start raw_flow) on_tls_pending_start in
276:   let pending_active = ref pending in
277:   let finish_pending ~closed =
278:     match !pending_active with
279:     | None -> ()
280:     | Some pending ->
281:         pending_active := None;
282:         if closed then
283:           Option.iter (fun close -> close pending) on_tls_pending_close
284:         else Option.iter (fun ready -> ready pending) on_tls_pending_ready
285:   in
286:   Fun.protect
287:     ~finally:(fun () -> finish_pending ~closed:true)
288:     (fun () -> f (fun () -> finish_pending ~closed:false))
289: 
290: let shutdown t policy =
291:   ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve t.stop_resolver ());
292:   with_lock t (fun () -> t.shutdown_policy <- Some policy);
293:   close_listeners t;
294:   close_pending_tls t;
295:   List.iter (shutdown_connection policy) (connections t)
296: 
297: let run_h1_on_socket_impl ~(sw : Eio.Switch.t) ~clock ?time ?stop
298:     ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_start
299:     ?on_connection_close ~(socket : _ Eio.Net.listening_socket) handler =
300:   Config.validate config;
301:   ignore sw;
302:   let runtime_factory =
303:     Option.value runtime_factory ~default:(default_runtime_factory ~clock)
304:   in
305:   let (_ : unit) =
306:     Eio.Net.run_server socket ?stop
307:       ~max_connections:config.max_connections
308:       ~on_error:(listener_error_callback on_error)
309:       (fun flow peer ->
310:         Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
311:         let flow = accepted_flow ~peer flow in
312:         let connection = ref None in
313:         let on_start current =
314:           connection := Some current;
315:           Option.iter (fun on_connection_start -> on_connection_start current)
316:             on_connection_start
317:         in
318:         let on_close stats =
319:           match !connection with
320:           | None -> ()
321:           | Some current ->
322:               Option.iter
323:                 (fun on_connection_close -> on_connection_close current stats)
324:                 on_connection_close
325:         in
326:         H1_server_connection.run ~sw:conn_sw ~clock ?time
327:           ~flow:(flow :> H1_server_connection.flow)
328:           ~connection:(h1_connection_info peer) ~config ~runtime_factory
329:           ~on_start ~on_close handler)
330:   in
331:   ()
332: 
333: let run_h1_on_socket ~(sw : Eio.Switch.t) ~clock ?time ?stop
334:     ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_close
335:     ~(socket : _ Eio.Net.listening_socket) handler =
336:   let on_connection_close =
337:     Option.map
338:       (fun on_connection_close _connection stats -> on_connection_close stats)
339:       on_connection_close
340:   in
341:   run_h1_on_socket_impl ~sw ~clock ?time ?stop ~config ?runtime_factory ?on_error
342:     ?on_connection_close ~socket handler
343:

373:           match !connection with

400:     ?on_connection_close ~(socket : _ Eio.Net.listening_socket) handler =

403:   let runtime_factory =

405:   in
406:   let (_ : unit) =

458:     on_listener_start;

460:   let (_ : unit) =
461:     Eio.Net.run_server socket ?stop ?additional_domains

472:         in

492:         on_connection_close stats)
493:       on_connection_close
494:   in

496:     ~config

499: let run_https_connection ~conn_sw ~clock ?time ~config ~runtime_factory
500:     ?on_connection_start ?on_connection_close ?on_tls_handshake
501:     ?on_tls_handshake_failure ?on_alpn_h1 ?on_alpn_h2 ?on_alpn_rejected
502:     ~tls_context handler flow peer =
503:   let raw_flow =
504:     (flow :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
505:   in
506:   let time = Option.value time ~default:(live_time clock) in
507:   let tls_flow, epoch =
508:     try
509:       let result =
510:         time.with_timeout config.Config.tls_handshake_timeout (fun () ->
511:             Tls_eio.server_of_flow_with_context tls_context raw_flow)
512:       in
513:       Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_tls_handshake;
514:       result
515:     with
516:     | Eio.Time.Timeout as exn ->
517:         Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_tls_handshake_failure;
518:         (try Eio.Flow.close raw_flow with _ -> ());
519:         raise exn
520:     | exn ->
521:         Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_tls_handshake_failure;
522:         (try Eio.Flow.close raw_flow with _ -> ());
523:         raise exn
524:   in
525:   let current = ref None in
526:   let on_start connection =
527:     current := Some connection;
528:     Option.iter
529:       (fun on_connection_start -> on_connection_start connection)
530:       on_connection_start
531:   in
532:   let on_close stats =
533:     match !current with
534:     | None -> ()
535:     | Some connection ->
536:         Option.iter
537:           (fun on_connection_close -> on_connection_close connection stats)
538:           on_connection_close
539:   in
540:   let run_h1 () =
541:     Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_alpn_h1;
542:     H1_server_connection.run ~sw:conn_sw ~clock ~time
543:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> H1_server_connection.flow)
544:       ~connection:(https_h1_connection_info peer epoch)
545:       ~config ~runtime_factory
546:       ~on_start:(fun connection -> on_start (H1 connection))
547:       ~on_close:(fun stats -> on_close (Https_h1 stats))
548:       handler
549:   in
550:   let run_h2 () =
551:     Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_alpn_h2;
552:     H2_server_connection.run ~sw:conn_sw ~clock ~time
553:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> H2_server_connection.flow)
554:       ~connection:(https_h2_connection_info peer epoch)
555:       ~config ~runtime_factory
556:       ~on_start:(fun connection -> on_start (H2 connection))
557:       ~on_close:(fun stats -> on_close (Https_h2 stats))
558:       handler
559:   in
560:   ignore
561:     (Alpn_server.dispatch
562:        ~close:(fun () ->
563:          Option.iter (fun f -> f ()) on_alpn_rejected;
564:          Eio.Flow.close tls_flow)
565:        ~use_h1:run_h1 ~use_h2:run_h2 epoch.alpn_protocol
566:       : (unit, Alpn_server.unsupported) result)
567: 
568: let run_https_on_socket_impl ~(sw : Eio.Switch.t) ~clock ?time ?stop
569:     ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_start
570:     ?on_connection_close ?on_tls_handshake ?on_tls_handshake_failure ?on_alpn_h1
571:     ?on_alpn_h2 ?on_alpn_rejected ?on_tls_pending_start
572:     ?on_tls_pending_ready ?on_tls_pending_close ~tls_context
573:     ~(socket : _ Eio.Net.listening_socket) handler =
574:   Config.validate config;
575:   ignore sw;
576:   let runtime_factory =
577:     Option.value runtime_factory ~default:(default_runtime_factory ~clock)
578:   in
579:   let (_ : unit) =
580:     Eio.Net.run_server socket ?stop
581:       ~max_connections:config.max_connections
582:       ~on_error:(listener_error_callback on_error)
583:       (fun flow peer ->
584:         Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
585:         let flow = accepted_flow ~peer flow in
586:         with_pending_tls ?on_tls_pending_start ?on_tls_pending_ready
587:           ?on_tls_pending_close flow
588:           (fun finish_pending ->
589:             let on_connection_start connection =
590:               Option.iter
591:                 (fun on_connection_start -> on_connection_start connection)
592:                 on_connection_start;
593:               finish_pending ()
594:             in
595:             run_https_connection ~conn_sw ~clock ?time ~config ~runtime_factory
596:               ~on_connection_start ?on_connection_close ?on_tls_handshake
597:               ?on_tls_handshake_failure ?on_alpn_h1 ?on_alpn_h2 ?on_alpn_rejected
598:               ~tls_context handler flow peer))
599:   in
600:   ()
601: 
602: let run_https_on_socket ~(sw : Eio.Switch.t) ~clock ?time ?stop
603:     ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_close
604:     ~tls_config ~(socket : _ Eio.Net.listening_socket) handler =
605:   Config.validate config;
606:   let tls_context = Tls_eio.server_context tls_config in
607:   let on_connection_close =
608:     Option.map
609:       (fun on_connection_close _connection stats -> on_connection_close stats)
610:       on_connection_close
611:   in
612:   run_https_on_socket_impl ~sw ~clock ?time ?stop ~config ?runtime_factory
613:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~tls_context ~socket handler
614: 
615: let run_https_impl ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager ?on_listener_start
616:     ?(domain_policy = Recommended) ?stop ?(config = Config.default)
617:     ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_start ?on_connection_close
618:     ?on_tls_handshake ?on_tls_handshake_failure ?on_alpn_h1 ?on_alpn_h2
619:     ?on_alpn_rejected ?on_tls_pending_start ?on_tls_pending_ready
620:     ?on_tls_pending_close ~tls_context ~addr handler =
621:   Config.validate config;
622:   validate_domain_policy domain_policy;
623:   let runtime_factory =
624:     Option.value runtime_factory ~default:(default_runtime_factory ~clock)
625:   in
626:   let socket =
627:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:config.backlog net addr
628:   in
629:   Option.iter (fun on_listener_start -> on_listener_start socket)
630:     on_listener_start;
631:   let additional_domains = additional_domains domain_policy domain_manager in
632:   let (_ : unit) =
633:     Eio.Net.run_server socket ?stop ?additional_domains
634:       ~max_connections:config.max_connections
635:       ~on_error:(listener_error_callback on_error)
636:       (fun flow peer ->
637:         Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
638:         let flow = accepted_flow ~peer flow in
639:         with_pending_tls ?on_tls_pending_start ?on_tls_pending_ready
640:           ?on_tls_pending_close flow
641:           (fun finish_pending ->
642:             let on_connection_start connection =
643:               Option.iter
644:                 (fun on_connection_start -> on_connection_start connection)
645:                 on_connection_start;
646:               finish_pending ()
647:             in
648:             run_https_connection ~conn_sw ~clock ?time ~config ~runtime_factory
649:               ~on_connection_start ?on_connection_close ?on_tls_handshake
650:               ?on_tls_handshake_failure ?on_alpn_h1 ?on_alpn_h2 ?on_alpn_rejected
651:               ~tls_context handler flow peer))
652:   in
653:   ()
654: 
655: let run_https ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager
656:     ?(domain_policy = Recommended) ?stop ?(config = Config.default)
657:     ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~tls_config ~addr handler =
658:   Config.validate config;
659:   validate_domain_policy domain_policy;
660:   let tls_context = Tls_eio.server_context tls_config in
661:   let on_connection_close =
662:     Option.map
663:       (fun on_connection_close _connection stats -> on_connection_close stats)
664:       on_connection_close
665:   in
666:   run_https_impl ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager ~domain_policy ?stop
667:     ~config ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~tls_context ~addr
668:     handler
669: 
670: let tracked_h1_on_close t on_connection_close connection stats =
671:   unregister_connection t (H1 connection);
672:   Option.iter (fun on_connection_close -> on_connection_close stats)
673:     on_connection_close
674: 
675: let start_h1_on_socket ~sw ~clock ?time ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory
676:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~socket handler =
677:   Config.validate config;
678:   let t = create () in
679:   register_listener t socket;
680:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
681:       run_h1_on_socket_impl ~sw ~clock ?time ~stop:t.stop ~config ?runtime_factory
682:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
683:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection ->
684:           register_connection t (H1 connection))
685:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_h1_on_close t on_connection_close)
686:         ~socket handler);
687:   t
688: 
689: let start_h1 ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager
690:     ?(domain_policy = Recommended) ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory
691:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~addr handler =
692:   Config.validate config;
693:   validate_domain_policy domain_policy;
694:   let t = create () in
695:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
696:       run_h1_impl ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager ~domain_policy
697:         ~stop:t.stop ~config ?runtime_factory
698:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
699:         ~on_listener_start:(fun socket -> register_listener t socket)
700:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection -> register_connection t (H1 connection))
701:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_h1_on_close t on_connection_close)
702:         ~addr handler);
703:   t
704: 
705: let tracked_h2_on_close t on_connection_close connection stats =
706:   unregister_connection t (H2 connection);
707:   Option.iter (fun on_connection_close -> on_connection_close stats)
708:     on_connection_close
709: 
710: let tracked_https_on_close t on_connection_close connection stats =
711:   unregister_connection t connection;
712:   Option.iter (fun on_connection_close -> on_connection_close stats)
713:     on_connection_close
714: 
715: let start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ?time ?(config = Config.default)
716:     ?runtime_factory
717:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~socket handler =
718:   Config.validate config;
719:   let t = create () in
720:   register_listener t socket;
721:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
722:       run_h2c_on_socket_impl ~sw ~clock ?time ~stop:t.stop ~config ?runtime_factory
723:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
724:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection ->
725:           register_connection t (H2 connection))
726:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_h2_on_close t on_connection_close)
727:         ~socket handler);
728:   t
729: 
730: let start_h2c ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager
731:     ?(domain_policy = Recommended) ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory
732:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~addr handler =
733:   Config.validate config;
734:   validate_domain_policy domain_policy;
735:   let t = create () in
736:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
737:       run_h2c_impl ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager ~domain_policy
738:         ~stop:t.stop ~config ?runtime_factory
739:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
740:         ~on_listener_start:(fun socket -> register_listener t socket)
741:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection -> register_connection t (H2 connection))
742:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_h2_on_close t on_connection_close)
743:         ~addr handler);
744:   t
745: 
746: let start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ?time ?(config = Config.default)
747:     ?runtime_factory ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~tls_config ~socket handler =
748:   Config.validate config;
749:   let tls_context = Tls_eio.server_context tls_config in
750:   let t = create () in
751:   register_listener t socket;
752:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
753:       run_https_on_socket_impl ~sw ~clock ?time ~stop:t.stop ~config
754:         ?runtime_factory
755:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
756:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection ->
757:           register_transitioned_connection t connection)
758:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_https_on_close t on_connection_close)
759:         ~on_tls_handshake:(fun () -> record_tls_handshake t)
760:         ~on_tls_handshake_failure:(fun () -> record_tls_handshake_failure t)
761:         ~on_alpn_h1:(fun () -> record_alpn_h1 t)
762:         ~on_alpn_h2:(fun () -> record_alpn_h2 t)
763:         ~on_alpn_rejected:(fun () -> record_alpn_rejected t)
764:         ~on_tls_pending_start:(fun flow -> register_pending_tls t flow)
765:         ~on_tls_pending_ready:(fun pending ->
766:           unregister_pending_tls ~closed:false t pending)
767:         ~on_tls_pending_close:(fun pending -> unregister_pending_tls t pending)
768:         ~tls_context ~socket handler);
769:   t
770: 
771: let start_https ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager
772:     ?(domain_policy = Recommended) ?(config = Config.default) ?runtime_factory
773:     ?on_error ?on_connection_close ~tls_config ~addr handler =
774:   Config.validate config;
775:   validate_domain_policy domain_policy;
776:   let tls_context = Tls_eio.server_context tls_config in
777:   let t = create () in
778:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
779:       run_https_impl ~sw ~net ~clock ?time ?domain_manager ~domain_policy
780:         ~stop:t.stop ~config ?runtime_factory
781:         ~on_error:(tracked_listener_error t on_error)
782:         ~on_listener_start:(fun socket -> register_listener t socket)
783:         ~on_connection_start:(fun connection ->
784:           register_transitioned_connection t connection)
785:         ~on_connection_close:(tracked_https_on_close t on_connection_close)
786:         ~on_tls_handshake:(fun () -> record_tls_handshake t)
787:         ~on_tls_handshake_failure:(fun () -> record_tls_handshake_failure t)
788:         ~on_alpn_h1:(fun () -> record_alpn_h1 t)
789:         ~on_alpn_h2:(fun () -> record_alpn_h2 t)
790:         ~on_alpn_rejected:(fun () -> record_alpn_rejected t)
791:         ~on_tls_pending_start:(fun flow -> register_pending_tls t flow)
792:         ~on_tls_pending_ready:(fun pending ->
793:           unregister_pending_tls ~closed:false t pending)
794:         ~on_tls_pending_close:(fun pending -> unregister_pending_tls t pending)
795:         ~tls_context ~addr handler);
796:   t
````

## File: test/http/test_eta_http_tls.ml
````ocaml
   1: open Test_eta_http_support
   2: 
   3: let read_file path =
   4:   let input = open_in path in
   5:   Fun.protect
   6:     ~finally:(fun () -> close_in_noerr input)
   7:     (fun () -> really_input_string input (in_channel_length input))
   8: 
   9: let rec find_sub_from haystack ~needle index =
  10:   let haystack_len = String.length haystack in
  11:   let needle_len = String.length needle in
  12:   if index + needle_len > haystack_len then None
  13:   else if String.sub haystack index needle_len = needle then Some index
  14:   else find_sub_from haystack ~needle (index + 1)
  15: 
  16: let find_sub haystack ~needle = find_sub_from haystack ~needle 0
  17: 
  18: let contains haystack needle =
  19:   match find_sub haystack ~needle with
  20:   | Some _ -> true
  21:   | None -> false
  22: 
  23: let tls_cert =
  24:   {|-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

  76: let remove_noerr path =
  77:   try Sys.remove path with
  78:   | Sys_error _ -> ()
  79: 
  80: let write_temp_file prefix contents =
  81:   let path = Filename.temp_file prefix ".pem" in
  82:   let output = open_out_bin path in
  83:   Fun.protect
  84:     ~finally:(fun () -> close_out_noerr output)
  85:     (fun () -> output_string output contents);
  86:   path
  87: 
  88: let with_temp_file prefix contents f =
  89:   let path = write_temp_file prefix contents in
  90:   Fun.protect ~finally:(fun () -> remove_noerr path) (fun () -> f path)
  91: 
  92: let with_temp_tls_files f =
  93:   with_temp_file "eta-http-cert" tls_cert @@ fun cert ->
  94:   with_temp_file "eta-http-key" tls_key @@ fun key -> f cert key
  95: 
  96: let with_generated_tls_files host f =
  97:   let cert = Filename.temp_file "eta-http-generated-cert" ".pem" in
  98:   let key = Filename.temp_file "eta-http-generated-key" ".pem" in
  99:   let cmd =
 100:     String.concat " "
 101:       [
 102:         "openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -sha256 -days 1";
 103:         "-subj";
 104:         Filename.quote ("/CN=" ^ host);
 105:         "-addext";
 106:         Filename.quote ("subjectAltName=DNS:" ^ host);
 107:         "-keyout";
 108:         Filename.quote key;
 109:         "-out";
 110:         Filename.quote cert;
 111:         ">/dev/null 2>&1";
 112:       ]
 113:   in
 114:   Fun.protect
 115:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 116:       remove_noerr cert;
 117:       remove_noerr key)
 118:     (fun () ->
 119:       if Sys.command cmd <> 0 then
 120:         Alcotest.failf "failed to generate TLS certificate for %s" host;
 121:       f cert key)
 122: 
 123: let with_temp_ca_bundle certs f =
 124:   let contents = certs |> List.map read_file |> String.concat "" in
 125:   with_temp_file "eta-http-ca-bundle" contents f
 126: 
 127: let pump_tls src dst =
 128:   let pending = Eta_http__Openssl.bio_write_pending src in
 129:   if pending = 0 then 0
 130:   else
 131:     let scratch = Cstruct.create pending in
 132:     let buffer = Cstruct.to_bigarray scratch in
 133:     let read = Eta_http__Openssl.bio_read src buffer 0 pending in
 134:     if read = 0 then 0
 135:     else
 136:       let written = Eta_http__Openssl.bio_write dst buffer 0 read in
 137:       Alcotest.(check int) "pumped TLS bytes" read written;
 138:       written
 139: 
 140: let tls_handshake_state label ssl =
 141:   match Eta_http__Openssl.handshake ssl with
 142:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_ok -> `Done
 143:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_error (2 | 3) -> `Pending
 144:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_error code ->
 145:       Alcotest.failf "%s handshake failed with SSL_get_error=%d" label code
 146: 
 147: let tls_handshake_step ssl =
 148:   match Eta_http__Openssl.handshake ssl with
 149:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_ok -> `Done
 150:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_error (2 | 3) -> `Pending
 151:   | Eta_http__Openssl.Handshake_error code -> `Failed code
 152: 
 153: let drive_tls_handshake client server =
 154:   let rec loop remaining client_done server_done =
 155:     if client_done && server_done then ()
 156:     else if remaining = 0 then Alcotest.fail "TLS handshake did not converge"
 157:     else
 158:       let client_done =
 159:         client_done || tls_handshake_state "client" client = `Done
 160:       in
 161:       let server_done =
 162:         server_done || tls_handshake_state "server" server = `Done
 163:       in
 164:       ignore (pump_tls client server + pump_tls server client : int);
 165:       loop (remaining - 1) client_done server_done
 166:   in
 167:   loop 100 false false
 168: 
 169: let drain_tls_post_handshake client server =
 170:   let scratch = Cstruct.to_bigarray (Cstruct.create 1) in
 171:   let rec loop remaining =
 172:     if remaining = 0 then ()
 173:     else (
 174:       ignore (pump_tls server client + pump_tls client server : int);
 175:       ignore (Eta_http__Openssl.read client scratch 0 1 : int);
 176:       loop (remaining - 1))
 177:   in
 178:   loop 20
 179: 
 180: let drive_tls_handshake_failure client server =
 181:   let rec loop remaining client_done server_done =
 182:     if remaining = 0 then Alcotest.fail "TLS handshake unexpectedly converged"
 183:     else
 184:       match (tls_handshake_step client, tls_handshake_step server) with
 185:       | `Failed _, _ | _, `Failed _ -> ()
 186:       | client_state, server_state ->
 187:           let client_done = client_done || client_state = `Done in
 188:           let server_done = server_done || server_state = `Done in
 189:           ignore (pump_tls client server + pump_tls server client : int);
 190:           if client_done && server_done then
 191:             Alcotest.fail "TLS handshake unexpectedly succeeded";
 192:           loop (remaining - 1) client_done server_done
 193:   in
 194:   loop 100 false false
 195: 
 196: let require_some label = function
 197:   | Some value -> value
 198:   | None -> Alcotest.failf "%s missing" label
 199: 
 200: let tcp_port = function
 201:   | `Tcp (_, port) -> port
 202:   | `Unix _ -> Alcotest.fail "expected TCP listener"
 203: 
 204: let read_all_response flow =
 205:   let buffer = Buffer.create 128 in
 206:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
 207:   let rec loop () =
 208:     match Eio.Flow.single_read flow scratch with
 209:     | 0 -> Buffer.contents buffer
 210:     | len ->
 211:         Buffer.add_string buffer (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len));
 212:         loop ()
 213:     | exception End_of_file -> Buffer.contents buffer
 214:   in
 215:   loop ()
 216: 
 217: let wait_for_server_stats clock server predicate =
 218:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 219:       let rec loop () =
 220:         let stats = Eta_http_eio.Server.stats server in
 221:         if predicate stats then stats
 222:         else (
 223:           Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.01;
 224:           loop ())
 225:       in
 226:       loop ())
 227: 
 228: let find_tls_eio_source () =
 229:   let candidates =
 230:     [
 231:       "lib/http_eio/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 232:       "lib/http/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 233:       "../lib/http_eio/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 234:       "../lib/http/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 235:       "../../lib/http_eio/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 236:       "../../lib/http/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 237:       "../../../lib/http_eio/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 238:       "../../../lib/http/tls/tls_eio.ml";
 239:     ]
 240:   in
 241:   match List.find_opt Sys.file_exists candidates with
 242:   | Some path -> path
 243:   | None -> Alcotest.failf "could not locate tls_eio.ml from %s" (Sys.getcwd ())
 244: 
 245: let do_handshake_source source =
 246:   let start_markers = [ "let do_handshake t ="; "let rec do_handshake t =" ] in
 247:   let end_marker = "let close t =" in
 248:   match
 249:     List.find_map
 250:       (fun marker -> find_sub source ~needle:marker)
 251:       start_markers
 252:   with
 253:   | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing do_handshake definition"
 254:   | Some start -> (
 255:       match find_sub_from source ~needle:end_marker start with
 256:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing do_handshake end marker"
 257:       | Some finish -> String.sub source start (finish - start))
 258: 
 259: let client_of_flow_source source =
 260:   match find_sub source ~needle:"let client_of_flow" with
 261:   | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing client_of_flow definition"
 262:   | Some start -> (
 263:       match find_sub_from source ~needle:"let epoch flow =" start with
 264:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing client_of_flow end marker"
 265:       | Some finish -> String.sub source start (finish - start))
 266: 
 267: let single_write_source source =
 268:   match find_sub source ~needle:"let single_write t bufs =" with
 269:   | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing single_write definition"
 270:   | Some start -> (
 271:       match find_sub_from source ~needle:"  let copy t ~src =" start with
 272:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing single_write end marker"
 273:       | Some finish -> String.sub source start (finish - start))
 274: 
 275: let single_read_source source =
 276:   match find_sub source ~needle:"  let single_read t buf =" with
 277:   | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing single_read definition"
 278:   | Some start -> (
 279:       match find_sub_from source ~needle:"  let single_write t bufs =" start with
 280:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "missing single_read end marker"
 281:       | Some finish -> String.sub source start (finish - start))
 282: 
 283: let counting_host_eio read_count =
 284:   let module Eio_ops = struct
 285:     module Time = struct
 286:       let now = Eio.Time.now
 287:       let sleep = Eio.Time.sleep
 288:     end
 289: 
 290:     module Net = struct
 291:       let getaddrinfo_stream = Eio.Net.getaddrinfo_stream
 292:       let connect = Eio.Net.connect
 293:     end
 294: 
 295:     module Flow = struct
 296:       let single_read flow buf =
 297:         incr read_count;
 298:         Eio.Flow.single_read flow buf
 299: 
 300:       let write = Eio.Flow.write
 301:     end
 302: 
 303:     module Switch = struct
 304:       let run = Eio.Switch.run
 305:       let fail = Eio.Switch.fail
 306:     end
 307: 
 308:     module Fiber = struct
 309:       let get = Eio.Fiber.get
 310:       let with_binding = Eio.Fiber.with_binding
 311:       let first = Eio.Fiber.first
 312:       let await_cancel = Eio.Fiber.await_cancel
 313:       let fork = Eio.Fiber.fork
 314:       let fork_daemon = Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon
 315:       let yield = Eio.Fiber.yield
 316:       let check = Eio.Fiber.check
 317:     end
 318: 
 319:     module Stream = struct
 320:       type 'a t = 'a Eio.Stream.t
 321: 
 322:       let create = Eio.Stream.create
 323:       let add = Eio.Stream.add
 324:       let take = Eio.Stream.take
 325:       let take_nonblocking = Eio.Stream.take_nonblocking
 326:     end
 327: 
 328:     module Cancel = struct
 329:       let sub = Eio.Cancel.sub
 330:       let cancel = Eio.Cancel.cancel
 331:     end
 332:   end in
 333:   Eta_eio.Host.make ~unix:(module Eio_unix) ~eio:(module Eio_ops) ()
 334: 
 335: let https_h2_server_config cert key =
 336:   Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 337:     ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
 338: 
 339: let https_h2_client_config cert =
 340:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 341:   Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 342:     ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2" ] ()
 343: 
 344: let start_https_h2_test_server ?config ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler =
 345:   let socket =
 346:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:8 net
 347:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 348:   in
 349:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 350:   let tls_config = https_h2_server_config cert key in
 351:   let server =
 352:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ?config ~tls_config
 353:       ~socket handler
 354:   in
 355:   (server, port)
 356: 
 357: let connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port =
 358:   let raw =
 359:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 360:   in
 361:   let raw_flow =
 362:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
 363:   in
 364:   Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow (https_h2_client_config cert) raw_flow
 365: 
 366: let with_https_h2_connection ?config ~cert ~key ~env ~sw handler f =
 367:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 368:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 369:   let server, port =
 370:     start_https_h2_test_server ?config ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler
 371:   in
 372:   let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
 373:   let connection =
 374:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 375:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 376:       ()
 377:   in
 378:   Fun.protect
 379:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 380:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
 381:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
 382:     (fun () -> f ~clock ~server ~connection)
 383: 
 384: let test_openssl_ssl_finalizer_keeps_ctx_ownership_separate () =
 385:   let exercise_shared_ctx () =
 386:     let ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 387:     let ssl_a =
 388:       Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl ctx ~hostname:None ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[]
 389:     in
 390:     let ssl_b =
 391:       Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl ctx ~hostname:None ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[]
 392:     in
 393:     Gc.full_major ();
 394:     Alcotest.(check int)
 395:       "pending bytes before handshake" 0
 396:       (Eta_http__Openssl.bio_write_pending ssl_a);
 397:     ignore (Eta_http__Openssl.bio_write_pending ssl_b : int)
 398:   in
 399:   exercise_shared_ctx ();
 400:   Gc.full_major ();
 401:   Gc.full_major ()
 402: 
 403: let test_openssl_server_ctx_loads_cert_key_and_creates_ssl () =
 404:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 405:   let ctx =
 406:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 407:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ]
 408:       ()
 409:   in
 410:   let ssl = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl ctx in
 411:   Alcotest.(check int)
 412:     "pending bytes before handshake" 0
 413:     (Eta_http__Openssl.bio_write_pending ssl)
 414: 
 415: let test_openssl_server_alpn_selects_client_protocol () =
 416:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 417:   let server_ctx =
 418:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 419:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ]
 420:       ()
 421:   in
 422:   let client_ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 423:   Eta_http__Openssl.ctx_load_ca client_ctx cert;
 424:   let server = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl server_ctx in
 425:   let client =
 426:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl client_ctx ~hostname:(Some "localhost")
 427:       ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ]
 428:   in
 429:   drive_tls_handshake client server;
 430:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 431:     "client ALPN" (Some "h2") (Eta_http__Openssl.get_alpn_selected client);
 432:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 433:     "server ALPN" (Some "h2") (Eta_http__Openssl.get_alpn_selected server)
 434: 
 435: let test_openssl_negotiates_tls13_by_default () =
````
