````ocaml
 436:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 437:   let server_ctx =
 438:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 439:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 440:       ()
 441:   in
 442:   let client_ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 443:   Eta_http__Openssl.ctx_load_ca client_ctx cert;
 444:   let server = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl server_ctx in
 445:   let client =
 446:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl client_ctx ~hostname:(Some "localhost")
 447:       ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 448:   in
 449:   drive_tls_handshake client server;
 450:   Alcotest.(check string) "client TLS version" "TLSv1.3"
 451:     (Eta_http__Openssl.get_version client);
 452:   Alcotest.(check string) "server TLS version" "TLSv1.3"
 453:     (Eta_http__Openssl.get_version server)
 454: 
 455: let test_openssl_server_resumes_client_session () =
 456:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 457:   let server_ctx =
 458:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 459:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 460:       ()
 461:   in
 462:   let client_ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 463:   Eta_http__Openssl.ctx_load_ca client_ctx cert;
 464:   let handshake ?session () =
 465:     let server = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl server_ctx in
 466:     let client =
 467:       Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl client_ctx ~hostname:(Some "localhost")
 468:         ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 469:     in
 470:     Option.iter (Eta_http__Openssl.set_session client) session;
 471:     drive_tls_handshake client server;
 472:     drain_tls_post_handshake client server;
 473:     Alcotest.(check int) "client verify result" 0
 474:       (Eta_http__Openssl.get_verify_result client);
 475:     (client, server)
 476:   in
 477:   let client1, server1 = handshake () in
 478:   Alcotest.(check bool) "first client reused" false
 479:     (Eta_http__Openssl.session_reused client1);
 480:   Alcotest.(check bool) "first server reused" false
 481:     (Eta_http__Openssl.session_reused server1);
 482:   let session =
 483:     require_some "client session" (Eta_http__Openssl.get_session client1)
 484:   in
 485:   let client2, server2 = handshake ~session () in
 486:   Alcotest.(check bool) "second client reused" true
 487:     (Eta_http__Openssl.session_reused client2);
 488:   Alcotest.(check bool) "second server reused" true
 489:     (Eta_http__Openssl.session_reused server2)
 490: 
 491: let test_openssl_server_sni_selects_named_certificate () =
 492:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun default_cert default_key ->
 493:   with_generated_tls_files "alt.localhost" @@ fun alt_cert alt_key ->
 494:   with_temp_ca_bundle [ default_cert; alt_cert ] @@ fun ca_bundle ->
 495:   let certificate =
 496:     Eta_http__Openssl.server_certificate ~server_name:"alt.localhost"
 497:       ~certificate_chain_file:alt_cert ~private_key_file:alt_key
 498:   in
 499:   let server_ctx =
 500:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx
 501:       ~certificate_chain_file:default_cert ~private_key_file:default_key
 502:       ~certificates:[ certificate ] ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 503:       ()
 504:   in
 505:   let client_ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 506:   Eta_http__Openssl.ctx_load_ca client_ctx ca_bundle;
 507:   let server = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl server_ctx in
 508:   let client =
 509:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl client_ctx ~hostname:(Some "alt.localhost")
 510:       ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 511:   in
 512:   drive_tls_handshake client server;
 513:   Alcotest.(check int) "client verified selected cert" 0
 514:     (Eta_http__Openssl.get_verify_result client);
 515:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 516:     "server SNI" (Some "alt.localhost")
 517:     (Eta_http__Openssl.get_servername server);
 518:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 519:     "server ALPN" (Some "http/1.1")
 520:     (Eta_http__Openssl.get_alpn_selected server)
 521: 
 522: let test_openssl_server_sni_strict_rejects_unknown_name () =
 523:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun default_cert default_key ->
 524:   let server_ctx =
 525:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx
 526:       ~certificate_chain_file:default_cert ~private_key_file:default_key
 527:       ~require_sni_match:true ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 528:       ()
 529:   in
 530:   let client_ctx = Eta_http__Openssl.create_ctx () in
 531:   Eta_http__Openssl.ctx_load_ca client_ctx default_cert;
 532:   let server = Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ssl server_ctx in
 533:   let client =
 534:     Eta_http__Openssl.create_ssl client_ctx ~hostname:(Some "unknown.localhost")
 535:       ~ip:None ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ]
 536:   in
 537:   drive_tls_handshake_failure client server
 538: 
 539: let test_tls_eio_server_of_flow_handshake_epoch () =
 540:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 541:   run_eio @@ fun _stdenv ->
 542:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 543:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 544:   let server_config =
 545:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 546:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
 547:   in
 548:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 549:   let client_config =
 550:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 551:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
 552:   in
 553:   let server_result = ref None in
 554:   let client_result = ref None in
 555:   Eio.Fiber.both
 556:     (fun () ->
 557:       server_result :=
 558:         Some
 559:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow server_config server_raw))
 560:     (fun () ->
 561:       client_result :=
 562:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 563:   let server_flow, server_epoch = require_some "server TLS result" !server_result in
 564:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 565:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 566:     "server epoch ALPN" (Some "h2") server_epoch.alpn_protocol;
 567:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 568:     "server SNI" (Some "localhost") server_epoch.sni;
 569:   Alcotest.(check bool)
 570:     "server peer certificate verification" false
 571:     server_epoch.peer_certificate_verified;
 572:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 573:     "server flow ALPN" (Some "h2")
 574:     (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.alpn_protocol server_flow);
 575:   (match Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.epoch client_flow with
 576:    | Ok client_epoch ->
 577:        Alcotest.(check (option string))
 578:          "client epoch ALPN" (Some "h2") client_epoch.alpn_protocol;
 579:        Alcotest.(check (option string))
 580:          "client SNI" (Some "localhost") client_epoch.sni;
 581: 	       Alcotest.(check bool)
 582: 	         "client peer certificate verification" true
 583: 	         client_epoch.peer_certificate_verified
 584: 	   | Error () -> Alcotest.fail "missing client TLS epoch");
 585:   Eio.Flow.close client_flow;
 586:   Eio.Flow.close server_flow
 587: 
 588: let with_tls_flow_pair ~sw ~cert ~key f =
 589:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 590:   let server_config =
 591:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 592:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 593:   in
 594:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 595:   let client_config =
 596:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 597:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 598:   in
 599:   let server_result = ref None in
 600:   let client_result = ref None in
 601:   Eio.Fiber.both
 602:     (fun () ->
 603:       server_result :=
 604:         Some
 605:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow server_config server_raw))
 606:     (fun () ->
 607:       client_result :=
 608:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 609:   let server_flow, _server_epoch =
 610:     require_some "server TLS result" !server_result
 611:   in
 612:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 613:   Fun.protect
 614:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 615:       try Eio.Flow.close client_flow with _ -> ();
 616:       try Eio.Flow.close server_flow with _ -> ())
 617:     (fun () -> f ~server_flow ~client_flow)
 618: 
 619: let test_tls_eio_single_read_respects_cstruct_offset () =
 620:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 621:   run_eio @@ fun _env ->
 622:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 623:   with_tls_flow_pair ~sw ~cert ~key @@ fun ~server_flow ~client_flow ->
 624:   Eio.Flow.write client_flow [ Cstruct.of_string "hello" ];
 625:   let storage = Cstruct.of_string "xxxxx.....yyyyy" in
 626:   let dst = Cstruct.sub storage 5 5 in
 627:   let read = Eio.Flow.single_read server_flow dst in
 628:   Alcotest.(check int) "read" 5 read;
 629:   Alcotest.(check string)
 630:     "subrange filled" "xxxxxhelloyyyyy" (Cstruct.to_string storage)
 631: 
 632: let test_tls_eio_single_write_respects_cstruct_offset () =
 633:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 634:   run_eio @@ fun _env ->
 635:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 636:   with_tls_flow_pair ~sw ~cert ~key @@ fun ~server_flow ~client_flow ->
 637:   let storage = Cstruct.of_string "xxxxxhelloyyyyy" in
 638:   Eio.Flow.write client_flow [ Cstruct.sub storage 5 5 ];
 639:   let dst = Cstruct.create 5 in
 640:   let read = Eio.Flow.single_read server_flow dst in
 641:   Alcotest.(check int) "read" 5 read;
 642:   Alcotest.(check string) "peer received subrange" "hello"
 643:     (Cstruct.to_string dst)
 644: 
 645: let test_tls_eio_single_read_drains_pending_plaintext_before_raw_read () =
 646:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 647:   run_eio @@ fun _env ->
 648:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 649:   let read_count = ref 0 in
 650:   let host_eio = counting_host_eio read_count in
 651:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 652:   let server_config =
 653:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 654:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 655:   in
 656:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 657:   let client_config =
 658:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 659:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 660:   in
 661:   let server_result = ref None in
 662:   let client_result = ref None in
 663:   Eio.Fiber.both
 664:     (fun () ->
 665:       server_result :=
 666:         Some
 667:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow ~host_eio server_config
 668:              server_raw))
 669:     (fun () ->
 670:       client_result :=
 671:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 672:   let server_flow, _server_epoch =
 673:     require_some "server TLS result" !server_result
 674:   in
 675:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 676:   Fun.protect
 677:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 678:       try Eio.Flow.close client_flow with _ -> ();
 679:       try Eio.Flow.close server_flow with _ -> ())
 680:     (fun () ->
 681:       let handshake_reads = !read_count in
 682:       Eio.Flow.write client_flow [ Cstruct.of_string "helloworld" ];
 683:       let first = Cstruct.create 5 in
 684:       let first_read = Eio.Flow.single_read server_flow first in
 685:       Alcotest.(check int) "first read" 5 first_read;
 686:       Alcotest.(check string) "first bytes" "hello" (Cstruct.to_string first);
 687:       let reads_after_first = !read_count in
 688:       Alcotest.(check bool)
 689:         "first application read used raw input" true
 690:         (reads_after_first > handshake_reads);
 691:       let second = Cstruct.create 5 in
 692:       let second_read = Eio.Flow.single_read server_flow second in
 693:       Alcotest.(check int) "second read" 5 second_read;
 694:       Alcotest.(check string) "second bytes" "world" (Cstruct.to_string second);
 695:       Alcotest.(check int)
 696:         "pending plaintext read did not touch raw flow" reads_after_first
 697:         !read_count)
 698: 
 699: let test_tls_eio_shutdown_all_sends_close_notify () =
 700:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 701:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 702:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 703:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 704:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 705:   let server_config =
 706:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 707:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 708:   in
 709:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 710:   let client_config =
 711:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 712:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 713:   in
 714:   let server_result = ref None in
 715:   let client_result = ref None in
 716:   Eio.Fiber.both
 717:     (fun () ->
 718:       server_result :=
 719:         Some
 720:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow server_config server_raw))
 721:     (fun () ->
 722:       client_result :=
 723:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 724:   let server_flow, _server_epoch =
 725:     require_some "server TLS result" !server_result
 726:   in
 727:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 728:   Fun.protect
 729:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 730:       try Eio.Flow.close client_flow with _ -> ();
 731:       try Eio.Flow.close server_flow with _ -> ())
 732:     (fun () ->
 733:       Eio.Flow.shutdown server_flow `All;
 734:       let observed_eof =
 735:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 0.2 (fun () ->
 736:             match Eio.Flow.single_read client_flow (Cstruct.create 1) with
 737:             | 0 -> true
 738:             | _ -> false
 739:             | exception End_of_file -> true)
 740:       in
 741:       Alcotest.(check bool) "peer observed TLS close_notify" true observed_eof)
 742: 
 743: let test_tls_eio_server_context_reuses_loaded_certificates () =
 744:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 745:   with_temp_ca_bundle [ cert ] @@ fun ca_bundle ->
 746:   let server_config =
 747:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 748:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 749:   in
 750:   let server_context = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_context server_config in
 751:   remove_noerr cert;
 752:   remove_noerr key;
 753:   run_eio @@ fun _stdenv ->
 754:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 755:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 756:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 757:   let client_config =
 758:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:ca_bundle
 759:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 760:   in
 761:   let server_result = ref None in
 762:   let client_result = ref None in
 763:   Eio.Fiber.both
 764:     (fun () ->
 765:       server_result :=
 766:         Some
 767:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow_with_context server_context
 768:              server_raw))
 769:     (fun () ->
 770:       client_result :=
 771:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 772:   let server_flow, server_epoch = require_some "server TLS result" !server_result in
 773:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 774:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 775:     "server epoch ALPN" (Some "http/1.1") server_epoch.alpn_protocol;
 776:   Eio.Flow.close client_flow;
 777:   Eio.Flow.close server_flow
 778: 
 779: let test_tls_eio_server_of_flow_sni_selects_named_certificate () =
 780:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun default_cert default_key ->
 781:   with_generated_tls_files "alt.localhost" @@ fun alt_cert alt_key ->
 782:   with_temp_ca_bundle [ default_cert; alt_cert ] @@ fun ca_bundle ->
 783:   run_eio @@ fun _stdenv ->
 784:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 785:   let server_raw, client_raw = Eio_unix.Net.socketpair_stream ~sw () in
 786:   let certificate =
 787:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificate ~server_name:"alt.localhost"
 788:       ~certificate_chain_file:alt_cert ~private_key_file:alt_key
 789:   in
 790:   let server_config =
 791:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server
 792:       ~certificate_chain_file:default_cert ~private_key_file:default_key
 793:       ~certificates:[ certificate ] ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 794:   in
 795:   let alt = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "alt.localhost")) in
 796:   let client_config =
 797:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:alt ~ca_file:ca_bundle
 798:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 799:   in
 800:   let server_result = ref None in
 801:   let client_result = ref None in
 802:   Eio.Fiber.both
 803:     (fun () ->
 804:       server_result :=
 805:         Some
 806:           (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.server_of_flow server_config server_raw))
 807:     (fun () ->
 808:       client_result :=
 809:         Some (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config client_raw));
 810:   let server_flow, server_epoch = require_some "server TLS result" !server_result in
 811:   let client_flow = require_some "client TLS result" !client_result in
 812:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 813:     "server epoch SNI" (Some "alt.localhost") server_epoch.sni;
 814:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 815:     "server epoch ALPN" (Some "http/1.1") server_epoch.alpn_protocol;
 816:   Eio.Flow.close client_flow;
 817:   Eio.Flow.close server_flow
 818: 
 819: let test_alpn_server_dispatch_routes_and_closes_unsupported () =
 820:   let routes = ref [] in
 821:   let closed = ref 0 in
 822:   let close () = incr closed in
 823:   let use_h1 () = routes := "h1" :: !routes in
 824:   let use_h2 () = routes := "h2" :: !routes in
 825:   let run alpn =
 826:     Eta_http_eio.Transport.Alpn_server.dispatch ~close ~use_h1 ~use_h2 alpn
 827:   in
 828:   let expect_ok label = function
 829:     | Ok () -> ()
 830:     | Error { Eta_http_eio.Transport.Alpn_server.protocol } ->
 831:         Alcotest.failf "%s rejected %s" label protocol
 832:   in
 833:   expect_ok "none routes h1" (run None);
 834:   expect_ok "http/1.1 routes h1" (run (Some "http/1.1"));
 835:   expect_ok "h2 routes h2" (run (Some "h2"));
 836:   (match run (Some "spdy/3") with
 837:    | Error { Eta_http_eio.Transport.Alpn_server.protocol } ->
 838:        Alcotest.(check string) "unsupported protocol" "spdy/3" protocol
 839:    | Ok () -> Alcotest.fail "unsupported ALPN was accepted");
 840:   Alcotest.(check int) "closed unsupported" 1 !closed;
 841:   Alcotest.(check (list string))
 842:     "routes" [ "h2"; "h1"; "h1" ] !routes
 843: 
 844: let test_https_server_h1_alpn_request () =
 845:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 846:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 847:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 848:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 849:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 850:   let socket =
 851:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
 852:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 853:   in
 854:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 855:   let tls_config =
 856:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 857:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
 858:   in
 859:   let seen_request, resolve_seen_request = Eio.Promise.create () in
 860:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
 861:   let on_connection_close = function
 862:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h1 stats ->
 863:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
 864:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h2 _ ->
 865:         Alcotest.fail "HTTPS H1 request routed to H2"
 866:   in
 867:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 868:     ignore
 869:       (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_seen_request
 870:          ( request.path,
 871:            request.scheme,
 872:            request.tls,
 873:            request.alpn_protocol,
 874:            request.connection_id ));
 875:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "secure-h1\n")
 876:   in
 877:   let server =
 878:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config
 879:       ~on_connection_close ~socket handler
 880:   in
 881:   let raw =
 882:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 883:   in
 884:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 885:   let client_config =
 886:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 887:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
 888:   in
 889:   let raw_flow =
 890:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
 891:   in
 892:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
 893:   Fun.protect
 894:     ~finally:(fun () -> try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ())
 895:     (fun () ->
 896:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
 897:         ("GET /secure HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: localhost\r\n"
 898:        ^ "Connection: close\r\n\r\n")
 899:         tls_flow;
 900:       let response =
 901:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 902:             read_all_response tls_flow)
 903:       in
 904:       Alcotest.(check string) "response"
 905:         ("HTTP/1.1 200 OK\r\nConnection: close\r\n"
 906:        ^ "Content-Length: 10\r\n\r\nsecure-h1\n")
 907:         response;
 908:       let path, scheme, tls, alpn_protocol, connection_id =
 909:         Eio.Promise.await seen_request
 910:       in
 911:       Alcotest.(check string) "path" "/secure" path;
 912:       Alcotest.(check string) "scheme" "https" scheme;
 913:       Alcotest.(check bool) "tls" true tls;
 914:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "alpn" (Some "http/1.1") alpn_protocol;
 915:       Alcotest.(check bool) "connection id prefix" true
 916:         (String.starts_with ~prefix:"h1-" connection_id);
 917:       let stats =
 918:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 919:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
 920:       in
 921:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed requests" 1 stats.completed_requests;
 922:       let server_stats = Eta_http_eio.Server.stats server in
 923:       Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshakes" 1 server_stats.tls_handshakes;
 924:       Alcotest.(check int)
 925:         "tls handshake failures" 0 server_stats.tls_handshake_failures;
 926:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h1" 1 server_stats.alpn_h1;
 927:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h2" 0 server_stats.alpn_h2;
 928:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn rejected" 0 server_stats.alpn_rejected;
 929:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
 930: 
 931: let test_https_server_h2_alpn_request () =
 932:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
 933:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 934:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 935:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 936:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 937:   let socket =
 938:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
 939:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 940:   in
 941:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 942:   let tls_config =
 943:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
 944:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
 945:   in
 946:   let seen_request, resolve_seen_request = Eio.Promise.create () in
 947:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
 948:   let on_connection_close = function
 949:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h2 stats ->
 950:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
 951:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h1 _ ->
 952:         Alcotest.fail "HTTPS H2 request routed to H1"
 953:   in
 954:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 955:     ignore
 956:       (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_seen_request
 957:          ( request.method_,
 958:            request.path,
 959:            request.scheme,
 960:            request.authority,
 961:            request.tls,
 962:            request.alpn_protocol,
 963:            request.connection_id ));
 964:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "secure-h2\n")
 965:   in
 966:   let server =
 967:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config
 968:       ~on_connection_close ~socket handler
 969:   in
 970:   let raw =
 971:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 972:   in
 973:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
 974:   let client_config =
 975:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
 976:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2" ] ()
 977:   in
 978:   let raw_flow =
 979:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
 980:   in
 981:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
 982:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
 983:     "client ALPN" (Some "h2")
 984:     (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.alpn_protocol tls_flow);
 985:   let connection =
 986:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 987:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 988:       ()
 989:   in
 990:   Fun.protect
 991:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
 992:     (fun () ->
 993:       let request =
 994:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
 995:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
 996:           `GET "/secure-h2"
 997:       in
 998:       let status, body =
 999:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1000:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.await_h2_response connection request)
1001:       in
1002:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
1003:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "secure-h2\n" body;
1004:       let method_, path, scheme, authority, tls, alpn_protocol, connection_id =
1005:         Eio.Promise.await seen_request
1006:       in
1007:       Alcotest.(check string) "method" "GET" method_;
1008:       Alcotest.(check string) "path" "/secure-h2" path;
1009:       Alcotest.(check string) "scheme" "https" scheme;
1010:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "authority" (Some "localhost") authority;
1011:       Alcotest.(check bool) "tls" true tls;
1012:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "alpn" (Some "h2") alpn_protocol;
1013:       Alcotest.(check bool) "connection id prefix" true
1014:         (String.starts_with ~prefix:"h2-tls-" connection_id);
1015:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1016:       let stats =
1017:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1018:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1019:       in
1020:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 1 stats.completed_streams;
1021:       let server_stats = Eta_http_eio.Server.stats server in
1022:       Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshakes" 1 server_stats.tls_handshakes;
1023:       Alcotest.(check int)
1024:         "tls handshake failures" 0 server_stats.tls_handshake_failures;
1025:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h1" 0 server_stats.alpn_h1;
1026:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h2" 1 server_stats.alpn_h2;
1027:       Alcotest.(check int) "alpn rejected" 0 server_stats.alpn_rejected;
1028:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1029: 
1030: let test_https_server_h2_streams_large_body_past_window () =
1031:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1032:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1033:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1034:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1035:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1036:   let socket =
1037:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1038:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1039:   in
1040:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1041:   let tls_config =
1042:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1043:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
1044:   in
1045:   let total = 512 * 1024 in
1046:   let chunk_size = 16 * 1024 in
1047:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1048:     match request.path with
1049:     | "/large" ->
1050:         let remaining = ref total in
1051:         let body =
1052:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:total (fun () ->
1053:               if !remaining = 0 then Eta.Effect.pure None
1054:               else
1055:                 let n = min chunk_size !remaining in
1056:                 remaining := !remaining - n;
1057:                 Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.make n 'z')))
1058:         in
1059:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
1060:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1061:   in
1062:   let server =
1063:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config ~socket
1064:       handler
1065:   in
1066:   let raw =
1067:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1068:   in
1069:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
1070:   let client_config =
1071:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
1072:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2" ] ()
1073:   in
1074:   let raw_flow =
1075:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
1076:   in
1077:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
1078:   let connection =
1079:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1080:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1081:       ()
1082:   in
1083:   Fun.protect
1084:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1085:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1086:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1087:     (fun () ->
1088:       let request =
1089:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1090:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1091:           `GET "/large"
1092:       in
1093:       let status, body =
1094:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 10.0 (fun () ->
1095:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.await_h2_response connection request)
1096:       in
1097:       Alcotest.(check int) "large tls stream status" 200 status;
1098:       Alcotest.(check int) "large tls stream body length" total
1099:         (String.length body))
1100: 
1101: let test_https_server_h2_concurrent_large_echo () =
1102:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1103:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1104:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1105:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1106:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1107:   let socket =
1108:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1109:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1110:   in
1111:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1112:   let tls_config =
1113:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1114:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
1115:   in
1116:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1117:     match request.path with
1118:     | "/echo" ->
1119:         Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
1120:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
1121:                Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
1122:                  ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
1123:                  ())
1124:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1125:   in
1126:   let server =
1127:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config ~socket
1128:       handler
1129:   in
1130:   let raw =
1131:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1132:   in
1133:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
1134:   let client_config =
1135:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
1136:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2" ] ()
1137:   in
1138:   let raw_flow =
1139:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
1140:   in
1141:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
1142:   let connection =
1143:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1144:       ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1145:       ()
1146:   in
1147:   (* Each stream uploads a distinct fill byte so any cross-stream corruption in
1148:      the concurrent TLS encrypt/decrypt path is detected. Payloads exceed the
1149:      flow-control window so the server pumps reads and writes concurrently. *)
1150:   let tags = [ 1; 2; 3 ] in
1151:   let chunk_size = 16 * 1024 in
1152:   let chunks_per_stream = 6 in
1153:   let payload tag = String.make (chunk_size * chunks_per_stream) (Char.chr (Char.code 'A' + tag)) in
1154:   let open_stream tag =
1155:     let body_buf = Buffer.create (chunk_size * chunks_per_stream) in
1156:     let status = ref 0 in
1157:     let eof, resolve_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
1158:     let rec read_body response_body =
1159:       H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
1160:         ~on_eof:(fun () -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_eof ()))
1161:         ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
1162:           Buffer.add_string body_buf (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
1163:           read_body response_body)
1164:     in
1165:     let request =
1166:       H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1167:         ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1168:         `POST "/echo"
1169:     in
1170:     match
1171:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag request
1172:         ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
1173:           Alcotest.failf "stream %d failed: %a" tag
1174:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.pp_h2_client_error error)
1175:         ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
1176:           status := H2.Status.to_code response.status;
1177:           read_body response_body)
1178:     with
1179:     | Ok (opened : Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.opened_request) ->
1180:         (tag, opened, body_buf, status, eof)
1181:     | Error _ -> Alcotest.failf "stream %d not opened" tag
1182:   in
1183:   Fun.protect
1184:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1185:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1186:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1187:     (fun () ->
1188:       let streams = List.map open_stream tags in
1189:       for round = 0 to chunks_per_stream - 1 do
1190:         List.iter
1191:           (fun (tag, opened, _, _, _) ->
1192:             let chunk =
1193:               String.sub (payload tag) (round * chunk_size) chunk_size
1194:             in
1195:             H2.Body.Writer.write_string
1196:               opened.Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request_body chunk)
1197:           streams;
1198:         Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.002
1199:       done;
1200:       List.iter
1201:         (fun (_, opened, _, _, _) ->
1202:           H2.Body.Writer.close
1203:             opened.Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request_body)
1204:         streams;
1205:       List.iter
1206:         (fun (tag, _, body_buf, status, eof) ->
1207:           Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 10.0 (fun () ->
1208:               Eio.Promise.await eof);
1209:           Alcotest.(check int)
1210:             (Printf.sprintf "stream %d status" tag)
1211:             200 !status;
1212:           Alcotest.(check bool)
1213:             (Printf.sprintf "stream %d echo intact" tag)
1214:             true
1215:             (String.equal (Buffer.contents body_buf) (payload tag)))
1216:         streams)
1217: 
1218: let test_https_server_h2_split_preface_settings_headers () =
1219:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1220:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1221:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1222:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1223:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1224:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1225:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path))
1226:   in
1227:   let server, port =
1228:     start_https_h2_test_server ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler
1229:   in
1230:   let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
1231:   Fun.protect
1232:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1233:       (try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ());
1234:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1235:     (fun () ->
1236:       Eio.Flow.write tls_flow
1237:         [
1238:           Cstruct.of_string
1239:             ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
1240:            ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings);
1241:         ];
1242:       ignore
1243:         (Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1244:              Test_eta_http_h2_server.read_raw_until_h2_frame
1245:                ~frame_type:Settings tls_flow)
1246:           : string);
1247:       let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
1248:       let headers =
1249:         Test_eta_http_h2_server.raw_h2_headers encoder ~end_stream:true
1250:           ~stream_id:1
1251:           [
1252:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":method" "GET";
1253:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":scheme" "https";
1254:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":path" "/split";
1255:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":authority" "localhost";
1256:           ]
1257:       in
1258:       Eio.Flow.write tls_flow [ Cstruct.of_string headers ];
1259:       let response =
1260:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1261:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.read_raw_until_h2_frame
1262:               ~frame_type:Headers ~stream_id:1 tls_flow)
1263:       in
1264:       Alcotest.(check bool)
1265:         "response HEADERS on stream 1" true
1266:         (Test_eta_http_h2_server.raw_h2_has_frame ~stream_id:1 Headers
1267:            response))
1268: 
1269: let test_https_server_h2_late_trailers_do_not_poison_accept_loop () =
1270:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1271:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1272:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1273:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1274:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1275:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1276:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "early\n")
1277:   in
1278:   let server, port =
1279:     start_https_h2_test_server ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler
1280:   in
1281:   let send_late_trailers () =
1282:     let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
1283:     Fun.protect
1284:       ~finally:(fun () -> try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ())
1285:       (fun () ->
1286:         Eio.Flow.write tls_flow
1287:           [
1288:             Cstruct.of_string
1289:               ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
1290:              ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings);
1291:           ];
1292:         ignore
1293:           (Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1294:                Test_eta_http_h2_server.read_raw_until_h2_frame
1295:                  ~frame_type:Settings tls_flow)
1296:             : string);
1297:         let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
1298:         let headers =
1299:           Test_eta_http_h2_server.raw_h2_headers encoder ~end_stream:false
1300:             ~stream_id:1
1301:             [
1302:               Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":method" "POST";
1303:               Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":scheme" "https";
1304:               Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":path" "/early";
1305:               Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header ":authority" "localhost";
1306:               Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header "trailer" "x-check";
1307:             ]
1308:         in
1309:         let data =
1310:           Test_eta_http_h2_server.raw_h2_data ~stream_id:1 "test"
1311:         in
1312:         Eio.Flow.write tls_flow [ Cstruct.of_string (headers ^ data) ];
1313:         ignore
1314:           (Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1315:                Test_eta_http_h2_server.read_raw_until_h2_frame
1316:                  ~frame_type:Data ~stream_id:1 tls_flow)
1317:             : string);
1318:         let trailers =
1319:           Test_eta_http_h2_server.raw_h2_headers encoder ~end_stream:true
1320:             ~stream_id:1
1321:             [ Test_eta_http_h2_server.hpack_header "x-check" "ok" ]
1322:         in
1323:         Eio.Flow.write tls_flow [ Cstruct.of_string trailers ])
1324:   in
1325:   let fresh_request () =
1326:     let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
1327:     let connection =
1328:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1329:         ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1330:         ()
1331:     in
1332:     Fun.protect
1333:       ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
1334:       (fun () ->
1335:         let request =
1336:           H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1337:             ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1338:             `GET "/fresh"
1339:         in
1340:         Test_eta_http_h2_server.await_h2_response connection request)
1341:   in
1342:   Fun.protect
1343:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1344:     (fun () ->
1345:       send_late_trailers ();
1346:       let status, body =
1347:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 fresh_request
1348:       in
1349:       Alcotest.(check int) "fresh status" 200 status;
1350:       Alcotest.(check string) "fresh body" "early\n" body)
1351: 
1352: let test_https_server_h2_parallel_gets_one_tls_connection () =
1353:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1354:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1355:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1356:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1357:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path))
1358:   in
1359:   with_https_h2_connection ~cert ~key ~env ~sw handler
1360:   @@ fun ~clock ~server:_ ~connection ->
1361:   let open_stream tag =
1362:     let status = ref None in
1363:     let body = Buffer.create 16 in
1364:     let eof, resolve_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
1365:     let rec read_body response_body =
1366:       H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
1367:         ~on_eof:(fun () -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_eof ()))
1368:         ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
1369:           Buffer.add_string body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
1370:           read_body response_body)
1371:     in
1372:     let target = Printf.sprintf "/p%d" tag in
1373:     let request =
1374:       H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1375:         ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1376:         `GET target
1377:     in
1378:     match
1379:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag request
1380:         ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
1381:           Alcotest.failf "stream %d failed: %a" tag
1382:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.pp_h2_client_error error)
1383:         ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
1384:           status := Some (H2.Status.to_code response.status);
1385:           read_body response_body)
1386:     with
1387:     | Ok opened ->
1388:         H2.Body.Writer.close
1389:           opened.Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request_body;
1390:         (tag, status, body, eof)
1391:     | Error _ -> Alcotest.failf "stream %d not opened" tag
1392:   in
1393:   let streams = List.init 32 (fun index -> open_stream (index + 1)) in
1394:   List.iter
1395:     (fun (tag, status, body, eof) ->
1396:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 5.0 (fun () -> Eio.Promise.await eof);
1397:       Alcotest.(check (option int))
1398:         (Printf.sprintf "stream %d status" tag)
1399:         (Some 200) !status;
1400:       Alcotest.(check string)
1401:         (Printf.sprintf "stream %d body" tag)
1402:         (Printf.sprintf "ok:/p%d" tag)
1403:         (Buffer.contents body))
1404:     streams
1405: 
1406: let test_https_server_h2_timeout_does_not_poison_later_handshake () =
1407:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1408:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1409:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1410:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1411:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1412:   let timeouts =
1413:     {
1414:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
1415:       handler_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 20);
1416:     }
1417:   in
1418:   let server_config = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts } in
1419:   let config =
1420:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1421:   in
1422:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1423:     match request.path with
1424:     | "/slow" ->
1425:         Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
1426:             Eio.Time.sleep clock 1.0;
1427:             Eta_http.Server.Response.text "late\n")
1428:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
1429:   in
1430:   let server, port =
1431:     start_https_h2_test_server ~config ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler
1432:   in
1433:   let one_request target =
1434:     let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
1435:     let connection =
1436:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1437:         ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1438:         ()
1439:     in
1440:     Fun.protect
1441:       ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
1442:       (fun () ->
1443:         let request =
1444:           H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1445:             ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1446:             `GET target
1447:         in
1448:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () ->
1449:             Test_eta_http_h2_server.await_h2_response connection request))
1450:   in
1451:   Fun.protect
1452:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1453:     (fun () ->
1454:       let slow_status, slow_body = one_request "/slow" in
1455:       Alcotest.(check int) "slow status" 503 slow_status;
1456:       Alcotest.(check string) "slow body" "service unavailable\n" slow_body;
1457:       let ok_status, ok_body = one_request "/ok" in
1458:       Alcotest.(check int) "later status" 200 ok_status;
1459:       Alcotest.(check string) "later body" "ok\n" ok_body)
1460: 
1461: let test_https_server_h2_repeated_connect_request_close () =
1462:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1463:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1464:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1465:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1466:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1467:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1468:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path))
1469:   in
1470:   let server, port =
1471:     start_https_h2_test_server ~sw ~clock ~net ~cert ~key handler
1472:   in
1473:   Fun.protect
1474:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1475:     (fun () ->
1476:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 15.0 (fun () ->
1477:           for index = 1 to 50 do
1478:             let tls_flow = connect_https_h2_tls_flow ~sw ~net ~cert port in
1479:             let connection =
1480:               Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1481:                 ~flow:(tls_flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1482:                 ()
1483:             in
1484:             Fun.protect
1485:               ~finally:(fun () ->
1486:                 Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
1487:               (fun () ->
1488:                 let target = Printf.sprintf "/round-%d" index in
1489:                 let request =
1490:                   H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1491:                     ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "localhost" ])
1492:                     `GET target
1493:                 in
1494:                 let status, body =
1495:                   Test_eta_http_h2_server.await_h2_response connection request
1496:                 in
1497:                 Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
1498:                 Alcotest.(check string) "body" ("ok:" ^ target) body)
1499:           done))
1500: 
1501: let test_https_server_h1_keep_alive_sequential_requests () =
1502:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1503:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1504:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1505:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1506:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1507:   let socket =
1508:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1509:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1510:   in
1511:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1512:   let tls_config =
1513:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1514:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1515:   in
1516:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1517:   let on_connection_close = function
1518:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h1 stats ->
1519:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
1520:     | Eta_http_eio.Server.Https_h2 _ -> Alcotest.fail "H1 routed to H2"
1521:   in
1522:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1523:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path))
1524:   in
1525:   let server =
1526:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config
1527:       ~on_connection_close ~socket handler
1528:   in
1529:   let raw =
1530:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1531:   in
1532:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
1533:   let client_config =
1534:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
1535:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1536:   in
1537:   let raw_flow =
1538:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
1539:   in
1540:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
1541:   let br = Eio.Buf_read.of_flow ~max_size:65536 tls_flow in
1542:   let read_one_response () =
1543:     let status_line = Eio.Buf_read.line br in
1544:     let rec headers content_length =
1545:       match Eio.Buf_read.line br with
1546:       | "" -> content_length
1547:       | line -> (
1548:           match String.split_on_char ':' line with
1549:           | name :: rest
1550:             when String.lowercase_ascii (String.trim name) = "content-length"
1551:             ->
1552:               headers (int_of_string (String.trim (String.concat ":" rest)))
1553:           | _ -> headers content_length)
1554:     in
1555:     let content_length = headers 0 in
1556:     let body = Eio.Buf_read.take content_length br in
1557:     (status_line, body)
1558:   in
1559:   Fun.protect
1560:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1561:       (try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ());
1562:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1563:     (fun () ->
1564:       (* Three keep-alive requests on a single TLS connection: this drives
1565:          repeated read->write->read cycles over the TLS flow. *)
1566:       List.iter
1567:         (fun i ->
1568:           let path = Printf.sprintf "/r%d" i in
1569:           Eio.Flow.copy_string
1570:             (Printf.sprintf "GET %s HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: localhost\r\n\r\n" path)
1571:             tls_flow;
1572:           let status_line, body =
1573:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () -> read_one_response ())
1574:           in
1575:           Alcotest.(check bool)
1576:             (Printf.sprintf "request %d status 200" i)
1577:             true
1578:             (String.length status_line >= 12
1579:             && String.sub status_line 9 3 = "200");
1580:           Alcotest.(check string)
1581:             (Printf.sprintf "request %d body" i)
1582:             (Printf.sprintf "ok:/r%d" i)
1583:             body)
1584:         [ 1; 2; 3 ];
1585:       (try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ());
1586:       let stats =
1587:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () ->
1588:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1589:       in
1590:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed requests on one TLS connection" 3
1591:         stats.completed_requests)
1592: 
1593: let test_https_server_handshake_timeout_stats () =
1594:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1595:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1596:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1597:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1598:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1599:   let socket =
1600:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1601:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1602:   in
1603:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1604:   let tls_config =
1605:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1606:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
1607:   in
1608:   let config =
1609:     {
1610:       Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
1611:       tls_handshake_timeout = Eta.Duration.ms 20;
1612:     }
1613:   in
1614:   let handler_called = ref false in
1615:   let handler _request =
1616:     handler_called := true;
1617:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1618:   in
1619:   let server =
1620:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~tls_config
1621:       ~socket handler
1622:   in
1623:   let raw =
1624:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1625:   in
1626:   let stats =
1627:     wait_for_server_stats clock server (fun stats ->
1628:         stats.tls_handshake_failures = 1)
1629:   in
1630:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshakes" 0 stats.tls_handshakes;
1631:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshake failures" 1 stats.tls_handshake_failures;
1632:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h1" 0 stats.alpn_h1;
1633:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h2" 0 stats.alpn_h2;
1634:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn rejected" 0 stats.alpn_rejected;
1635:   Alcotest.(check bool) "handler not called" false !handler_called;
1636:   (try Eio.Flow.close raw with _ -> ());
1637:   Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate
1638: 
1639: let test_https_server_shutdown_closes_pending_handshake () =
1640:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1641:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1642:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1643:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1644:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1645:   let socket =
1646:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1647:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1648:   in
1649:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1650:   let tls_config =
1651:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1652:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ] ()
1653:   in
1654:   let config =
1655:     {
1656:       Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
1657:       tls_handshake_timeout = Eta.Duration.seconds 5;
1658:     }
1659:   in
1660:   let handler_called = ref false in
1661:   let handler _request =
1662:     handler_called := true;
1663:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1664:   in
1665:   let server =
1666:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~tls_config
1667:       ~socket handler
1668:   in
1669:   let raw =
1670:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1671:   in
1672:   Fun.protect
1673:     ~finally:(fun () -> try Eio.Flow.close raw with _ -> ())
1674:     (fun () ->
1675:       let active_stats =
1676:         wait_for_server_stats clock server (fun stats ->
1677:             stats.active_connections = 1 && stats.opened_connections = 1)
1678:       in
1679:       Alcotest.(check int)
1680:         "pending active connections" 1 active_stats.active_connections;
1681:       Alcotest.(check int)
1682:         "pending opened connections" 1 active_stats.opened_connections;
1683:       Alcotest.(check int)
1684:         "pending closed connections" 0 active_stats.closed_connections;
1685:       Alcotest.(check int) "pending tls handshakes" 0 active_stats.tls_handshakes;
1686:       Alcotest.(check int)
1687:         "pending tls failures" 0 active_stats.tls_handshake_failures;
1688:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate;
1689:       let closed_stats =
1690:         wait_for_server_stats clock server (fun stats ->
1691:             stats.active_connections = 0 && stats.closed_connections = 1)
1692:       in
1693:       Alcotest.(check int)
1694:         "closed active connections" 0 closed_stats.active_connections;
1695:       Alcotest.(check int)
1696:         "closed opened connections" 1 closed_stats.opened_connections;
1697:       Alcotest.(check int)
1698:         "closed closed connections" 1 closed_stats.closed_connections;
1699:       Alcotest.(check bool) "handler not called" false !handler_called)
1700: 
1701: let test_https_server_unsupported_alpn_stats () =
1702:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1703:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1704:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1705:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1706:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1707:   let socket =
1708:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1709:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1710:   in
1711:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1712:   let tls_config =
1713:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1714:       ~private_key_file:key ~alpn_protocols:[ "spdy/3" ] ()
1715:   in
1716:   let handler_called = ref false in
1717:   let handler _request =
1718:     handler_called := true;
1719:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1720:   in
1721:   let server =
1722:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config ~socket
1723:       handler
1724:   in
1725:   let raw =
1726:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1727:   in
1728:   let localhost = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "localhost")) in
1729:   let client_config =
1730:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:localhost ~ca_file:cert
1731:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "spdy/3" ] ()
1732:   in
1733:   let raw_flow =
1734:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
1735:   in
1736:   let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
1737:   Alcotest.(check (option string))
1738:     "client ALPN" (Some "spdy/3")
1739:     (Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.alpn_protocol tls_flow);
1740:   let stats =
1741:     wait_for_server_stats clock server (fun stats -> stats.alpn_rejected = 1)
1742:   in
1743:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshakes" 1 stats.tls_handshakes;
1744:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshake failures" 0 stats.tls_handshake_failures;
1745:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h1" 0 stats.alpn_h1;
1746:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h2" 0 stats.alpn_h2;
1747:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn rejected" 1 stats.alpn_rejected;
1748:   Alcotest.(check bool) "handler not called" false !handler_called;
1749:   (try Eio.Flow.close tls_flow with _ -> ());
1750:   Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate
1751: 
1752: let test_https_server_strict_sni_rejects_unknown_name () =
1753:   with_temp_tls_files @@ fun cert key ->
1754:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1755:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1756:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1757:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1758:   let socket =
1759:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1760:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1761:   in
1762:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1763:   let tls_config =
1764:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1765:       ~private_key_file:key ~require_sni_match:true
1766:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1767:   in
1768:   let handler_called = ref false in
1769:   let handler _request =
1770:     handler_called := true;
1771:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1772:   in
1773:   let server =
1774:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config ~socket
1775:       handler
1776:   in
1777:   let raw =
1778:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1779:   in
1780:   let unknown = Domain_name.(host_exn (of_string_exn "unknown.localhost")) in
1781:   let client_config =
1782:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_client ~peer_name:unknown ~ca_file:cert
1783:       ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1784:   in
1785:   let raw_flow =
1786:     (raw :> [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t)
1787:   in
1788:   let handshake_succeeded =
1789:     try
1790:       let tls_flow = Eta_http_eio.Tls.Eio.client_of_flow client_config raw_flow in
1791:       Eio.Flow.close tls_flow;
1792:       true
1793:     with _ -> false
1794:   in
1795:   Alcotest.(check bool) "client handshake failed" false handshake_succeeded;
1796:   let stats =
1797:     wait_for_server_stats clock server (fun stats ->
1798:         stats.tls_handshake_failures = 1)
1799:   in
1800:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshakes" 0 stats.tls_handshakes;
1801:   Alcotest.(check int) "tls handshake failures" 1 stats.tls_handshake_failures;
1802:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h1" 0 stats.alpn_h1;
1803:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn h2" 0 stats.alpn_h2;
1804:   Alcotest.(check int) "alpn rejected" 0 stats.alpn_rejected;
1805:   Alcotest.(check bool) "handler not called" false !handler_called;
1806:   (try Eio.Flow.close raw_flow with _ -> ());
1807:   Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate
1808: 
1809: let test_https_server_start_rejects_invalid_tls_material () =
1810:   with_temp_file "eta-http-bad-cert" "not a certificate" @@ fun bad ->
1811:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1812:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1813:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1814:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1815:   let socket =
1816:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1817:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1818:   in
1819:   let tls_config =
1820:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:bad
1821:       ~private_key_file:bad ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1822:   in
1823:   let handler _request =
1824:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1825:   in
1826:   Alcotest.check_raises "invalid TLS material fails before server handle"
1827:     (Failure "SSL_CTX_use_certificate_chain_file failed")
1828:     (fun () ->
1829:       ignore
1830:         (Eta_http_eio.Server.start_https_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~tls_config
1831:            ~socket handler
1832:           : Eta_http_eio.Server.t))
1833: 
1834: let test_openssl_server_ctx_rejects_invalid_cert () =
1835:   with_temp_file "eta-http-bad-cert" "not a certificate" @@ fun bad ->
1836:   Alcotest.check_raises "invalid cert"
1837:     (Failure "SSL_CTX_use_certificate_chain_file failed") (fun () ->
1838:       ignore
1839:         (Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:bad
1840:            ~private_key_file:bad ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ]
1841:            ()
1842:           : Eta_http__Openssl.ctx))
1843: 
1844: let test_openssl_server_ctx_rejects_invalid_key () =
1845:   with_temp_file "eta-http-bad-key" "not a private key" @@ fun bad ->
1846:   with_temp_file "eta-http-cert" tls_cert @@ fun cert ->
1847:   Alcotest.check_raises "invalid key"
1848:     (Failure "SSL_CTX_use_PrivateKey_file failed") (fun () ->
1849:       ignore
1850:         (Eta_http__Openssl.create_server_ctx ~certificate_chain_file:cert
1851:            ~private_key_file:bad ~alpn_protocols:[ "h2"; "http/1.1" ]
1852:            ()
1853:           : Eta_http__Openssl.ctx))
1854: 
1855: let test_tls_server_config_records_cert_key_and_alpn () =
1856:   let certificate =
1857:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificate ~server_name:"alt.localhost"
1858:       ~certificate_chain_file:"alt-cert.pem" ~private_key_file:"alt-key.pem"
1859:   in
1860:   let config =
1861:     Eta_http.Tls.Config.default_server ~certificate_chain_file:"cert.pem"
1862:       ~private_key_file:"key.pem" ~certificates:[ certificate ]
1863:       ~require_sni_match:true ~alpn_protocols:[ "http/1.1" ] ()
1864:   in
1865:   Alcotest.(check string)
1866:     "cert" "cert.pem" (Eta_http.Tls.Config.certificate_chain_file config);
1867:   Alcotest.(check string)
1868:     "key" "key.pem" (Eta_http.Tls.Config.private_key_file config);
1869:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1870:     "require sni" true (Eta_http.Tls.Config.require_sni_match config);
1871:   Alcotest.(check (list string))
1872:     "alpn" [ "http/1.1" ] (Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_alpn_protocols config);
1873:   (match Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificates config with
1874:   | [ actual ] ->
1875:       Alcotest.(check string)
1876:         "sni name" "alt.localhost"
1877:         (Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificate_name actual);
1878:       Alcotest.(check string)
1879:         "sni cert" "alt-cert.pem"
1880:         (Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificate_chain_file actual);
1881:       Alcotest.(check string)
1882:         "sni key" "alt-key.pem"
1883:         (Eta_http.Tls.Config.server_certificate_private_key_file actual)
1884:   | _ -> Alcotest.fail "expected one SNI certificate")
1885: 
1886: let test_tls_handshake_enters_ssl_mutex_before_openssl () =
1887:   let source = read_file (find_tls_eio_source ()) in
1888:   let body = do_handshake_source source in
1889:   let guard = "with_ssl t (fun () ->" in
1890:   let handshake = "Openssl.handshake t.ssl" in
1891:   match (find_sub body ~needle:guard, find_sub body ~needle:handshake) with
1892:   | Some guard_pos, Some handshake_pos ->
1893:       Alcotest.(check bool)
1894:         "mutex guard precedes handshake" true (guard_pos < handshake_pos)
1895:   | None, _ -> Alcotest.fail "do_handshake does not enter ssl_mutex"
1896:   | _, None -> Alcotest.fail "do_handshake does not call OpenSSL handshake"
1897: 
1898: let test_tls_client_of_flow_uses_ip_identity () =
1899:   let source = read_file (find_tls_eio_source ()) in
1900:   let body = client_of_flow_source source in
1901:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1902:     "TLS IP peer identity is consumed" true
1903:     (contains body "Config.ip config")
1904: 
1905: let test_tls_eio_single_write_does_not_feed_rbio () =
1906:   let source = read_file (find_tls_eio_source ()) in
1907:   let body = single_write_source source in
1908:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1909:     "single_write must not feed the read BIO" false
1910:     (contains body "feed_bio t")
1911: 
1912: let test_tls_eio_single_write_waits_for_read_owner_progress () =
1913:   let source = read_file (find_tls_eio_source ()) in
1914:   let body = single_write_source source in
1915:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1916:     "single_write records read-BIO epoch" true
1917:     (contains body "rbio_epoch t");
1918:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1919:     "single_write waits for read owner progress" true
1920:     (contains body "wait_for_rbio_progress t")
1921: 
1922: let test_tls_eio_single_read_checks_pending_before_raw_read () =
1923:   let source = read_file (find_tls_eio_source ()) in
1924:   let body = single_read_source source in
1925:   Alcotest.(check bool)
1926:     "single_read must not spin on ssl_pending" false
1927:     (contains body "Openssl.ssl_pending");
1928:   match
1929:     ( find_sub body ~needle:"if code = 2 (* SSL_ERROR_WANT_READ *)",
1930:       find_sub body ~needle:"feed_bio t" )
1931:   with
1932:   | Some want_read_index, Some feed_index ->
1933:       Alcotest.(check bool)
1934:         "WANT_READ feeds the read BIO" true
1935:         (want_read_index < feed_index)
1936:   | _ -> Alcotest.fail "single_read missing WANT_READ/feed_bio invariant"
````

## File: lib/http_eio/h2_server_connection.ml
````ocaml
   1: (* Copyright (c) 2026 Eta contributors. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT *)
   2: 
   3: module Server = Eta_http.Server
   4: module Types = Server_types
   5: 
   6: type flow = [ Eio.Flow.two_way_ty | Eio.Resource.close_ty ] Eio.Resource.t
   7: 
   8: type stats = Server_stats.H2.snapshot = {
   9:   active_streams : int;
  10:   opened_streams : int;
  11:   completed_streams : int;
  12:   reset_streams : int;
  13:   request_bytes : int;
  14:   response_bytes : int;
  15:   protocol_errors : int;
  16: }
  17: 
  18: type time = Types.time = {
  19:   sleep : Eta.Duration.t -> unit;
  20:   with_timeout : 'a. Eta.Duration.t -> (unit -> 'a) -> 'a;
  21: }
  22: 
  23: type request_body_read = (bytes option, Server.Error.t) result
  24: type unit_result = (unit, Server.Error.t) result
  25: 
  26: type response_body =
  27:   | Response_no_body of Server.Response.Body.stream option
  28:   | Response_fixed of bytes list * int
  29:   | Response_stream of Server.Response.Body.stream
  30: 
  31: type prepared_response = {
  32:   status : int;
  33:   headers : Eta_http.Core.Header.t;
  34:   body : response_body;
  35: }
  36: 
  37: type command =
  38:   | Ingress of {
  39:       bytes : Bigstringaf.t;
  40:       off : int;
  41:       len : int;
  42:       ack : unit Eio.Promise.u;
  43:     }
  44:   | Ingress_eof
  45:   | Ingress_failed of Server.Error.t
  46:   | Idle_timeout of unit Eio.Promise.u
  47:   | Request_body_read of int * request_body_read Eio.Promise.u
  48:   | Request_body_timeout of int * request_body_read Eio.Promise.u
  49:   | Request_body_drain_timeout of int * unit Eio.Promise.u
  50:   | Request_body_discard of int * bool * (unit, Server.Error.t) result Eio.Promise.u
  51:   | Response_start of int * prepared_response * unit_result Eio.Promise.u
  52:   | Response_chunk of int * bytes * unit_result Eio.Promise.u
  53:   | Response_trailers of int * Eta_http.Core.Header.t * unit_result Eio.Promise.u
  54:   | Response_close of int * unit_result Eio.Promise.u
  55:   | Response_failed of int * Server.Error.t
  56:   | Shutdown of Types.shutdown
  57: 
  58: type stream_state = {
  59:   reqd : H2.Reqd.t;
  60:   request_body : H2.Body.Reader.t;
  61:   request_content_length : int option;
  62:   metrics : Server_metrics.t option;
  63:   mutable metrics_finished : bool;
  64:   mutable request_body_bytes : int;
  65:   mutable request_done : bool;
  66:   mutable request_discarding : bool;
  67:   mutable request_read_resolver : request_body_read Eio.Promise.u option;
  68:   mutable request_discard_resolver :
  69:     (unit, Server.Error.t) result Eio.Promise.u option;
  70:   mutable request_discard_timeout_token : unit Eio.Promise.u option;
  71:   mutable response_writer : H2.Body.Writer.t option;
  72:   mutable response_write_resolver : unit_result Eio.Promise.u option;
  73:   mutable response_done : bool;
  74: }
  75: 
  76: type t = {
  77:   sw : Eio.Switch.t;
  78:   sleep : Eta.Duration.t -> unit;
  79:   with_timeout : 'a. Eta.Duration.t -> (unit -> 'a) -> 'a;
  80:   flow : flow;
  81:   h2 : H2.Server_connection.t;
  82:   security : Eta_http.H2.Security.t;
  83:   mutable security_preface_remaining : int;
  84:   ingress_buffer : Bigstringaf.t;
  85:   max_ingress_buffer_size : int;
  86:   mutable ingress_off : int;
  87:   mutable ingress_len : int;
  88:   mutable filter_preface_remaining : int;
  89:   mutable filter_pending : string;
  90:   mutable observed_request_ordinal : int;
  91:   stream_ordinals : (int, int) Hashtbl.t;
  92:   remote_reset_streams : (int, unit) Hashtbl.t;
  93:   remote_reset_ordinals : (int, unit) Hashtbl.t;
  94:   mutable filter_rst_stream_seen : int;
  95:   mutable filter_error : Eta_http.Error.kind option;
  96:   commands : command Eio.Stream.t;
  97:   streams : (int, stream_state) Hashtbl.t;
  98:   connection : Types.Connection_info.t;
  99:   config : Types.Config.t;
 100:   runtime_factory : Types.runtime_factory;
 101:   stats : Server_stats.H2.t;
 102:   connection_metrics : Server_metrics.t option;
 103:   closed_signal : unit Eio.Promise.t;
 104:   close_signal : unit Eio.Promise.u;
 105:   mutable idle_timeout_token : unit Eio.Promise.u option;
 106:   mutable graceful_shutdown : bool;
 107:   mutable shutdown_timer_started : bool;
 108:   mutable accepted_request : bool;
 109:   mutable closed : bool;
 110: }
 111: 
 112: let mark_closed t =
 113:   if not t.closed then (
 114:     t.closed <- true;
 115:     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve t.close_signal ()))
 116: 
 117: let close_flow_all flow =
 118:   (try Eio.Flow.close flow with _ -> ());
 119:   try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ()
 120: 
 121: let stats t =
 122:   Server_stats.H2.snapshot t.stats
 123:     ~active_streams:(Hashtbl.length t.streams)
 124: 
 125: let request_metrics ~sw ~config ~runtime_factory ~connection request =
 126:   if config.Types.Config.server.enable_otel then
 127:     let runtime = runtime_factory ~sw ~connection () in
 128:     Some
 129:       (Server_metrics.request ~runtime ~connection
 130:          ~emit_url_full:config.server.emit_url_full request)
 131:   else None
 132: 
 133: let connection_metrics ~sw ~config ~runtime_factory ~connection =
 134:   if config.Types.Config.server.enable_otel then
 135:     Some
 136:       (Server_metrics.connection
 137:          ~runtime:(runtime_factory ~sw ~connection ())
 138:          ~connection)
 139:   else None
 140: 
 141: let emit_connection_metric t f =
 142:   Option.iter f t.connection_metrics
 143: 
 144: let record_protocol_error t =
 145:   Server_stats.H2.protocol_error t.stats;
 146:   emit_connection_metric t (fun metrics ->
 147:       Server_metrics.protocol_errors metrics 1)
 148: 
 149: let finish_stream_metrics state =
 150:   if not state.metrics_finished then (
 151:     Option.iter Server_metrics.request_finished state.metrics;
 152:     Option.iter Server_metrics.stream_finished state.metrics;
 153:     state.metrics_finished <- true)
 154: 
 155: let peer_of_sockaddr = function
 156:   | `Tcp (address, port) ->
 157:       {
 158:         Server.Request.address =
 159:           Some (Format.asprintf "%a" Eio.Net.Ipaddr.pp address);
 160:         port = Some port;
 161:       }
 162:   | `Unix path -> { Server.Request.address = Some path; port = None }
 163: 
 164: let connection_id =
 165:   let next = Atomic.make 0 in
 166:   fun () ->
 167:     let id = Atomic.fetch_and_add next 1 + 1 in
 168:     "h2c-" ^ string_of_int id
 169: 
 170: let request_id connection_id ordinal =
 171:   connection_id ^ "/stream-" ^ string_of_int ordinal
 172: 
 173: let method_to_string method_ = H2.Method.to_string method_
 174: 
 175: let connection_url_scheme t =
 176:   Server.Validation.connection_scheme ~tls:t.connection.tls
 177: 
 178: let validate_config = Types.Config.validate
 179: 
 180: let resolve resolver value = ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolver value)
 181: 
 182: let enqueue t command =
 183:   if t.closed then false
 184:   else (
 185:     Eio.Stream.add t.commands command;
 186:     true)
 187: 
 188: let request_body_closed_error t ordinal =
 189:   ignore ordinal;
 190:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 191:     (Connection_closed { during = Request_body })
 192: 
 193: let connection_closed_error t during =
 194:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 195:     (Connection_closed { during })
 196: 
 197: let request_timeout_error t timeout =
 198:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 199:     (Request_timeout
 200:        { timeout_ms = Option.map Eta.Duration.to_ms timeout })
 201: 
 202: let handler_timeout_error t request timeout =
 203:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
 204:     ~method_:request.Server.Request.method_ ~target:request.target
 205:     (Handler_timeout
 206:        { timeout_ms = Option.map Eta.Duration.to_ms timeout })
 207: 
 208: let request_body_too_large_error t ~limit ~length =
 209:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 210:     (Request_body_too_large { limit; length })
 211: 
 212: let request_body_length_mismatch_error t ~expected ~actual =
 213:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 214:     (Bad_request
 215:        {
 216:          message =
 217:            Printf.sprintf
 218:              "HTTP/2 content-length mismatch: expected %d bytes, got %d"
 219:              expected actual;
 220:        })
 221: 
 222: let shutdown_error t = connection_closed_error t Shutdown
 223: 
 224: let connection_read_error t exn =
 225:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 226:     (Protocol_error
 227:        {
 228:          kind = "connection_read_failed";
 229:          message = Printexc.to_string exn;
 230:        })
 231: 
 232: let response_write_error t ?(message = "response stream is not writable") () =
 233:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 234:     (Response_write_failed { message })
 235: 
 236: let connection_write_error t exn =
 237:   response_write_error t
 238:     ~message:("connection write failed: " ^ Printexc.to_string exn)
 239:     ()
 240: 
 241: let response_write_timeout_error t =
 242:   response_write_error t ~message:"response write timed out" ()
 243: 
 244: let response_body_timeout_error t request timeout =
 245:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
 246:     ~method_:request.Server.Request.method_ ~target:request.target
 247:     (Response_body_timeout
 248:        { timeout_ms = Option.map Eta.Duration.to_ms timeout })
 249: 
 250: let security_error t kind =
 251:   let http_error =
 252:     Eta_http.Error.make ~protocol:Eta_http.Error.H2 ~method_:"*" ~uri:"*" kind
 253:   in
 254:   match kind with
 255:   | Eta_http.Error.Header_invalid { reason } ->
 256:       Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 257:         (Header_invalid { reason })
 258:   | Eta_http.Error.Connection_closed _ -> connection_closed_error t Connection
 259:   | _ ->
 260:       Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 261:         (Protocol_error
 262:            {
 263:              kind = Eta_http.Error.kind_name kind;
 264:              message = Eta_http.Error.to_string http_error;
 265:            })
 266: 
 267: let h2_client_connection_preface = "PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
 268: let h2_client_connection_preface_length =
 269:   String.length h2_client_connection_preface
 270: 
 271: let observe_ingress_security t bytes ~off ~len =
 272:   let off, len =
 273:     if t.security_preface_remaining = 0 then (off, len)
 274:     else
 275:       let skipped = min t.security_preface_remaining len in
 276:       t.security_preface_remaining <- t.security_preface_remaining - skipped;
 277:       (off + skipped, len - skipped)
 278:   in
 279:   if len = 0 then None
 280:   else Eta_http.H2.Security.observe t.security bytes ~off ~len
 281: 
 282: let frame_header_size = 9
 283: 
 284: let frame_length s off =
 285:   (Char.code s.[off] lsl 16)
 286:   lor (Char.code s.[off + 1] lsl 8)
 287:   lor Char.code s.[off + 2]
 288: 
 289: let frame_type s off = Char.code s.[off + 3]
 290: 
 291: let frame_stream_id s off =
 292:   ((Char.code s.[off + 5] land 0x7f) lsl 24)
 293:   lor (Char.code s.[off + 6] lsl 16)
````
