````ocaml
 294:   lor (Char.code s.[off + 7] lsl 8)
 295:   lor Char.code s.[off + 8]
 296: 
 297: let client_request_stream_id stream_id = stream_id > 0 && stream_id land 1 = 1
 298: 
 299: let configured_max_frame_size t =
 300:   t.config.Types.Config.h2_config.H2.Config.read_buffer_size
 301: 
 302: let h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind ~message =
 303:   Eta_http.Error.Connection_protocol_violation { kind; message }
 304: 
 305: let invalid_preface_error =
 306:   h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind:"h2_preface"
 307:     ~message:"invalid HTTP/2 client connection preface"
 308: 
 309: let stream_closed_frame_error stream_id =
 310:   h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind:"stream_closed"
 311:     ~message:
 312:       (Printf.sprintf
 313:          "HTTP/2 DATA frame received on reset stream %d" stream_id)
 314: 
 315: let frame_size_error t length =
 316:   h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind:"h2_frame_size"
 317:     ~message:
 318:       (Printf.sprintf
 319:          "HTTP/2 frame payload length %d exceeds configured max frame size %d"
 320:          length (configured_max_frame_size t))
 321: 
 322: let filter_pending_error t needed =
 323:   h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind:"h2_filter_buffer_exhausted"
 324:     ~message:
 325:       (Printf.sprintf
 326:          "h2 ingress filter needs %d bytes, limit is %d bytes" needed
 327:          (frame_header_size + configured_max_frame_size t))
 328: 
 329: let h2_security_config t =
 330:   Option.value t.config.Types.Config.h2_security_config
 331:     ~default:Eta_http.H2.Security.default_config
 332: 
 333: let note_headers_frame t stream_id =
 334:   if
 335:     client_request_stream_id stream_id
 336:     && not (Hashtbl.mem t.stream_ordinals stream_id)
 337:   then (
 338:     t.observed_request_ordinal <- t.observed_request_ordinal + 1;
 339:     Hashtbl.add t.stream_ordinals stream_id t.observed_request_ordinal)
 340: 
 341: let note_remote_reset_frame t stream_id =
 342:   Hashtbl.replace t.remote_reset_streams stream_id ();
 343:   t.filter_rst_stream_seen <- t.filter_rst_stream_seen + 1;
 344:   let security_config = h2_security_config t in
 345:   if
 346:     t.filter_rst_stream_seen
 347:     > security_config.max_rst_stream_per_connection
 348:     && Option.is_none t.filter_error
 349:   then
 350:     t.filter_error <-
 351:       Some
 352:         (Eta_http.Error.Rst_count_exceeded
 353:            {
 354:              observed_count = t.filter_rst_stream_seen;
 355:              limit = security_config.max_rst_stream_per_connection;
 356:            });
 357:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.stream_ordinals stream_id with
 358:   | None -> ()
 359:   | Some ordinal -> Hashtbl.replace t.remote_reset_ordinals ordinal ()
 360: 
 361: let filter_ingress t bytes ~off ~len =
 362:   let raw = Bigstringaf.substring bytes ~off ~len in
 363:   let raw_len = String.length raw in
 364:   let output = Buffer.create raw_len in
 365:   let frame_off =
 366:     if t.filter_preface_remaining = 0 then Ok 0
 367:     else
 368:       let consumed =
 369:         h2_client_connection_preface_length - t.filter_preface_remaining
 370:       in
 371:       let prefix_len = min t.filter_preface_remaining raw_len in
 372:       let rec validate index =
 373:         if index = prefix_len then Ok ()
 374:         else
 375:           let expected =
 376:             String.unsafe_get h2_client_connection_preface (consumed + index)
 377:           in
 378:           if Char.equal (String.unsafe_get raw index) expected then
 379:             validate (index + 1)
 380:           else Error invalid_preface_error
 381:       in
 382:       match validate 0 with
 383:       | Error _ as error -> error
 384:       | Ok () ->
 385:           Buffer.add_substring output raw 0 prefix_len;
 386:           t.filter_preface_remaining <- t.filter_preface_remaining - prefix_len;
 387:           Ok prefix_len
 388:   in
 389:   match frame_off with
 390:   | Error kind -> Error kind
 391:   | Ok frame_off ->
 392:       let frames =
 393:         let frame_bytes = String.sub raw frame_off (raw_len - frame_off) in
 394:         if String.equal t.filter_pending "" then frame_bytes
 395:         else t.filter_pending ^ frame_bytes
 396:       in
 397:       t.filter_pending <- "";
 398:       let frames_len = String.length frames in
 399:       let set_pending off =
 400:         let pending_len = frames_len - off in
 401:         let pending_limit = frame_header_size + configured_max_frame_size t in
 402:         if pending_len > pending_limit then
 403:           Error (filter_pending_error t pending_len)
 404:         else (
 405:           t.filter_pending <- String.sub frames off pending_len;
 406:           Ok ())
 407:       in
 408:       let rec loop off =
 409:         if off + frame_header_size > frames_len then set_pending off
 410:         else
 411:           let length = frame_length frames off in
 412:           let total = frame_header_size + length in
 413:           if length > configured_max_frame_size t then
 414:             Error (frame_size_error t length)
 415:           else if off + total > frames_len then set_pending off
 416:           else (
 417:             let ty = frame_type frames off in
 418:             let stream_id = frame_stream_id frames off in
 419:             if ty = 0x0 && Hashtbl.mem t.remote_reset_streams stream_id then
 420:               Error (stream_closed_frame_error stream_id)
 421:             else (
 422:               if ty = 0x1 then note_headers_frame t stream_id
 423:               else if ty = 0x3 then note_remote_reset_frame t stream_id;
 424:               Buffer.add_substring output frames off total;
 425:               loop (off + total)))
 426:       in
 427:       match loop 0 with
 428:       | Error kind -> Error kind
 429:       | Ok () -> (
 430:           match t.filter_error with
 431:           | Some kind -> Error kind
 432:           | None ->
 433:               let filtered = Buffer.contents output in
 434:               let filtered_len = String.length filtered in
 435:               if filtered_len = 0 then Ok None
 436:               else
 437:                 Ok
 438:                   (Some
 439:                      ( Bigstringaf.of_string ~off:0 ~len:filtered_len
 440:                          filtered,
 441:                        filtered_len )))
 442: 
 443: let response_failure_of_cause t cause =
 444:   let message = Format.asprintf "%a" (Eta.Cause.pp Server.Error.pp) cause in
 445:   response_write_error t ~message ()
 446: 
 447: let body_of_stream t ordinal =
 448:   let read () =
 449:     Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 450:         if t.closed then Error (connection_closed_error t Request_body)
 451:         else
 452:           let promise, resolver = Eio.Promise.create () in
 453:           if enqueue t (Request_body_read (ordinal, resolver)) then
 454:             Eio.Promise.await promise
 455:           else Error (connection_closed_error t Request_body))
 456:     |> Eta.Effect.bind (function
 457:          | Ok chunk -> Eta.Effect.pure chunk
 458:          | Error error -> Eta.Effect.fail error)
 459:   in
 460:   let discard ~drain =
 461:     Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 462:         if t.closed then Error (connection_closed_error t Request_body)
 463:         else
 464:           let promise, resolver = Eio.Promise.create () in
 465:           if enqueue t (Request_body_discard (ordinal, drain, resolver)) then
 466:             Eio.Promise.await promise
 467:           else Error (connection_closed_error t Request_body))
 468:     |> Eta.Effect.bind (function
 469:          | Ok () -> Eta.Effect.unit
 470:          | Error error -> Eta.Effect.fail error)
 471:   in
 472:   Server.Body.of_reader ~discard read
 473: 
 474: let request_of_reqd ~connection ~ordinal ~body reqd =
 475:   let request = H2.Reqd.request reqd in
 476:   let path, query = Server.Request.split_target request.target in
 477:   let headers = H2.Headers.to_list request.headers in
 478:   {
 479:     Server.Request.id = request_id connection.Types.Connection_info.id ordinal;
 480:     version = Eta_http.Core.Version.H2;
 481:     scheme = request.scheme;
 482:     authority = H2.Headers.get request.headers ":authority";
 483:     method_ = method_to_string request.meth;
 484:     target = request.target;
 485:     path;
 486:     query;
 487:     headers = Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_of_list headers;
 488:     body;
 489:     trailers = (fun () -> Eta.Effect.pure Eta_http.Core.Header.empty);
 490:     peer = connection.peer;
 491:     tls = connection.tls;
 492:     alpn_protocol = connection.alpn_protocol;
 493:     stream_id = None;
 494:     connection_id = connection.id;
 495:   }
 496: 
 497: let validate_request_metadata t (request : Server.Request.t) =
 498:   match
 499:     Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers
 500:       ~limits:t.config.server.limits request.headers
 501:   with
 502:   | Error message ->
 503:       Error
 504:         (Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
 505:            ~method_:request.method_ ~target:request.target
 506:            (Bad_request { message }))
 507:   | Ok () -> (
 508:       match
 509:         Server.Validation.validate_h2_request
 510:           ~connection_scheme:(connection_url_scheme t) ~method_:request.method_
 511:           ~scheme:request.scheme ~target:request.target
 512:           ~authority:request.authority
 513:       with
 514:       | Ok () -> Ok ()
 515:       | Error message ->
 516:           Error
 517:             (Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
 518:                ~method_:request.method_ ~target:request.target
 519:                (Bad_request { message })))
 520: 
 521: let h2_header_list headers =
 522:   headers
 523:   |> Eta_http.Core.Header.to_list
 524:   |> List.map (fun (name, value) ->
 525:          (Eta_http.Core.Header.normalize_name name, value))
 526: 
 527: let h2_response response =
 528:   H2.Response.create
 529:     ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list (h2_header_list response.headers))
 530:     (H2.Status.of_code response.status)
 531: 
 532: let validate_response_headers t response =
 533:   match
 534:     Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_headers
 535:       ~limits:t.config.server.limits
 536:       (Server.Response.headers response)
 537:   with
 538:   | Ok () -> Ok ()
 539:   | Error message -> Error (response_write_error t ~message ())
 540: 
 541: let fixed_body_length t chunks =
 542:   List.fold_left
 543:     (fun acc chunk ->
 544:       match acc with
 545:       | Error _ as error -> error
 546:       | Ok total ->
 547:           let length = Bytes.length chunk in
 548:           if total > max_int - length then
 549:             Error
 550:               (response_write_error t
 551:                  ~message:"response body length overflows int" ())
 552:           else Ok (total + length))
 553:     (Ok 0) chunks
 554: 
 555: let bodyless_response ~request_method status =
 556:   (match Eta_http.Core.Method.of_string request_method with
 557:   | `HEAD -> true
 558:   | _ -> false)
 559:   || Eta_http.Core.Status.forbids_response_body status
 560: 
 561: let strict_no_body_status = Eta_http.Core.Status.forbids_response_body
 562: 
 563: let add_content_length_header length headers =
 564:   Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_add "content-length" (string_of_int length) headers
 565: 
 566: let prepare_h2_response t request response =
 567:   match validate_response_headers t response with
 568:   | Error _ as error -> error
 569:   | Ok () -> (
 570:       let headers = Server.Response.headers response in
 571:       match Eta_http.Core.Header.get "content-length" headers with
 572:       | Some _ ->
 573:           Error
 574:             (response_write_error t
 575:                ~message:"caller supplied HTTP/2 response Content-Length" ())
 576:       | None -> (
 577:           let status = Server.Response.status response in
 578:           let body = Server.Response.body response in
 579:           let bodyless =
 580:             bodyless_response ~request_method:request.Server.Request.method_
 581:               status
 582:           in
 583:           let strict_no_body = strict_no_body_status status in
 584:           match (bodyless, strict_no_body, body) with
 585:           | true, true, Server.Response.Body.Stream stream ->
 586:               Ok
 587:                 {
 588:                   status;
 589:                   headers;
 590:                   body = Response_no_body (Some stream);
 591:                 }
 592:           | true, true, (Empty | Fixed _) ->
 593:               Ok { status; headers; body = Response_no_body None }
 594:           | true, false, Empty ->
 595:               Ok
 596:                 {
 597:                   status;
 598:                   headers = add_content_length_header 0 headers;
 599:                   body = Response_no_body None;
 600:                 }
 601:           | true, false, Fixed chunks -> (
 602:               match fixed_body_length t chunks with
 603:               | Error _ as error -> error
 604:               | Ok length ->
 605:                   Ok
 606:                     {
 607:                       status;
 608:                       headers = add_content_length_header length headers;
 609:                       body = Response_no_body None;
 610:                     })
 611:           | true, false, Stream ({ length; _ } as stream) ->
 612:               Ok
 613:                 {
 614:                   status;
 615:                   headers =
 616:                     (match length with
 617:                     | None -> headers
 618:                     | Some length -> add_content_length_header length headers);
 619:                   body = Response_no_body (Some stream);
 620:                 }
 621:           | false, _, Empty ->
 622:               Ok
 623:                 {
 624:                   status;
 625:                   headers = add_content_length_header 0 headers;
 626:                   body = Response_no_body None;
 627:                 }
 628:           | false, _, Fixed chunks -> (
 629:               match fixed_body_length t chunks with
 630:               | Error _ as error -> error
 631:               | Ok length ->
 632:                   Ok
 633:                     {
 634:                       status;
 635:                       headers = add_content_length_header length headers;
 636:                       body = Response_fixed (chunks, length);
 637:                     })
 638:           | false, _, Stream ({ length = Some length; _ } as stream) ->
 639:               Ok
 640:                 {
 641:                   status;
 642:                   headers = add_content_length_header length headers;
 643:                   body = Response_stream stream;
 644:                 }
 645:           | false, _, Stream stream ->
 646:               Ok { status; headers; body = Response_stream stream }))
 647: 
 648: let max_h2_data_chunk = 16 * 1024
 649: 
 650: let write_fixed_chunk writer chunk =
 651:   let len = Bytes.length chunk in
 652:   let rec loop off =
 653:     if off < len then (
 654:       let chunk_len = min max_h2_data_chunk (len - off) in
 655:       H2.Body.Writer.write_string writer (Bytes.sub_string chunk off chunk_len);
 656:       loop (off + chunk_len))
 657:   in
 658:   loop 0
 659: 
 660: let fixed_response_stream chunks length =
 661:   let chunks = ref chunks in
 662:   let current = ref None in
 663:   let offset = ref 0 in
 664:   let rec read () =
 665:     match !current with
 666:     | Some chunk when !offset < Bytes.length chunk ->
 667:         let len = min max_h2_data_chunk (Bytes.length chunk - !offset) in
 668:         let out = Bytes.sub chunk !offset len in
 669:         offset := !offset + len;
 670:         Eta.Effect.pure (Some out)
 671:     | _ -> (
 672:         match !chunks with
 673:         | [] -> Eta.Effect.pure None
 674:         | chunk :: rest ->
 675:             chunks := rest;
 676:             current := Some chunk;
 677:             offset := 0;
 678:             read ())
 679:   in
 680:   {
 681:     Server.Response.Body.length = Some length;
 682:     read;
 683:     release = (fun () -> Eta.Effect.unit);
 684:   }
 685: 
 686: let find_failure cause =
 687:   let rec loop = function
 688:     | Eta.Cause.Fail error -> Some error
 689:     | Die _ | Interrupt _ | Finalizer _ -> None
 690:     | Sequential causes | Concurrent causes -> List.find_map loop causes
 691:     | Suppressed { primary; _ } -> loop primary
 692:   in
 693:   loop cause
 694: 
 695: let fallback_error_response t request cause =
 696:   let message = Format.asprintf "%a" (Eta.Cause.pp Server.Error.pp) cause in
 697:   let error =
 698:     match find_failure cause with
 699:     | Some error -> error
 700:     | None ->
 701:         Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
 702:           ~method_:request.Server.Request.method_ ~target:request.target
 703:           (Handler_failed { message })
 704:   in
 705:   Server.Handler.default_error_response error
 706: 
 707: let respond_fixed reqd response =
 708:   match response.body with
 709:   | Response_no_body _ -> H2.Reqd.respond_with_string reqd (h2_response response) ""
 710:   | Response_fixed (chunks, _) ->
 711:       H2.Reqd.respond_with_string reqd (h2_response response)
 712:         (Bytes.unsafe_to_string (Bytes.concat Bytes.empty chunks))
 713:   | Response_stream _ ->
 714:       invalid_arg
 715:         "Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.respond_fixed: streaming body"
 716: 
 717: let write_iovecs t iovecs =
 718:   if H2.IOVec.lengthv iovecs = 0 then 0
 719:   else
 720:     let write () =
 721:       Writer.write_iovecs ~flow:t.flow iovecs
 722:     in
 723:     match t.config.server.timeouts.response_write_timeout with
 724:     | None -> write ()
 725:     | Some timeout -> t.with_timeout timeout write
 726: 
 727: let h2_write_batch_budget = 32
 728: 
 729: let rec drain_writes ?(budget = h2_write_batch_budget) t =
 730:   if not t.closed then
 731:     match H2.Server_connection.next_write_operation t.h2 with
 732:     | `Write iovecs ->
 733:         let written = write_iovecs t iovecs in
 734:         H2.Server_connection.report_write_result t.h2 (`Ok written);
 735:         if budget <= 1 then (
 736:           Eio.Fiber.yield ();
 737:           drain_writes t)
 738:         else drain_writes ~budget:(budget - 1) t
 739:     | `Yield -> ()
 740:     | `Close _ ->
 741:         H2.Server_connection.report_write_result t.h2 `Closed;
 742:         mark_closed t;
 743:         (try Eio.Flow.shutdown t.flow `Send with _ -> ())
 744: 
 745: let h2_read_buffer_size config =
 746:   config.Types.Config.h2_config.H2.Config.read_buffer_size
 747: 
 748: let max_ingress_buffer_size config =
 749:   config.Types.Config.read_buffer_size + h2_read_buffer_size config
 750:   + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size
 751: 
 752: let stream_table_initial_capacity (h2_config : H2.Config.t) =
 753:   min (Int32.to_int h2_config.H2.Config.max_concurrent_streams) 256
 754: 
 755: let compact_ingress t =
 756:   if t.ingress_off > 0 && t.ingress_len > 0 then (
 757:     Bigstringaf.blit t.ingress_buffer ~src_off:t.ingress_off t.ingress_buffer
 758:       ~dst_off:0 ~len:t.ingress_len;
 759:     t.ingress_off <- 0)
 760:   else if t.ingress_len = 0 then t.ingress_off <- 0
 761: 
 762: let ingress_buffer_full_error t needed =
 763:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol ~method_:"*" ~target:"*"
 764:     (Protocol_error
 765:        {
 766:          kind = "h2_ingress_buffer_exhausted";
 767:          message =
 768:            Printf.sprintf
 769:              "h2 ingress buffer needs %d bytes, limit is %d bytes" needed
 770:              t.max_ingress_buffer_size;
 771:        })
 772: 
 773: let append_ingress t bytes ~off ~len =
 774:   compact_ingress t;
 775:   let needed = t.ingress_len + len in
 776:   if needed > t.max_ingress_buffer_size then
 777:     Error (ingress_buffer_full_error t needed)
 778:   else (
 779:     Bigstringaf.blit bytes ~src_off:off t.ingress_buffer ~dst_off:t.ingress_len
 780:       ~len;
 781:     t.ingress_len <- needed;
 782:     Ok ())
 783: 
 784: let feed_ingress t =
 785:   let rec loop () =
 786:     if t.ingress_len > 0 then (
 787:       let consumed =
 788:         H2.Server_connection.read t.h2 t.ingress_buffer ~off:t.ingress_off
 789:           ~len:t.ingress_len
 790:       in
 791:       if consumed < 0 || consumed > t.ingress_len then
 792:         invalid_arg
 793:           "Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.feed_ingress: invalid h2 consumed \
 794:            count"
 795:       else if consumed > 0 then (
 796:         t.ingress_off <- t.ingress_off + consumed;
 797:         t.ingress_len <- t.ingress_len - consumed;
 798:         if t.ingress_len = 0 then t.ingress_off <- 0;
 799:         loop ()))
 800:   in
 801:   loop ()
 802: 
 803: let read_eof t =
 804:   let consumed =
 805:     H2.Server_connection.read_eof t.h2 t.ingress_buffer ~off:t.ingress_off
 806:       ~len:t.ingress_len
 807:   in
 808:   t.ingress_off <- t.ingress_off + consumed;
 809:   t.ingress_len <- max 0 (t.ingress_len - consumed);
 810:   if t.ingress_len = 0 then t.ingress_off <- 0
 811: 
 812: let fail_pending_request_read state error =
 813:   Option.iter
 814:     (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error))
 815:     state.request_read_resolver;
 816:   state.request_read_resolver <- None
 817: 
 818: let clear_request_discard state =
 819:   state.request_discarding <- false;
 820:   state.request_discard_resolver <- None;
 821:   state.request_discard_timeout_token <- None
 822: 
 823: let fail_pending_request_discard state error =
 824:   Option.iter
 825:     (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error))
 826:     state.request_discard_resolver;
 827:   clear_request_discard state
 828: 
 829: let fail_pending_response_write state error =
 830:   Option.iter
 831:     (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error))
 832:     state.response_write_resolver;
 833:   state.response_write_resolver <- None
 834: 
 835: let close_request_body state =
 836:   state.request_done <- true;
 837:   clear_request_discard state;
 838:   try
 839:     if not (H2.Body.Reader.is_closed state.request_body) then
 840:       H2.Body.Reader.close state.request_body
 841:   with _ -> ()
 842: 
 843: let forget_stream t ordinal state =
 844:   state.response_writer <- None;
 845:   Hashtbl.remove t.streams ordinal
 846: 
 847: let forget_if_complete t ordinal state =
 848:   if state.request_done && state.response_done then forget_stream t ordinal state
 849: 
 850: let resolve_unit resolver =
 851:   Option.iter (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Ok ())) resolver
 852: 
 853: let record_request_body_bytes t state len =
 854:   let previous = state.request_body_bytes in
 855:   let length = if len > max_int - previous then max_int else previous + len in
 856:   state.request_body_bytes <- length;
 857:   Server_stats.H2.add_request_bytes t.stats len;
 858:   Option.iter
 859:     (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.request_body_bytes metrics len)
 860:     state.metrics;
 861:   match state.request_content_length with
 862:   | Some expected when length > expected ->
 863:       record_protocol_error t;
 864:       Error (request_body_length_mismatch_error t ~expected ~actual:length)
 865:   | None | Some _ -> (
 866:       match t.config.server.limits.max_request_body_bytes with
 867:       | Some limit when length > limit ->
 868:           Error (request_body_too_large_error t ~limit ~length)
 869:       | None | Some _ -> Ok ())
 870: 
 871: let finish_request_body_eof t state =
 872:   match state.request_content_length with
 873:   | Some expected when state.request_body_bytes <> expected ->
 874:       record_protocol_error t;
 875:       Error
 876:         (request_body_length_mismatch_error t ~expected
 877:            ~actual:state.request_body_bytes)
 878:   | None | Some _ -> Ok ()
 879: 
 880: let schedule_request_body_drain_timeout t ordinal token timeout =
 881:   Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw:t.sw (fun () ->
 882:       t.sleep timeout;
 883:       ignore (enqueue t (Request_body_drain_timeout (ordinal, token)));
 884:       `Stop_daemon)
 885: 
 886: let rec drain_request_body t ordinal state remaining resolver =
 887:   if state.request_done then (
 888:     clear_request_discard state;
 889:     forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
 890:     resolve_unit resolver)
 891:   else if remaining <= 0 then (
 892:     close_request_body state;
 893:     forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
 894:     resolve_unit resolver)
 895:   else if H2.Body.Reader.is_closed state.request_body then (
 896:     state.request_done <- true;
 897:     clear_request_discard state;
 898:     forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
 899:     resolve_unit resolver)
 900:   else (
 901:     state.request_discarding <- true;
 902:     state.request_discard_resolver <- resolver;
 903:     Option.iter
 904:       (fun timeout ->
 905:         let _promise, token = Eio.Promise.create () in
 906:         state.request_discard_timeout_token <- Some token;
 907:         schedule_request_body_drain_timeout t ordinal token timeout)
 908:       t.config.server.timeouts.request_body_timeout;
 909:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read state.request_body
 910:       ~on_eof:(fun () ->
 911:         match finish_request_body_eof t state with
 912:         | Ok () ->
 913:             state.request_done <- true;
 914:             clear_request_discard state;
 915:             forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
 916:             resolve_unit resolver
 917:         | Error error ->
 918:             Option.iter (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error)) resolver;
 919:             close_request_body state;
 920:             forget_if_complete t ordinal state)
 921:       ~on_read:(fun _bs ~off:_ ~len ->
 922:         state.request_discard_timeout_token <- None;
 923:         match record_request_body_bytes t state len with
 924:         | Ok () -> drain_request_body t ordinal state (remaining - len) resolver
 925:         | Error error ->
 926:             Option.iter
 927:               (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error))
 928:               resolver;
 929:             close_request_body state;
 930:             forget_if_complete t ordinal state))
 931: 
 932: let discard_request_body_with_policy ?resolver ~drain t ordinal state =
 933:   if state.request_done || state.request_discarding then resolve_unit resolver
 934:   else
 935:     match (drain, t.config.server.unread_body_policy) with
 936:     | true, Eta_http.Server.Config.Drain_up_to limit ->
 937:         drain_request_body t ordinal state limit resolver
 938:     | true, Eta_http.Server.Config.Reset | false, _ ->
 939:         close_request_body state;
 940:         forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
 941:         resolve_unit resolver
 942: 
 943: let finish_response t ordinal state =
 944:   if not state.response_done then Server_stats.H2.stream_completed t.stats;
 945:   finish_stream_metrics state;
 946:   state.response_done <- true;
 947:   discard_request_body_with_policy ~drain:true t ordinal state;
 948:   forget_if_complete t ordinal state
 949: 
 950: let finish_reset_response t ordinal state =
 951:   finish_stream_metrics state;
 952:   state.response_done <- true;
 953:   discard_request_body_with_policy ~drain:true t ordinal state;
 954:   forget_if_complete t ordinal state
 955: 
 956: let close_response_writer_best_effort state =
 957:   match state.response_writer with
 958:   | None -> ()
 959:   | Some writer -> (
 960:       try
 961:         if not (H2.Body.Writer.is_closed writer) then H2.Body.Writer.close writer
 962:       with _ -> ())
 963: 
 964: let fail_active_streams t request_error =
 965:   let streams =
 966:     Hashtbl.fold (fun ordinal state acc -> (ordinal, state) :: acc) t.streams []
 967:   in
 968:   Server_stats.H2.add_reset_streams t.stats (List.length streams);
 969:   List.iter
 970:     (fun (ordinal, state) ->
 971:       Option.iter
 972:         (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.stream_resets metrics 1)
 973:         state.metrics;
 974:       finish_stream_metrics state;
 975:       fail_pending_request_read state request_error;
 976:       fail_pending_request_discard state request_error;
 977:       fail_pending_response_write state request_error;
 978:       close_request_body state;
 979:       close_response_writer_best_effort state;
 980:       state.response_done <- true;
 981:       forget_stream t ordinal state)
 982:     streams
 983: 
 984: let finish_remote_reset_stream t ordinal state =
 985:   Server_stats.H2.stream_reset t.stats;
 986:   Option.iter
 987:     (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.stream_resets metrics 1)
 988:     state.metrics;
 989:   finish_stream_metrics state;
 990:   let error = connection_closed_error t Request_body in
 991:   fail_pending_request_read state error;
 992:   fail_pending_request_discard state error;
 993:   fail_pending_response_write state error;
 994:   close_request_body state;
 995:   close_response_writer_best_effort state;
 996:   state.response_done <- true;
 997:   forget_stream t ordinal state
 998: 
 999: let apply_remote_resets t =
1000:   let ordinals =
1001:     Hashtbl.fold
1002:       (fun ordinal () acc -> ordinal :: acc)
1003:       t.remote_reset_ordinals []
1004:   in
1005:   List.iter
1006:     (fun ordinal ->
1007:       Hashtbl.remove t.remote_reset_ordinals ordinal;
1008:       match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1009:       | None -> ()
1010:       | Some state -> finish_remote_reset_stream t ordinal state)
1011:     ordinals
1012: 
1013: let request_body_open state =
1014:   (not state.request_done)
1015:   &&
1016:   try not (H2.Body.Reader.is_closed state.request_body) with _ -> false
1017: 
1018: let fail_open_request_bodies t =
1019:   let ordinals =
1020:     Hashtbl.fold
1021:       (fun ordinal state acc ->
1022:         if request_body_open state then ordinal :: acc else acc)
1023:       t.streams []
1024:   in
1025:   List.iter
1026:     (fun ordinal ->
1027:       match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1028:       | None -> ()
1029:       | Some state -> finish_remote_reset_stream t ordinal state)
1030:     ordinals
1031: 
1032: let goaway_error_frame error_code =
1033:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:8 ~frame_type:Goaway ~flags:0
1034:     ~stream_id:0
1035:   ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.uint32 0
1036:   ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.uint32 error_code
1037: 
1038: let h2_error_code_of_kind = function
1039:   | Eta_http.Error.Connection_protocol_violation { kind = "stream_closed"; _ } ->
1040:       5
1041:   | _ -> 1
1042: 
1043: let write_goaway_error t kind =
1044:   let frame = goaway_error_frame (h2_error_code_of_kind kind) in
1045:   try Eio.Flow.write t.flow [ Cstruct.of_string frame ] with _ -> ()
1046: 
1047: let handle_security_error t kind =
1048:   let error = security_error t kind in
1049:   record_protocol_error t;
1050:   mark_closed t;
1051:   fail_active_streams t error;
1052:   drain_writes t;
1053:   write_goaway_error t kind;
1054:   try Eio.Flow.shutdown t.flow `Send with _ -> ()
1055: 
1056: let finish_graceful_shutdown_if_idle t =
1057:   if t.graceful_shutdown && (not t.closed) && Hashtbl.length t.streams = 0 then (
1058:     mark_closed t;
1059:     drain_writes t;
1060:     try Eio.Flow.shutdown t.flow `Send with _ -> ())
1061: 
1062: let schedule_request_body_timeout t ordinal resolver timeout =
1063:   Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw:t.sw (fun () ->
1064:       t.sleep timeout;
1065:       ignore (enqueue t (Request_body_timeout (ordinal, resolver)));
1066:       `Stop_daemon)
1067: 
1068: let arm_request_body_read t ordinal resolver =
1069:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1070:   | None -> resolve resolver (Error (request_body_closed_error t ordinal))
1071:   | Some state when state.request_done || state.request_discarding ->
1072:       resolve resolver (Ok None)
1073:   | Some state ->
1074:       state.request_read_resolver <- Some resolver;
1075:       Option.iter
1076:         (schedule_request_body_timeout t ordinal resolver)
1077:         t.config.server.timeouts.request_body_timeout;
1078:       H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read state.request_body
1079:         ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
1080:           state.request_read_resolver <- None;
1081:           match record_request_body_bytes t state len with
1082:           | Error error ->
1083:               close_request_body state;
1084:               forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
1085:               resolve resolver (Error error)
1086:           | Ok () ->
1087:               let chunk = Bytes.create len in
1088:               Bigstringaf.blit_to_bytes bs ~src_off:off chunk ~dst_off:0 ~len;
1089:               resolve resolver (Ok (Some chunk)))
1090:         ~on_eof:(fun () ->
1091:           state.request_read_resolver <- None;
1092:           match finish_request_body_eof t state with
1093:           | Ok () ->
1094:               state.request_done <- true;
1095:               forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
1096:               resolve resolver (Ok None)
1097:           | Error error ->
1098:               close_request_body state;
1099:               forget_if_complete t ordinal state;
1100:               resolve resolver (Error error))
1101: 
1102: let handle_request_body_timeout t ordinal resolver =
1103:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1104:   | None -> ()
1105:   | Some state -> (
1106:       match state.request_read_resolver with
1107:       | Some active when active == resolver ->
1108:           let error =
1109:             request_timeout_error t t.config.server.timeouts.request_body_timeout
1110:           in
1111:           state.request_read_resolver <- None;
1112:           resolve resolver (Error error);
1113:           close_request_body state;
1114:           forget_if_complete t ordinal state
1115:       | None | Some _ -> ())
1116: 
1117: let handle_request_body_drain_timeout t ordinal token =
1118:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1119:   | None -> ()
1120:   | Some state -> (
1121:       match state.request_discard_timeout_token with
1122:       | Some active when active == token ->
1123:           let error =
1124:             request_timeout_error t t.config.server.timeouts.request_body_timeout
1125:           in
1126:           let resolver = state.request_discard_resolver in
1127:           Option.iter (fun resolver -> resolve resolver (Error error)) resolver;
1128:           close_request_body state;
1129:           forget_if_complete t ordinal state
1130:       | None | Some _ -> ())
1131: 
1132: let discard_request_body t ordinal _drain resolver =
1133:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1134:   | None -> resolve resolver (Ok ())
1135:   | Some state ->
1136:       discard_request_body_with_policy ?resolver:(Some resolver) ~drain:_drain t
1137:         ordinal state
1138: 
1139: let start_response t ordinal response resolver =
1140:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1141:   | None ->
1142:       resolve resolver (Error (response_write_error t ()));
1143:       `Done
1144:   | Some state when state.response_done ->
1145:       resolve resolver
1146:         (Error
1147:            (response_write_error t ~message:"response already completed" ()));
1148:       `Done
1149:   | Some state -> (
1150:       match response.body with
1151:       | Response_fixed (_, length) when length > max_h2_data_chunk ->
1152:           let writer =
1153:             H2.Reqd.respond_with_streaming state.reqd (h2_response response)
1154:           in
1155:           state.response_writer <- Some writer;
1156:           state.response_write_resolver <- Some resolver;
1157:           discard_request_body_with_policy ~drain:true t ordinal state;
1158:           `Flush (state, resolver)
1159:       | Response_no_body _ | Response_fixed _ ->
1160:           (match response.body with
1161:           | Response_no_body _ -> ()
1162:           | Response_fixed (_, length) ->
1163:               Server_stats.H2.add_response_bytes t.stats length;
1164:               Option.iter
1165:                 (fun metrics ->
1166:                   Server_metrics.response_body_bytes metrics length)
1167:                 state.metrics
1168:           | Response_stream _ -> assert false);
1169:           respond_fixed state.reqd response;
1170:           finish_response t ordinal state;
1171:           resolve resolver (Ok ());
1172:           `Done
1173:       | Response_stream _ ->
1174:           let writer =
1175:             H2.Reqd.respond_with_streaming state.reqd (h2_response response)
1176:           in
1177:           state.response_writer <- Some writer;
1178:           state.response_write_resolver <- Some resolver;
1179:           discard_request_body_with_policy ~drain:true t ordinal state;
1180:           `Flush (state, resolver))
1181: 
1182: let write_response_chunk t ordinal chunk resolver =
1183:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1184:   | None -> resolve resolver (Error (response_write_error t ()))
1185:   | Some { response_writer = None; _ } ->
1186:       resolve resolver
1187:         (Error
1188:            (response_write_error t
1189:               ~message:"response streaming writer has not been started" ()))
1190:   | Some ({ response_writer = Some writer; _ } as state) ->
1191:       if H2.Body.Writer.is_closed writer then
1192:         resolve resolver
1193:           (Error
1194:              (response_write_error t ~message:"response writer is closed" ()))
1195:       else (
1196:         Server_stats.H2.add_response_bytes t.stats (Bytes.length chunk);
1197:         Option.iter
1198:           (fun metrics ->
1199:             Server_metrics.response_body_bytes metrics (Bytes.length chunk))
1200:           state.metrics;
1201:         write_fixed_chunk writer chunk;
1202:         state.response_write_resolver <- Some resolver;
1203:         H2.Body.Writer.flush writer (function
1204:           | `Written ->
1205:               state.response_write_resolver <- None;
1206:               resolve resolver (Ok ())
1207:           | `Closed ->
1208:               state.response_write_resolver <- None;
1209:               resolve resolver
1210:                 (Error
1211:                    (response_write_error t ~message:"response flush closed" ()))))
1212: 
1213: let schedule_response_trailers t ordinal trailers resolver =
1214:   match
1215:     Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_trailers
1216:       ~limits:t.config.server.limits trailers
1217:   with
1218:   | Error message ->
1219:       resolve resolver
1220:         (Error
1221:            (response_write_error t
1222:               ~message ()));
1223:       `Done
1224:   | Ok () -> (
1225:       match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1226:       | None ->
1227:           resolve resolver (Error (response_write_error t ()));
1228:           `Done
1229:       | Some state -> (
1230:           try
1231:             if not (List.is_empty trailers) then
1232:               H2.Reqd.schedule_trailers state.reqd
1233:                 (H2.Headers.of_list
1234:                    (List.map
1235:                       (fun (name, value) ->
1236:                         (Eta_http.Core.Header.normalize_name name, value))
1237:                       trailers));
1238:             state.response_write_resolver <- Some resolver;
1239:             `Flush (state, resolver)
1240:           with exn ->
1241:             resolve resolver
1242:               (Error
1243:                  (response_write_error t ~message:(Printexc.to_string exn) ()));
1244:             `Done))
1245: 
1246: let close_response_writer t ordinal resolver =
1247:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1248:   | None ->
1249:       resolve resolver (Error (response_write_error t ()));
1250:       `Done
1251:   | Some { response_writer = None; _ } ->
1252:       resolve resolver
1253:         (Error
1254:            (response_write_error t
1255:               ~message:"response streaming writer has not been started" ()));
1256:       `Done
1257:   | Some state -> (
1258:       match state.response_writer with
1259:       | None -> assert false
1260:       | Some writer ->
1261:           (try
1262:              if not (H2.Body.Writer.is_closed writer) then
1263:                H2.Body.Writer.close writer
1264:            with _ -> ());
1265:           state.response_write_resolver <- Some resolver;
1266:           `Flush (state, resolver))
1267: 
1268: let fail_response t ordinal error =
1269:   match Hashtbl.find_opt t.streams ordinal with
1270:   | None -> ()
1271:   | Some state ->
1272:       Server_stats.H2.stream_reset t.stats;
1273:       Option.iter
1274:         (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.stream_resets metrics 1)
1275:         state.metrics;
1276:       H2.Reqd.report_exn state.reqd (Failure (Server.Error.to_string error));
1277:       finish_reset_response t ordinal state
1278: 
1279: let begin_immediate_shutdown t =
1280:   if not t.closed then (
1281:     mark_closed t;
1282:     fail_active_streams t (shutdown_error t);
1283:     close_flow_all t.flow)
1284: 
1285: let start_shutdown_timer t timeout =
1286:   if not t.shutdown_timer_started then (
1287:     t.shutdown_timer_started <- true;
1288:     Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw:t.sw (fun () ->
1289:         t.sleep timeout;
1290:         ignore (enqueue t (Shutdown Immediate));
1291:         `Stop_daemon))
1292: 
1293: let cancel_idle_timeout t = t.idle_timeout_token <- None
1294: 
1295: let schedule_idle_timeout_if_idle t =
1296:   if
1297:     (not t.closed)
1298:     && t.accepted_request && Hashtbl.length t.streams = 0
1299:     && Option.is_none t.idle_timeout_token
1300:   then
1301:     match t.config.server.timeouts.idle_timeout with
1302:     | None -> ()
1303:     | Some timeout ->
1304:         let _promise, token = Eio.Promise.create () in
1305:         t.idle_timeout_token <- Some token;
1306:         Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw:t.sw (fun () ->
1307:             t.sleep timeout;
1308:             ignore (enqueue t (Idle_timeout token));
1309:             `Stop_daemon)
1310: 
1311: let handle_idle_timeout t token =
1312:   match t.idle_timeout_token with
1313:   | Some active when active == token && Hashtbl.length t.streams = 0 ->
1314:       t.idle_timeout_token <- None;
1315:       mark_closed t;
1316:       fail_active_streams t
1317:         (request_timeout_error t t.config.server.timeouts.idle_timeout);
1318:       close_flow_all t.flow
1319:   | None | Some _ -> ()
1320: 
1321: let incomplete_header_block_eof_error =
1322:   h2_filter_protocol_violation ~kind:"h2_incomplete_header_block"
1323:     ~message:"HTTP/2 connection closed with an incomplete header block"
1324: 
1325: let begin_graceful_shutdown t timeout =
1326:   if Eta.Duration.is_zero timeout then begin_immediate_shutdown t
1327:   else if not t.closed then (
1328:     t.graceful_shutdown <- true;
1329:     start_shutdown_timer t timeout;
1330:     finish_graceful_shutdown_if_idle t)
1331: 
1332: let begin_shutdown t = function
1333:   | Types.Immediate ->
1334:       emit_connection_metric t (fun metrics ->
1335:           Server_metrics.shutdown_active metrics 1);
1336:       begin_immediate_shutdown t
1337:   | Types.Graceful timeout ->
1338:       emit_connection_metric t (fun metrics ->
1339:           Server_metrics.shutdown_active metrics 1);
1340:       begin_graceful_shutdown t timeout
1341: 
1342: let handle_command t = function
1343:   | Ingress { bytes; off; len; ack } ->
1344:       cancel_idle_timeout t;
1345:       Fun.protect
1346:         ~finally:(fun () -> resolve ack ())
1347:         (fun () ->
1348:           match observe_ingress_security t bytes ~off ~len with
1349:           | Some kind -> handle_security_error t kind
1350:           | None -> (
1351:               match filter_ingress t bytes ~off ~len with
1352:               | Error kind -> handle_security_error t kind
1353:               | Ok None -> drain_writes t
1354:               | Ok (Some (bytes, len)) -> (
1355:                   match append_ingress t bytes ~off:0 ~len with
1356:                   | Error error ->
1357:                       record_protocol_error t;
1358:                       mark_closed t;
1359:                       fail_active_streams t error;
1360:                       close_flow_all t.flow
1361:                   | Ok () ->
1362:                       feed_ingress t;
1363:                       apply_remote_resets t;
1364:                       drain_writes t)))
1365:   | Ingress_eof ->
1366:       if Eta_http.H2.Security.has_open_header_block t.security then
1367:         handle_security_error t incomplete_header_block_eof_error
1368:       else (
1369:         read_eof t;
1370:         fail_open_request_bodies t;
1371:         drain_writes t;
1372:         if Hashtbl.length t.streams = 0 then (
1373:           mark_closed t;
1374:           close_flow_all t.flow))
1375:   | Ingress_failed error ->
1376:       mark_closed t;
1377:       fail_active_streams t error;
1378:       close_flow_all t.flow
1379:   | Idle_timeout token -> handle_idle_timeout t token
1380:   | Request_body_read (ordinal, resolver) ->
1381:       arm_request_body_read t ordinal resolver;
1382:       drain_writes t
1383:   | Request_body_timeout (ordinal, resolver) ->
1384:       handle_request_body_timeout t ordinal resolver;
1385:       drain_writes t
1386:   | Request_body_drain_timeout (ordinal, token) ->
1387:       handle_request_body_drain_timeout t ordinal token;
1388:       drain_writes t
1389:   | Request_body_discard (ordinal, drain, resolver) ->
1390:       discard_request_body t ordinal drain resolver;
1391:       drain_writes t
1392:   | Response_start (ordinal, response, resolver) ->
1393:       (match start_response t ordinal response resolver with
1394:       | `Done -> drain_writes t
1395:       | `Flush (state, resolver) ->
1396:           drain_writes t;
1397:           state.response_write_resolver <- None;
1398:           resolve resolver (Ok ()))
1399:   | Response_chunk (ordinal, chunk, resolver) ->
1400:       write_response_chunk t ordinal chunk resolver;
1401:       drain_writes t
1402:   | Response_trailers (ordinal, trailers, resolver) ->
1403:       (match schedule_response_trailers t ordinal trailers resolver with
1404:       | `Done -> drain_writes t
1405:       | `Flush (state, resolver) ->
1406:           drain_writes t;
1407:           state.response_write_resolver <- None;
1408:           resolve resolver (Ok ()))
1409:   | Response_close (ordinal, resolver) ->
1410:       (match close_response_writer t ordinal resolver with
1411:       | `Done -> drain_writes t
1412:       | `Flush (state, resolver) ->
1413:           drain_writes t;
1414:           state.response_write_resolver <- None;
1415:           finish_response t ordinal state;
1416:           resolve resolver (Ok ()))
1417:   | Response_failed (ordinal, error) ->
1418:       fail_response t ordinal error;
1419:       drain_writes t
1420:   | Shutdown policy ->
1421:       begin_shutdown t policy;
1422:       drain_writes t
1423: 
1424: let rec owner_loop t =
1425:   if (not t.closed) && not (H2.Server_connection.is_closed t.h2) then (
1426:     drain_writes t;
1427:     let command = Eio.Stream.take t.commands in
1428:     handle_command t command;
1429:     finish_graceful_shutdown_if_idle t;
1430:     schedule_idle_timeout_if_idle t;
1431:     owner_loop t)
1432: 
1433: let reader_loop t =
1434:   let scratch = Bigstringaf.create t.config.read_buffer_size in
1435:   let cstruct = Cstruct.of_bigarray scratch in
1436:   let ingress_timeout () =
1437:     if Hashtbl.length t.streams = 0 then
1438:       if t.accepted_request then t.config.server.timeouts.idle_timeout
1439:       else t.config.server.timeouts.request_header_timeout
1440:     else None
1441:   in
1442:   let single_read () =
1443:     let read () =
1444:       match ingress_timeout () with
1445:       | None -> `Read (Eio.Flow.single_read t.flow cstruct)
1446:       | Some timeout -> (
1447:           try
1448:             `Read
1449:               (t.with_timeout timeout (fun () ->
1450:                    Eio.Flow.single_read t.flow cstruct))
1451:           with Eio.Time.Timeout -> `Timeout timeout)
1452:     in
1453:     Eio.Fiber.first
1454:       read
1455:       (fun () ->
1456:         Eio.Promise.await t.closed_signal;
1457:         `Closed)
1458:   in
1459:   let rec loop () =
1460:     match single_read () with
1461:     | `Closed -> ()
1462:     | `Timeout timeout ->
1463:         ignore
1464:           (enqueue t (Ingress_failed (request_timeout_error t (Some timeout))))
1465:     | `Read 0 -> ignore (enqueue t Ingress_eof)
1466:     | `Read len ->
1467:         let owned = Bigstringaf.create len in
1468:         Bigstringaf.blit scratch ~src_off:0 owned ~dst_off:0 ~len;
1469:         let _promise, ack = Eio.Promise.create () in
1470:         if enqueue t (Ingress { bytes = owned; off = 0; len; ack }) then (
1471:           loop ())
1472:     | exception End_of_file -> ignore (enqueue t Ingress_eof)
1473:     | exception Eio.Cancel.Cancelled _ -> ()
1474:     | exception exn ->
1475:         ignore (enqueue t (Ingress_failed (connection_read_error t exn)))
1476:   in
1477:   loop ()
1478: 
1479: let fail_owner_loop t error =
1480:   mark_closed t;
1481:   fail_active_streams t error;
1482:   close_flow_all t.flow
1483: 
1484: let run_owner_loop t =
1485:   try owner_loop t
1486:   with
1487:   | Eio.Cancel.Cancelled _ -> fail_owner_loop t (shutdown_error t)
1488:   | Eio.Time.Timeout -> fail_owner_loop t (response_write_timeout_error t)
1489:   | exn -> fail_owner_loop t (connection_write_error t exn)
1490: 
1491: let await_owner t make =
1492:   if t.closed then Error (connection_closed_error t Response_body)
1493:   else
1494:     let promise, resolver = Eio.Promise.create () in
1495:     if enqueue t (make resolver) then
1496:       Eio.Fiber.first
1497:         (fun () -> Eio.Promise.await promise)
1498:         (fun () ->
1499:           Eio.Promise.await t.closed_signal;
1500:           Error (connection_closed_error t Response_body))
1501:     else Error (connection_closed_error t Response_body)
1502: 
1503: (* Response-write commands resolve only once their data is flushed to the
1504:    transport. When a stream is flow-control blocked (the peer withholds
1505:    WINDOW_UPDATE / never reads the body), that flush never completes, so bound
1506:    the wait by [response_write_timeout]. Otherwise a non-reading client could
1507:    pin a stream open indefinitely. *)
1508: let await_owner_write t make =
1509:   match t.config.server.timeouts.response_write_timeout with
1510:   | None -> await_owner t make
1511:   | Some timeout -> (
1512:       try t.with_timeout timeout (fun () -> await_owner t make)
1513:       with Eio.Time.Timeout -> Error (response_write_timeout_error t))
1514: 
1515: let response_error_of_cause t cause =
1516:   match find_failure cause with
1517:   | Some error -> error
1518:   | None -> response_failure_of_cause t cause
1519: 
1520: let release_response_stream rt stream =
1521:   match Eta.Runtime.run rt (stream.Server.Response.Body.release ()) with
1522:   | Eta.Exit.Ok () | Eta.Exit.Error _ -> ()
1523: 
1524: let release_ignored_response_stream rt response =
1525:   match Server.Response.body response with
1526:   | Server.Response.Body.Stream stream -> release_response_stream rt stream
1527:   | Empty | Fixed _ -> ()
1528: 
1529: let release_prepared_response_body rt response =
1530:   match response.body with
1531:   | Response_no_body (Some stream) | Response_stream stream ->
1532:       release_response_stream rt stream
1533:   | Response_no_body None | Response_fixed _ -> ()
1534: 
1535: let handler_failed_error t request exn =
1536:   let message = Printexc.to_string exn in
1537:   Server.Error.make ~protocol:t.connection.protocol
1538:     ~method_:request.Server.Request.method_ ~target:request.target
1539:     (Handler_failed { message })
1540: 
1541: let run_response_body_effect t rt request effect_thunk =
1542:   let run () =
1543:     try
1544:       let effect = effect_thunk () in
1545:       match Eta.Runtime.run rt effect with
1546:       | Eta.Exit.Ok value -> Ok value
1547:       | Eta.Exit.Error cause -> Error (response_error_of_cause t cause)
1548:     with
1549:     | Eio.Cancel.Cancelled _ as exn -> Error (handler_failed_error t request exn)
1550:     | exn -> Error (handler_failed_error t request exn)
1551:   in
1552:   match t.config.server.timeouts.response_body_timeout with
1553:   | Some timeout -> (
1554:       try t.with_timeout timeout run
1555:       with Eio.Time.Timeout ->
1556:         Error (response_body_timeout_error t request (Some timeout)))
1557:   | None -> run ()
1558: 
1559: let read_response_stream t rt request stream =
1560:   Eio.Fiber.first
1561:     (fun () ->
1562:       `Read
1563:         (run_response_body_effect t rt request (fun () ->
1564:              stream.Server.Response.Body.read ())))
1565:     (fun () ->
1566:       Eio.Promise.await t.closed_signal;
1567:       `Closed)
1568: 
1569: let response_trailers t rt request response =
1570:   Eio.Fiber.first
1571:     (fun () ->
1572:       `Trailers
1573:         (run_response_body_effect t rt request (fun () ->
1574:              (Server.Response.trailers response) ())))
1575:     (fun () ->
1576:       Eio.Promise.await t.closed_signal;
1577:       `Closed)
1578: 
1579: let fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error =
1580:   ignore (enqueue t (Response_failed (ordinal, error)));
1581:   release_response_stream rt stream
1582: 
1583: let response_content_length_error t message =
1584:   response_write_error t ~message ()
1585: 
1586: let rec pump_response_stream t rt ordinal request response stream written =
1587:   match read_response_stream t rt request stream with
1588:   | `Closed -> release_response_stream rt stream
1589:   | `Read (Error error) -> fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error
1590:   | `Read (Ok (Some chunk)) -> (
1591:       let length = Bytes.length chunk in
1592:       let next = if length > max_int - written then max_int else written + length in
1593:       match stream.Server.Response.Body.length with
1594:       | Some expected when next > expected ->
1595:           fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream
1596:             (response_content_length_error t
1597:                "stream exceeded declared Content-Length")
1598:       | None | Some _ -> (
1599:           match
1600:             await_owner_write t (fun resolver ->
1601:                 Response_chunk (ordinal, chunk, resolver))
1602:           with
1603:           | Ok () -> pump_response_stream t rt ordinal request response stream next
1604:           | Error error -> fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error))
1605:   | `Read (Ok None) -> (
1606:       match stream.Server.Response.Body.length with
1607:       | Some expected when written <> expected ->
1608:           fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream
1609:             (response_content_length_error t
1610:                "stream ended before declared Content-Length")
1611:       | None | Some _ -> (
1612:           match response_trailers t rt request response with
1613:           | `Closed -> release_response_stream rt stream
1614:           | `Trailers (Error error) ->
1615:               fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error
1616:           | `Trailers (Ok trailers) -> (
1617:               match
1618:                 await_owner_write t (fun resolver ->
1619:                     Response_trailers (ordinal, trailers, resolver))
1620:               with
1621:               | Error error -> fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error
1622:               | Ok () -> (
1623:                   match
1624:                     await_owner_write t (fun resolver ->
1625:                         Response_close (ordinal, resolver))
1626:                   with
1627:                   | Ok () -> release_response_stream rt stream
1628:                   | Error error ->
1629:                       fail_stream_response t rt ordinal stream error))))
1630: 
1631: let safe_handler_effect t request handler =
1632:   try
1633:     Eta_http.Observability.Server.Tracer.request
1634:       ~enabled:t.config.server.enable_otel
1635:       ~emit_url_full:t.config.server.emit_url_full
1636:       handler request
1637:   with
1638:   | Eio.Cancel.Cancelled _ as exn -> raise exn
1639:   | exn -> Eta.Effect.fail (handler_failed_error t request exn)
1640: 
1641: let run_handler_body t ordinal request handler =
1642:   let rt = t.runtime_factory ~sw:t.sw ~connection:t.connection () in
1643:   let effect = safe_handler_effect t request handler in
1644:   let response =
1645:     match t.config.server.timeouts.handler_timeout with
1646:     | Some timeout -> (
1647:         match t.with_timeout timeout (fun () -> Eta.Runtime.run rt effect) with
1648:         | Eta.Exit.Ok response -> response
1649:         | Eta.Exit.Error cause -> fallback_error_response t request cause
1650:         | exception Eio.Time.Timeout ->
1651:             Server.Handler.default_error_response
1652:               (handler_timeout_error t request (Some timeout)))
1653:     | None -> (
1654:         match Eta.Runtime.run rt effect with
1655:         | Eta.Exit.Ok response -> response
1656:         | Eta.Exit.Error cause -> fallback_error_response t request cause)
1657:   in
1658:   let response, prepared =
1659:     match prepare_h2_response t request response with
1660:     | Ok prepared -> (response, Ok prepared)
1661:     | Error error ->
1662:         release_ignored_response_stream rt response;
1663:         let response = Server.Handler.default_error_response error in
1664:         (response, prepare_h2_response t request response)
1665:   in
1666:   match prepared with
1667:   | Error error -> ignore (enqueue t (Response_failed (ordinal, error)))
1668:   | Ok prepared -> (
1669:       match
1670:         await_owner t (fun resolver -> Response_start (ordinal, prepared, resolver))
1671:       with
1672:       | Error error ->
1673:           release_prepared_response_body rt prepared;
1674:           ignore (enqueue t (Response_failed (ordinal, error)))
1675:       | Ok () -> (
1676:           match prepared.body with
1677:           | Response_fixed (chunks, length) when length > max_h2_data_chunk ->
1678:               pump_response_stream t rt ordinal request response
1679:                 (fixed_response_stream chunks length) 0
1680:           | Response_no_body (Some stream) -> release_response_stream rt stream
1681:           | Response_no_body None | Response_fixed _ -> ()
1682:           | Response_stream stream ->
1683:               pump_response_stream t rt ordinal request response stream 0))
1684: 
1685: let run_handler t ordinal request handler =
1686:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw:t.sw (fun () ->
1687:       Eio.Fiber.first
1688:         (fun () -> run_handler_body t ordinal request handler)
1689:         (fun () -> Eio.Promise.await t.closed_signal))
1690: 
1691: let shutdown t policy =
1692:   if not t.closed then (
1693:     let queued = enqueue t (Shutdown policy) in
1694:     match policy with
1695:     | Types.Immediate when queued -> close_flow_all t.flow
1696:     | Immediate | Graceful _ -> ())
1697: 
1698: let run ~sw ~clock ?time ~flow ~connection ~config ~runtime_factory ?on_start
1699:     ?on_close handler =
1700:   validate_config config;
1701:   let time = Option.value time ~default:(Types.live_time clock) in
1702:   let h2_config = config.Types.Config.h2_config in
1703:   let request_ordinal = ref 0 in
1704:   let holder = ref None in
1705:   let h2 =
1706:     H2.Server_connection.create ~config:h2_config
1707:       ~error_handler:(fun ?request:_ _ respond ->
1708:         Option.iter record_protocol_error !holder;
1709:         let body = respond H2.Headers.empty in
1710:         H2.Body.Writer.close body)
1711:       (fun reqd ->
1712:         match !holder with
1713:         | None ->
1714:             H2.Reqd.report_exn reqd
1715:               (Failure "Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection owner not initialized")
1716:         | Some t ->
1717:             t.accepted_request <- true;
1718:             incr request_ordinal;
1719:             let ordinal = !request_ordinal in
1720:             let body = body_of_stream t ordinal in
1721:             let request = request_of_reqd ~connection ~ordinal ~body reqd in
1722:             let metrics =
1723:               request_metrics ~sw:t.sw ~config:t.config
1724:                 ~runtime_factory:t.runtime_factory ~connection:t.connection
1725:                 request
1726:             in
1727:             Option.iter Server_metrics.request_started metrics;
1728:             Option.iter Server_metrics.stream_started metrics;
1729:             Server_stats.H2.stream_opened t.stats;
1730:             Hashtbl.add t.streams ordinal
1731:               {
1732:                 reqd;
1733:                 request_body = H2.Reqd.request_body reqd;
1734:                 request_content_length =
1735:                   (match
1736:                      Server.Validation.h2_request_content_length
1737:                        (Eta_http.Core.Header.to_list request.headers)
1738:                    with
1739:                   | Ok content_length -> content_length
1740:                   | Error _ -> None);
1741:                 metrics;
1742:                 metrics_finished = false;
1743:                 request_body_bytes = 0;
1744:                 request_done = false;
1745:                 request_discarding = false;
1746:                 request_read_resolver = None;
1747:                 request_discard_resolver = None;
1748:                 request_discard_timeout_token = None;
1749:                 response_writer = None;
1750:                 response_write_resolver = None;
1751:                 response_done = false;
1752:               };
1753:             (match validate_request_metadata t request with
1754:             | Ok () -> run_handler t ordinal request handler
1755:             | Error error ->
1756:                 record_protocol_error t;
1757:                 let _promise, resolver = Eio.Promise.create () in
1758:                 let response = Server.Handler.default_error_response error in
1759:                 (match prepare_h2_response t request response with
1760:                 | Ok prepared ->
1761:                     ignore (start_response t ordinal prepared resolver)
1762:                 | Error error ->
1763:                     ignore (enqueue t (Response_failed (ordinal, error))))))
1764:   in
1765:   let security =
1766:     Eta_http.H2.Security.create
1767:       ?config:config.Types.Config.h2_security_config ()
1768:   in
1769:   let closed_signal, close_signal = Eio.Promise.create () in
1770:   let t =
1771:     let max_ingress_buffer_size = max_ingress_buffer_size config in
1772:     {
1773:       sw;
1774:       sleep = time.sleep;
1775:       with_timeout = time.with_timeout;
1776:       flow;
1777:       h2;
1778:       security;
1779:       security_preface_remaining = h2_client_connection_preface_length;
1780:       ingress_buffer = Bigstringaf.create max_ingress_buffer_size;
1781:       max_ingress_buffer_size;
1782:       ingress_off = 0;
1783:       ingress_len = 0;
1784:       filter_preface_remaining = h2_client_connection_preface_length;
1785:       filter_pending = "";
1786:       observed_request_ordinal = 0;
1787:       stream_ordinals = Hashtbl.create 16;
1788:       remote_reset_streams = Hashtbl.create 16;
1789:       remote_reset_ordinals = Hashtbl.create 16;
1790:       filter_rst_stream_seen = 0;
1791:       filter_error = None;
1792:       commands = Eio.Stream.create config.command_queue_capacity;
1793:       streams = Hashtbl.create (stream_table_initial_capacity h2_config);
1794:       connection;
1795:       config;
1796:       runtime_factory;
1797:       stats = Server_stats.H2.create ();
1798:       connection_metrics =
1799:         connection_metrics ~sw ~config ~runtime_factory ~connection;
1800:       closed_signal;
1801:       close_signal;
1802:       idle_timeout_token = None;
1803:       graceful_shutdown = false;
1804:       shutdown_timer_started = false;
1805:       accepted_request = false;
1806:       closed = false;
1807:     }
1808:   in
1809:   holder := Some t;
1810:   Option.iter
1811:     (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.active_connections metrics 1)
1812:     t.connection_metrics;
1813:   Option.iter (fun on_start -> on_start t) on_start;
1814:   Fun.protect
1815:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1816:       mark_closed t;
1817:       fail_active_streams t (shutdown_error t);
1818:       Option.iter
1819:         (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.active_connections metrics 0)
1820:         t.connection_metrics;
1821:       Option.iter
1822:         (fun metrics -> Server_metrics.shutdown_active metrics 0)
1823:         t.connection_metrics;
1824:       H2.Server_connection.shutdown h2;
1825:       close_flow_all flow;
1826:       Option.iter (fun on_close -> on_close (stats t)) on_close)
1827:     (fun () ->
1828:       Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () -> reader_loop t);
1829:       run_owner_loop t)
1830: 
1831: let run_h2c ~sw ~clock ?time ~flow ~peer ~config ~runtime_factory ?on_start
1832:     ?on_close handler =
1833:   let connection =
1834:     {
1835:       Types.Connection_info.id = connection_id ();
1836:       peer = peer_of_sockaddr peer;
1837:       protocol = Eta_http.Server.Error.H2c;
1838:       tls = false;
1839:       alpn_protocol = Some "h2c";
1840:     }
1841:   in
1842:   run ~sw ~clock ?time ~flow ~connection ~config ~runtime_factory ?on_start
1843:     ?on_close handler
````

## File: test/http/test_eta_http_h2_server.ml
````ocaml
   1: open Test_eta_http_support
   2: 
   3: type failing_server_flow_mode =
   4:   | Failing_read
   5:   | Failing_write
   6:   | Timeout_write of {
   7:       request_bytes : string;
   8:       timeout_writes : bool ref;
   9:     }
  10:   | Blocking_read of { request_bytes : string }
  11: 
  12: type failing_server_flow = {
  13:   mode : failing_server_flow_mode;
  14:   mutable shutdowns : int;
  15:   mutable closes : int;
  16:   mutable pending_read : string option;
  17:   read_release : unit Eio.Promise.u option;
  18:   read_block : unit Eio.Promise.t option;
  19: }
  20: 
  21: module Failing_server_flow = struct
  22:   type t = failing_server_flow
  23: 
  24:   let read_methods = []
  25: 
  26:   let read_string t dst data =
  27:     let len = min (String.length data) (Cstruct.length dst) in
  28:     Cstruct.blit_from_string data 0 dst 0 len;
  29:     if len < String.length data then
  30:       t.pending_read <- Some (String.sub data len (String.length data - len));
  31:     len
  32: 
  33:   let single_read t _dst =
  34:     match t.mode with
  35:     | Failing_read -> raise (Failure "server read boom")
  36:     | Failing_write | Timeout_write _ | Blocking_read _ -> (
  37:         match t.pending_read with
  38:         | Some data ->
  39:             t.pending_read <- None;
  40:             read_string t _dst data
  41:         | None -> (
  42:             match t.read_block with
  43:             | None -> raise End_of_file
  44:             | Some blocked ->
  45:                 Eio.Promise.await blocked;
  46:                 raise End_of_file))
  47: 
  48:   let single_write t bufs =
  49:     match t.mode with
  50:     | Failing_read -> Cstruct.lenv bufs
  51:     | Failing_write -> raise (Failure "server write boom")
  52:     | Timeout_write { timeout_writes; _ } ->
  53:         if !timeout_writes then raise Eio.Time.Timeout else Cstruct.lenv bufs
  54:     | Blocking_read _ -> Cstruct.lenv bufs
  55: 
  56:   let copy t ~src = Eio.Flow.Pi.simple_copy ~single_write t ~src
  57: 
  58:   let shutdown t _ =
  59:     t.shutdowns <- t.shutdowns + 1;
  60:     Option.iter (fun release -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve release ()))
  61:       t.read_release
  62: 
  63:   let close t =
  64:     t.closes <- t.closes + 1;
  65:     Option.iter (fun release -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve release ()))
  66:       t.read_release
  67: end
  68: 
  69: let failing_server_flow mode =
  70:   let pending_read =
  71:     match mode with
  72:     | Failing_read -> None
  73:     | Failing_write ->
  74:         let client = H2.Client_connection.create ~error_handler:(fun _ -> ()) () in
  75:         Some
  76:           (match H2.Client_connection.next_write_operation client with
  77:           | `Write iovecs -> Test_eta_http_h2_support.h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs
  78:           | `Yield -> Alcotest.fail "client preface unexpectedly yielded"
  79:           | `Close _ -> Alcotest.fail "client preface unexpectedly closed")
  80:     | Timeout_write { request_bytes; _ } -> Some request_bytes
  81:     | Blocking_read { request_bytes } ->
  82:         if String.equal request_bytes "" then None else Some request_bytes
  83:   in
  84:   let read_block, read_release =
  85:     match mode with
  86:     | Failing_read | Failing_write | Timeout_write _ -> (None, None)
  87:     | Blocking_read _ ->
  88:         let blocked, release = Eio.Promise.create () in
  89:         (Some blocked, Some release)
  90:   in
  91:   let state =
  92:     { mode; shutdowns = 0; closes = 0; pending_read; read_block; read_release }
  93:   in
  94:   let flow : Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.flow =
  95:     Eio.Resource.T
  96:       ( state,
  97:         Eio.Resource.handler
  98:           (Eio.Resource.H (Eio.Resource.Close, Failing_server_flow.close)
  99:           :: Eio.Resource.bindings
 100:                (Eio.Flow.Pi.two_way (module Failing_server_flow))) )
 101:   in
 102:   (state, flow)
 103: 
 104: let h2_client_request_bytes target =
 105:   let client =
 106:     H2.Client_connection.create
 107:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected client h2 error")
 108:       ()
 109:   in
 110:   let request =
 111:     H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 112:       ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 113:       `GET target
 114:   in
 115:   let request_body =
 116:     H2.Client_connection.request client request
 117:       ~error_handler:(fun _ -> Alcotest.fail "unexpected stream h2 error")
 118:       ~response_handler:(fun _ _ -> ())
 119:   in
 120:   H2.Body.Writer.close request_body;
 121:   let rec drain acc =
 122:     match H2.Client_connection.next_write_operation client with
 123:     | `Write iovecs ->
 124:         let data = Test_eta_http_h2_support.h2_iovecs_to_string iovecs in
 125:         H2.Client_connection.report_write_result client
 126:           (`Ok (String.length data));
 127:         drain (data :: acc)
 128:     | `Yield -> String.concat "" (List.rev acc)
 129:     | `Close _ ->
 130:         H2.Client_connection.report_write_result client `Closed;
 131:         String.concat "" (List.rev acc)
 132:   in
 133:   drain []
 134: 
 135: let hpack_header name value = { Hpack.name; value; sensitive = false }
 136: 
 137: let hpack_block encoder headers =
 138:   let faraday = Faraday.create 0x1000 in
 139:   List.iter (Hpack.Encoder.encode_header encoder faraday) headers;
 140:   Faraday.serialize_to_string faraday
 141: 
 142: let raw_h2_headers encoder ?(end_stream = false) ~stream_id headers =
 143:   let block = hpack_block encoder headers in
 144:   let flags = 0x4 lor (if end_stream then 0x1 else 0) in
 145:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:(String.length block) ~frame_type:Headers
 146:     ~flags ~stream_id
 147:   ^ block
 148: 
 149: let raw_h2_data ?(end_stream = false) ~stream_id data =
 150:   let flags = if end_stream then 0x1 else 0 in
 151:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:(String.length data) ~frame_type:Data ~flags
 152:     ~stream_id
 153:   ^ data
 154: 
 155: let raw_h2_rst_stream ~stream_id error_code =
 156:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:4 ~frame_type:Rst_stream ~flags:0
 157:     ~stream_id
 158:   ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.uint32 error_code
 159: 
 160: let hpack_literal_no_index ~name ~value =
 161:   let encode_int7 n =
 162:     if n < 128 then [ n ]
 163:     else
 164:       let rec loop n acc =
 165:         if n < 128 then n :: acc
 166:         else loop (n lsr 7) ((128 + (n land 127)) :: acc)
 167:       in
 168:       loop (n - 127) [ 127 ]
 169:   in
 170:   let name_bytes = Bytes.of_string name in
 171:   let value_bytes = Bytes.of_string value in
 172:   let name_len = encode_int7 (Bytes.length name_bytes) in
 173:   let value_len = encode_int7 (Bytes.length value_bytes) in
 174:   let total_len =
 175:     1 + List.length name_len + Bytes.length name_bytes
 176:     + List.length value_len + Bytes.length value_bytes
 177:   in
 178:   let buf = Bytes.create total_len in
 179:   Bytes.set buf 0 '\x00';
 180:   let offset = ref 1 in
 181:   List.iter
 182:     (fun b ->
 183:       Bytes.set buf !offset (Char.chr b);
 184:       incr offset)
 185:     name_len;
 186:   Bytes.blit name_bytes 0 buf !offset (Bytes.length name_bytes);
 187:   offset := !offset + Bytes.length name_bytes;
 188:   List.iter
 189:     (fun b ->
 190:       Bytes.set buf !offset (Char.chr b);
 191:       incr offset)
 192:     value_len;
 193:   Bytes.blit value_bytes 0 buf !offset (Bytes.length value_bytes);
 194:   Bytes.to_string buf
 195: 
 196: let malicious_h2_request_headers ?(end_stream = true) ~stream_id () =
 197:   let block =
 198:     String.concat ""
 199:       [
 200:         hpack_literal_no_index ~name:":method" ~value:"GET";
 201:         hpack_literal_no_index ~name:":scheme" ~value:"http";
 202:         hpack_literal_no_index ~name:":path" ~value:"/";
 203:         hpack_literal_no_index ~name:":authority" ~value:"example.test";
 204:       ]
 205:   in
 206:   let flags = 0x4 lor (if end_stream then 0x1 else 0) in
 207:   Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:(String.length block) ~frame_type:Headers
 208:     ~flags ~stream_id
 209:   ^ block
 210: 
 211: let raw_h2_has_frame ?stream_id frame_type bytes =
 212:   let target = Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type in
 213:   let len = String.length bytes in
 214:   let rec loop off =
 215:     if off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size > len then false
 216:     else
 217:       let envelope = Eta_http.H2.Frame.parse_header_string bytes ~off in
 218:       let next = off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size + envelope.length in
 219:       if next > len then false
 220:       else
 221:         (envelope.frame_type = target
 222:         &&
 223:         match stream_id with
 224:         | None -> true
 225:         | Some stream_id -> envelope.stream_id = stream_id)
 226:         || loop next
 227:   in
 228:   loop 0
 229: 
 230: let raw_h2_uint32_at bytes off =
 231:   (Char.code bytes.[off] lsl 24)
 232:   lor (Char.code bytes.[off + 1] lsl 16)
 233:   lor (Char.code bytes.[off + 2] lsl 8)
 234:   lor Char.code bytes.[off + 3]
 235: 
 236: let raw_h2_has_goaway_error error_code bytes =
 237:   let len = String.length bytes in
 238:   let rec loop off =
 239:     if off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size > len then false
 240:     else
 241:       let envelope = Eta_http.H2.Frame.parse_header_string bytes ~off in
 242:       let payload_off = off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size in
 243:       let next = payload_off + envelope.length in
 244:       if next > len then false
 245:       else
 246:         (envelope.frame_type = Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code Goaway
 247:         && envelope.stream_id = 0 && envelope.length >= 8
 248:         && raw_h2_uint32_at bytes (payload_off + 4) = error_code)
 249:         || loop next
 250:   in
 251:   loop 0
 252: 
 253: let raw_h2_count_frames ?stream_id frame_type bytes =
 254:   let target = Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type in
 255:   let len = String.length bytes in
 256:   let rec loop off count =
 257:     if off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size > len then count
 258:     else
 259:       let envelope = Eta_http.H2.Frame.parse_header_string bytes ~off in
 260:       let next = off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size + envelope.length in
 261:       if next > len then count
 262:       else
 263:         let count =
 264:           if
 265:             envelope.frame_type = target
 266:             &&
 267:             match stream_id with
 268:             | None -> true
 269:             | Some stream_id -> envelope.stream_id = stream_id
 270:           then count + 1
 271:           else count
 272:         in
 273:         loop next count
 274:   in
 275:   loop 0 0
 276: 
 277: let read_raw_until_h2_frame ~frame_type ?stream_id flow =
 278:   let buffer = Buffer.create 128 in
 279:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
 280:   let frame_summary bytes =
 281:     let len = String.length bytes in
 282:     let rec loop off acc =
 283:       if off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size > len then List.rev acc
 284:       else
 285:         let envelope = Eta_http.H2.Frame.parse_header_string bytes ~off in
 286:         let next = off + Eta_http.H2.Frame.header_size + envelope.length in
 287:         if next > len then List.rev acc
 288:         else
 289:           loop next
 290:             (Printf.sprintf "type=%d stream=%d len=%d" envelope.frame_type
 291:                envelope.stream_id envelope.length
 292:             :: acc)
 293:     in
 294:     String.concat "; " (loop 0 [])
 295:   in
 296:   let rec loop () =
 297:     let bytes = Buffer.contents buffer in
 298:     if raw_h2_has_frame ?stream_id frame_type bytes then bytes
 299:     else
 300:       match Eio.Flow.single_read flow scratch with
 301:       | 0 ->
 302:           Alcotest.failf
 303:             "connection closed before HTTP/2 frame type %d; received %d bytes: \
 304:              %s"
 305:             (Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type)
 306:             (String.length bytes) (frame_summary bytes)
 307:       | len ->
 308:           Buffer.add_string buffer (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len));
 309:           loop ()
 310:       | exception End_of_file ->
 311:           let bytes = Buffer.contents buffer in
 312:           Alcotest.failf
 313:             "connection ended before HTTP/2 frame type %d; received %d bytes: \
 314:              %s"
 315:             (Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type)
 316:             (String.length bytes) (frame_summary bytes)
 317:   in
 318:   loop ()
 319: 
 320: let read_raw_until_h2_frame_count ~frame_type ~count flow =
 321:   let buffer = Buffer.create 128 in
 322:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
 323:   let rec loop () =
 324:     let bytes = Buffer.contents buffer in
 325:     if raw_h2_count_frames frame_type bytes >= count then bytes
 326:     else
 327:       match Eio.Flow.single_read flow scratch with
 328:       | 0 ->
 329:           Alcotest.failf
 330:             "connection closed before %d HTTP/2 frames of type %d; received %d"
 331:             count
 332:             (Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type)
 333:             (String.length bytes)
 334:       | len ->
 335:           Buffer.add_string buffer (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len));
 336:           loop ()
 337:       | exception End_of_file ->
 338:           let bytes = Buffer.contents buffer in
 339:           Alcotest.failf
 340:             "connection ended before %d HTTP/2 frames of type %d; received %d"
 341:             count
 342:             (Eta_http.H2.Frame.frame_type_code frame_type)
 343:             (String.length bytes)
 344:   in
````
