 345:   loop ()
 346: 
 347: let h2_client_partial_request_bytes target body =
 348:   let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
 349:   "PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
 350:   ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
 351:   ^ raw_h2_headers encoder ~stream_id:1
 352:       [
 353:         hpack_header ":method" "POST";
 354:         hpack_header ":scheme" "http";
 355:         hpack_header ":path" target;
 356:         hpack_header ":authority" "127.0.0.1";
 357:       ]
 358:   ^ raw_h2_data ~stream_id:1 body
 359: 
 360: let tcp_port = function
 361:   | `Tcp (_, port) -> port
 362:   | `Unix _ -> Alcotest.fail "expected TCP listener"
 363: 
 364: let read_raw_until_close flow =
 365:   let buffer = Buffer.create 128 in
 366:   let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
 367:   let rec loop () =
 368:     match Eio.Flow.single_read flow scratch with
 369:     | 0 -> Buffer.contents buffer
 370:     | len ->
 371:         Buffer.add_string buffer (Cstruct.to_string (Cstruct.sub scratch 0 len));
 372:         loop ()
 373:     | exception End_of_file -> Buffer.contents buffer
 374:   in
 375:   loop ()
 376: 
 377: let pp_h2_client_error fmt = function
 378:   | `Malformed_response message ->
 379:       Format.fprintf fmt "malformed_response:%s" message
 380:   | `Invalid_response_body_length _ ->
 381:       Format.pp_print_string fmt "invalid_response_body_length"
 382:   | `Protocol_error (code, message) ->
 383:       Format.fprintf fmt "protocol_error:%a:%s" H2.Error_code.pp_hum code
 384:         message
 385:   | `Exn exn -> Format.fprintf fmt "exn:%s" (Printexc.to_string exn)
 386: 
 387: let await_h2_response ?(tag = 1) ?request_body ?headers_ref ?trailers_ref
 388:     connection request =
 389:   let status = ref None in
 390:   let body = Buffer.create 32 in
 391:   let eof, resolve_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
 392:   let rec read_body response_body =
 393:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
 394:       ~on_eof:(fun () -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_eof ()))
 395:       ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
 396:         Buffer.add_string body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
 397:         read_body response_body)
 398:   in
 399:   let trailers_handler =
 400:     Option.map
 401:       (fun trailers_ref trailers ->
 402:         trailers_ref := Some (H2.Headers.to_list trailers))
 403:       trailers_ref
 404:   in
 405:   match
 406:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag ?trailers_handler request
 407:       ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
 408:         Alcotest.failf "unexpected h2 stream error: %a"
 409:           pp_h2_client_error error)
 410:       ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
 411:         status := Some (H2.Status.to_code response.status);
 412:         Option.iter
 413:           (fun headers_ref -> headers_ref := Some (H2.Headers.to_list response.headers))
 414:           headers_ref;
 415:         read_body response_body)
 416:   with
 417:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
 418:       Alcotest.failf "request rejected by admission limit=%d" limit
 419:   | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
 420:       Alcotest.fail "connection closed before request"
 421:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
 422:       Alcotest.failf "request failed: %s" message
 423:   | Ok opened ->
 424:       (match request_body with
 425:       | None -> ()
 426:       | Some body -> H2.Body.Writer.write_string opened.request_body body);
 427:       H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body;
 428:       Eio.Promise.await eof;
 429:       (Option.value ~default:0 !status, Buffer.contents body)
 430: 
 431: let await_h2_response_outcome ?(tag = 1) ?request_body connection request =
 432:   let status = ref None in
 433:   let body = Buffer.create 32 in
 434:   let done_, resolve_done = Eio.Promise.create () in
 435:   let resolve_done_once outcome =
 436:     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_done outcome)
 437:   in
 438:   let rec read_body response_body =
 439:     H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
 440:       ~on_eof:(fun () ->
 441:         resolve_done_once
 442:           (`Eof (Option.value ~default:0 !status, Buffer.contents body)))
 443:       ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
 444:         Buffer.add_string body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
 445:         read_body response_body)
 446:   in
 447:   match
 448:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag request
 449:       ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
 450:         resolve_done_once
 451:           (`Error
 452:              ( Option.value ~default:0 !status,
 453:                Buffer.contents body,
 454:                error )))
 455:       ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
 456:         status := Some (H2.Status.to_code response.status);
 457:         read_body response_body)
 458:   with
 459:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
 460:       Alcotest.failf "request rejected by admission limit=%d" limit
 461:   | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
 462:       Alcotest.fail "connection closed before request"
 463:   | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
 464:       Alcotest.failf "request failed: %s" message
 465:   | Ok opened ->
 466:       Option.iter
 467:         (fun body -> H2.Body.Writer.write_string opened.request_body body)
 468:         request_body;
 469:       H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body;
 470:       Eio.Promise.await done_
 471: 
 472: let run_h2c_with_failing_flow mode =
 473:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 474:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 475:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 476:   let state, flow = failing_server_flow mode in
 477:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
 478:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
 479:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
 480:   in
 481:   let handler _request =
 482:     Alcotest.fail "failing flow should not reach the handler"
 483:   in
 484:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 485:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
 486:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
 487:         ~config:Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default ~runtime_factory
 488:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
 489:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
 490:         handler);
 491:   let stats = Eio.Promise.await closed_stats in
 492:   Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
 493:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
 494: 
 495: let test_h2c_server_read_exception_closes_typed () =
 496:   run_h2c_with_failing_flow Failing_read
 497: 
 498: let test_h2c_server_write_exception_closes_typed () =
 499:   run_h2c_with_failing_flow Failing_write
 500: 
 501: let test_h2c_server_response_write_timeout_is_typed () =
 502:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 503:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 504:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 505:   let timeout_writes = ref false in
 506:   let state, flow =
 507:     failing_server_flow
 508:       (Timeout_write
 509:          {
 510:            request_bytes = h2_client_request_bytes "/response-timeout";
 511:            timeout_writes;
 512:          })
 513:   in
 514:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
 515:   let release_seen, resolve_release_seen = Eio.Promise.create () in
 516:   let released = ref 0 in
 517:   let server_timeouts =
 518:     {
 519:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
 520:       response_write_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 1);
 521:     }
 522:   in
 523:   let server_config =
 524:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts = server_timeouts }
 525:   in
 526:   let config =
 527:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
 528:   in
 529:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
 530:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
 531:   in
 532:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 533:     Alcotest.(check string) "path" "/response-timeout" request.path;
 534:     let sent = ref false in
 535:     let body =
 536:       Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream
 537:         ~release:(fun () ->
 538:           Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 539:               incr released;
 540:               ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_release_seen ())))
 541:         (fun () ->
 542:           if !sent then Eta.Effect.pure None
 543:           else (
 544:             sent := true;
 545:             timeout_writes := true;
 546:             Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.of_string "blocked"))))
 547:     in
 548:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
 549:   in
 550:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 551:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
 552:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
 553:         ~config ~runtime_factory
 554:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
 555:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
 556:         handler);
 557:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 558:       Eio.Promise.await release_seen);
 559:   let stats = Eio.Promise.await closed_stats in
 560:   Alcotest.(check bool) "timeout armed" true !timeout_writes;
 561:   Alcotest.(check int) "released stream" 1 !released;
 562:   Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
 563:   Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 0 stats.completed_streams;
 564:   Alcotest.(check int) "reset streams" 1 stats.reset_streams;
 565:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
 566: 
 567: let test_h2c_server_handler_timeout () =
 568:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 569:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 570:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 571:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 572:   let socket =
 573:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
 574:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 575:   in
 576:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 577:   let timeouts =
 578:     {
 579:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
 580:       handler_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 20);
 581:     }
 582:   in
 583:   let server_config = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts } in
 584:   let config =
 585:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
 586:   in
 587:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
 588:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 589:     incr handler_calls;
 590:     Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 591:         Eio.Time.sleep clock 1.0;
 592:         Eta_http.Server.Response.text "late\n")
 593:   in
 594:   let server =
 595:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket handler
 596:   in
 597:   let flow =
 598:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 599:   in
 600:   let connection =
 601:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 602:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 603:       ()
 604:   in
 605:   Fun.protect
 606:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 607:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
 608:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
 609:     (fun () ->
 610:       let request =
 611:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 612:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 613:           `GET "/slow-handler"
 614:       in
 615:       let status, body =
 616:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 617:             await_h2_response connection request)
 618:       in
 619:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 503 status;
 620:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "service unavailable\n" body;
 621:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 1 !handler_calls)
 622: 
 623: let test_h2c_server_response_body_timeout_resets_stream () =
 624:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 625:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 626:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 627:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 628:   let socket =
 629:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
 630:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 631:   in
 632:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 633:   let timeouts =
 634:     {
 635:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
 636:       response_body_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 20);
 637:     }
 638:   in
 639:   let server_config = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts } in
 640:   let config =
 641:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
 642:   in
 643:   let released, resolve_released = Eio.Promise.create () in
 644:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 645:     match request.path with
 646:     | "/slow-response-body" ->
 647:         let body =
 648:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream
 649:             ~release:(fun () ->
 650:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 651:                   ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_released ())))
 652:             (fun () ->
 653:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 654:                   Eio.Time.sleep clock 1.0;
 655:                   Some (Bytes.of_string "late")))
 656:         in
 657:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
 658:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
 659:   in
 660:   let server =
 661:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket handler
 662:   in
 663:   let flow =
 664:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 665:   in
 666:   let connection =
 667:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 668:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 669:       ()
 670:   in
 671:   Fun.protect
 672:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 673:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
 674:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
 675:     (fun () ->
 676:       let slow =
 677:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 678:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 679:           `GET "/slow-response-body"
 680:       in
 681:       let outcome =
 682:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 683:             await_h2_response_outcome connection slow)
 684:       in
 685:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 686:           Eio.Promise.await released);
 687:       (match outcome with
 688:       | `Error (status, body, _error) ->
 689:           Alcotest.(check int) "partial status" 200 status;
 690:           Alcotest.(check string) "partial body" "" body
 691:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
 692:           Alcotest.failf
 693:             "expected stream reset after response body timeout, got EOF \
 694:              status=%d body=%S"
 695:             status body);
 696:       let ok =
 697:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 698:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 699:           `GET "/ok"
 700:       in
 701:       let status, body =
 702:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 703:             await_h2_response ~tag:2 connection ok)
 704:       in
 705:       Alcotest.(check int) "connection reusable status" 200 status;
 706:       Alcotest.(check string) "connection reusable body" "ok\n" body)
 707: 
 708: let test_h2c_server_enforces_max_concurrent_streams () =
 709:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 710:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 711:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 712:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 713:   let socket =
 714:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
 715:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 716:   in
 717:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 718:   let config =
 719:     {
 720:       Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
 721:       h2_config =
 722:         {
 723:           Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default.h2_config with
 724:           max_concurrent_streams = 1l;
 725:         };
 726:     }
 727:   in
 728:   let release_first, resolve_release_first = Eio.Promise.create () in
 729:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 730:     match request.path with
 731:     | "/hold" ->
 732:         let body =
 733:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream (fun () ->
 734:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
 735:                   Eio.Promise.await release_first;
 736:                   None))
 737:         in
 738:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
 739:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
 740:   in
 741:   let server =
 742:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket handler
 743:   in
 744:   let flow =
 745:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 746:   in
 747:   let connection =
 748:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 749:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 750:       ()
 751:   in
 752:   Fun.protect
 753:     ~finally:(fun () ->
 754:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_release_first ());
 755:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
 756:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
 757:     (fun () ->
 758:       let first_response, resolve_first_response = Eio.Promise.create () in
 759:       let first_eof, resolve_first_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
 760:       let first_body = ref None in
 761:       let first =
 762:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 763:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 764:           `GET "/hold"
 765:       in
 766:       (match
 767:          Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag:1 first
 768:            ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
 769:              Alcotest.failf "first stream failed: %a" pp_h2_client_error error)
 770:            ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
 771:              first_body := Some response_body;
 772:              ignore
 773:                (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_first_response
 774:                   (H2.Status.to_code response.status)))
 775:        with
 776:       | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
 777:           Alcotest.failf "first request rejected by admission limit=%d" limit
 778:       | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
 779:           Alcotest.fail "connection closed before first request"
 780:       | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
 781:           Alcotest.failf "first request failed: %s" message
 782:       | Ok opened -> H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body);
 783:       let first_status =
 784:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 785:             Eio.Promise.await first_response)
 786:       in
 787:       Alcotest.(check int) "first status" 200 first_status;
 788:       let second =
 789:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 790:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 791:           `GET "/second"
 792:       in
 793:       let second_outcome =
 794:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 795:             await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:2 connection second)
 796:       in
 797:       (match second_outcome with
 798:       | `Error (_status, _body, _error) -> ()
 799:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
 800:           Alcotest.failf
 801:             "expected max concurrent stream reset, got EOF status=%d body=%S"
 802:             status body);
 803:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_release_first ());
 804:       let rec read_first_body response_body =
 805:         H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
 806:           ~on_eof:(fun () ->
 807:             ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_first_eof ()))
 808:           ~on_read:(fun _bs ~off:_ ~len:_ -> read_first_body response_body)
 809:       in
 810:       (match !first_body with
 811:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "first response body missing"
 812:       | Some response_body -> read_first_body response_body);
 813:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 814:           Eio.Promise.await first_eof))
 815: 
 816: let test_h2c_server_fixed_response_and_echo_body () =
 817:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
 818:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
 819:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
 820:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
 821:   let socket =
 822:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
 823:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
 824:   in
 825:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
 826:   let seen_request, resolve_seen_request = Eio.Promise.create () in
 827:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
 828:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
 829:   let on_connection_close stats =
 830:     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
 831:   in
 832:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
 833:     ignore
 834:       (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_seen_request
 835:          ( request.method_,
 836:            request.path,
 837:            request.query,
 838:            request.scheme,
 839:            request.authority,
 840:            request.tls,
 841:            request.alpn_protocol,
 842:            request.connection_id ));
 843:     match request.path with
 844:     | "/echo" ->
 845:         Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
 846:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
 847:                Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
 848:                  ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
 849:                  ())
 850:     | "/early" ->
 851:         Eta.Effect.pure
 852:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("early:" ^ request.path ^ "\n"))
 853:     | "/stream" ->
 854:         let chunks =
 855:           ref
 856:             [
 857:               Bytes.of_string "one";
 858:               Bytes.of_string "-";
 859:               Bytes.of_string "two";
 860:             ]
 861:         in
 862:         let body =
 863:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream (fun () ->
 864:               match !chunks with
 865:               | [] -> Eta.Effect.pure None
 866:               | chunk :: rest ->
 867:                   chunks := rest;
 868:                   Eta.Effect.pure (Some chunk))
 869:         in
 870:         Eta.Effect.pure
 871:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
 872:              ~headers:[ ("content-type", "text/plain") ]
 873:              ~trailers:(fun () ->
 874:                Eta.Effect.pure [ ("grpc-status", "0"); ("x-done", "yes") ])
 875:              ~body ())
 876:     | "/large-fixed" ->
 877:         Eta.Effect.pure
 878:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
 879:              ~body:
 880:                (Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed
 881:                   [ Bytes.make (64 * 1024) 'z' ])
 882:              ())
 883:     | "/reset-content" ->
 884:         Eta.Effect.pure
 885:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:205 "must-not-write")
 886:     | _ ->
 887:         Eta.Effect.pure
 888:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path ^ "\n"))
 889:   in
 890:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
 891:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
 892:         ~on_connection_close ~socket handler);
 893:   let flow =
 894:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
 895:   in
 896:   let connection =
 897:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
 898:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
 899:       ()
 900:   in
 901:   Fun.protect
 902:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
 903:     (fun () ->
 904:       let request =
 905:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 906:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 907:           `GET "/healthz?token=secret"
 908:       in
 909:       let status, body = await_h2_response connection request in
 910:       let method_, path, query, scheme, authority, tls, alpn_protocol,
 911:           connection_id =
 912:         Eio.Promise.await seen_request
 913:       in
 914:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
 915:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "ok:/healthz\n" body;
 916:       Alcotest.(check string) "method" "GET" method_;
 917:       Alcotest.(check string) "path" "/healthz" path;
 918:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "query" (Some "token=secret") query;
 919:       Alcotest.(check string) "scheme" "http" scheme;
 920:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "authority" (Some "127.0.0.1") authority;
 921:       Alcotest.(check bool) "tls" false tls;
 922:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "alpn protocol" (Some "h2c")
 923:         alpn_protocol;
 924:       Alcotest.(check bool) "connection id prefix" true
 925:         (String.starts_with ~prefix:"h2c-" connection_id);
 926:       let echo =
 927:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 928:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 929:           `POST "/echo"
 930:       in
 931:       let echo_status, echo_body =
 932:         await_h2_response ~tag:2 ~request_body:"hello-post" connection echo
 933:       in
 934:       Alcotest.(check int) "echo status" 200 echo_status;
 935:       Alcotest.(check string) "echo body" "hello-post" echo_body;
 936:       let early =
 937:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 938:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 939:           `POST "/early"
 940:       in
 941:       let early_status, early_body =
 942:         await_h2_response ~tag:3 ~request_body:"unread upload" connection early
 943:       in
 944:       Alcotest.(check int) "early status" 200 early_status;
 945:       Alcotest.(check string) "early body" "early:/early\n" early_body;
 946:       let stream_headers = ref None in
 947:       let trailers = ref None in
 948:       let stream_request =
 949:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 950:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 951:           `GET "/stream"
 952:       in
 953:       let stream_status, stream_body =
 954:         await_h2_response ~tag:4 ~headers_ref:stream_headers
 955:           ~trailers_ref:trailers connection stream_request
 956:       in
 957:       Alcotest.(check int) "stream status" 200 stream_status;
 958:       Alcotest.(check string) "stream body" "one-two" stream_body;
 959:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "content-type" (Some "text/plain")
 960:         (Option.bind !stream_headers (List.assoc_opt "content-type"));
 961:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "grpc-status" (Some "0")
 962:         (Option.bind !trailers (List.assoc_opt "grpc-status"));
 963:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "x-done" (Some "yes")
 964:         (Option.bind !trailers (List.assoc_opt "x-done"));
 965:       let large_fixed =
 966:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 967:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 968:           `GET "/large-fixed"
 969:       in
 970:       let large_status, large_body =
 971:         await_h2_response ~tag:5 connection large_fixed
 972:       in
 973:       Alcotest.(check int) "large fixed status" 200 large_status;
 974:       Alcotest.(check int) "large fixed length" (64 * 1024)
 975:         (String.length large_body);
 976:       let reset_content =
 977:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
 978:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
 979:           `GET "/reset-content"
 980:       in
 981:       let reset_status, reset_body =
 982:         await_h2_response ~tag:6 connection reset_content
 983:       in
 984:       Alcotest.(check int) "reset content status" 205 reset_status;
 985:       Alcotest.(check string) "reset content body" "" reset_body;
 986:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
 987:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
 988:       let stats =
 989:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
 990:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
 991:       in
 992:       Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
 993:       Alcotest.(check int) "opened streams" 6 stats.opened_streams;
 994:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 6 stats.completed_streams;
 995:       Alcotest.(check int) "reset streams" 0 stats.reset_streams;
 996:       Alcotest.(check int) "request bytes" 10 stats.request_bytes;
 997:       Alcotest.(check int) "protocol errors" 0 stats.protocol_errors;
 998:       Alcotest.(check bool) "response bytes recorded" true
 999:         (stats.response_bytes > 0))
1000: 
1001: let test_h2c_server_rejects_invalid_request_metadata () =
1002:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1003:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1004:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1005:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1006:   let socket =
1007:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1008:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1009:   in
1010:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1011:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1012:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1013:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1014:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1015:     incr handler_calls;
1016:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path ^ "\n"))
1017:   in
1018:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1019:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
1020:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
1021:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1022:         ~socket handler);
1023:   let flow =
1024:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1025:   in
1026:   let connection =
1027:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1028:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1029:       ()
1030:   in
1031:   Fun.protect
1032:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1033:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1034:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1035:     (fun () ->
1036:       let bad_path =
1037:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1038:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1039:           `GET "noslash"
1040:       in
1041:       let missing_authority =
1042:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http" ~headers:H2.Headers.empty `GET
1043:           "/missing-authority"
1044:       in
1045:       let scheme_mismatch =
1046:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
1047:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1048:           `GET "/scheme-mismatch"
1049:       in
1050:       List.iteri
1051:         (fun index request ->
1052:           let status, body =
1053:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1054:                 await_h2_response ~tag:(index + 1) connection request)
1055:           in
1056:           Alcotest.(check int) "invalid status" 400 status;
1057:           Alcotest.(check string) "invalid body" "bad request\n" body)
1058:         [ bad_path; missing_authority; scheme_mismatch ];
1059:       let valid =
1060:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1061:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1062:           `GET "/valid"
1063:       in
1064:       let status, body =
1065:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1066:             await_h2_response ~tag:4 connection valid)
1067:       in
1068:       Alcotest.(check int) "valid status" 200 status;
1069:       Alcotest.(check string) "valid body" "ok:/valid\n" body;
1070:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 1 !handler_calls;
1071:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1072:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
1073:       let stats =
1074:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1075:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1076:       in
1077:       Alcotest.(check int) "protocol errors" 3 stats.protocol_errors)
1078: 
1079: let test_h2c_server_rejects_request_header_limit () =
1080:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1081:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1082:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1083:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1084:   let socket =
1085:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1086:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1087:   in
1088:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1089:   let server_limits =
1090:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits with max_request_headers = 1 }
1091:   in
1092:   let server_config =
1093:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with limits = server_limits }
1094:   in
1095:   let config =
1096:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1097:   in
1098:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1099:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1100:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1101:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1102:     incr handler_calls;
1103:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1104:   in
1105:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1106:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
1107:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
1108:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1109:         ~config ~socket handler);
1110:   let flow =
1111:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1112:   in
1113:   let connection =
1114:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1115:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1116:       ()
1117:   in
1118:   Fun.protect
1119:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1120:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1121:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1122:     (fun () ->
1123:       let request =
1124:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1125:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1126:           `GET "/too-many-request-headers"
1127:       in
1128:       let status, body =
1129:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1130:             await_h2_response connection request)
1131:       in
1132:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 400 status;
1133:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "bad request\n" body;
1134:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 0 !handler_calls;
1135:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1136:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
1137:       let stats =
1138:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1139:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1140:       in
1141:       Alcotest.(check int) "protocol errors" 1 stats.protocol_errors)
1142:

1162:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->

1170:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1171:       ()
1172:   in
1173:   Fun.protect
1174:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1175:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1176:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1177:     (fun () ->
1178:       let request =
1179:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1180:           ~headers:
1181:             (H2.Headers.of_list
1182:                [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "bad name", "value" ])
1183:           `GET "/bad-header"
1184:       in

1187:             await_h2_response connection request)

1200: let test_h2c_server_rejects_connection_specific_request_headers () =
1201:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1202:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1203:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1204:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1205:   let socket =
1206:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1207:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1208:   in
1209:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1210:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1211:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1212:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1213:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1214:     incr handler_calls;
1215:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text ("ok:" ^ request.path ^ "\n"))
1216:   in
1217:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1218:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
1219:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
1220:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1221:         ~socket handler);
1222:   let flow =
1223:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1224:   in
1225:   let connection =
1226:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1227:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1228:       ()
1229:   in
1230:   Fun.protect
1231:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1232:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1233:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1234:     (fun () ->
1235:       let invalid =
1236:         [
1237:           [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "connection", "close" ];
1238:           [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "te", "gzip" ];
1239:           [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "transfer-encoding", "chunked" ];
1240:           [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "upgrade", "websocket" ];
1241:         ]
1242:       in
1243:       List.iteri
1244:         (fun index headers ->
1245:           let request =
1246:             H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1247:               ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list headers)
1248:               `GET ("/invalid-h2-header-" ^ string_of_int index)
1249:           in
1250:           let outcome =
1251:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1252:                 await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:(index + 1) connection request)
1253:           in
1254:           match outcome with
1255:           | `Eof (status, body) ->
1256:               Alcotest.(check int) "invalid status" 400 status;
1257:               Alcotest.(check string) "invalid body" "bad request\n" body
1258:           | `Error (status, _body, _error) ->
1259:               Alcotest.(check bool) "stream rejected" true
1260:                 (status = 0 || status = 400))
1261:         invalid;
1262:       let valid =
1263:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1264:           ~headers:
1265:             (H2.Headers.of_list
1266:                [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "te", "trailers" ])
1267:           `GET "/valid-te"
1268:       in
1269:       let status, body =
1270:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1271:             await_h2_response ~tag:5 connection valid)
1272:       in
1273:       Alcotest.(check int) "valid status" 200 status;
1274:       Alcotest.(check string) "valid body" "ok:/valid-te\n" body;
1275:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 1 !handler_calls;
1276:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1277:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
1278:       let stats =
1279:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1280:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1281:       in
1282:       Alcotest.(check int) "protocol errors" 4 stats.protocol_errors)
1283: 
1284: let test_h2c_server_rejects_invalid_content_length_header () =
1285:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1286:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1287:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1288:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1289:   let socket =
1290:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1291:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1292:   in
1293:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1294:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1295:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1296:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1297:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1298:     incr handler_calls;
1299:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
1300:   in
1301:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1302:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
1303:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
1304:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1305:         ~socket handler);
1306:   let flow =
1307:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1308:   in
1309:   let connection =
1310:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1311:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1312:       ()
1313:   in
1314:   Fun.protect
1315:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1316:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1317:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1318:     (fun () ->
1319:       let invalid =
1320:         [
1321:           [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "content-length", "abc" ];
1322:           [
1323:             ":authority", "127.0.0.1";
1324:             "content-length", "1";
1325:             "content-length", "1";
1326:           ];
1327:         ]
1328:       in
1329:       List.iteri
1330:         (fun index headers ->
1331:           let request =
1332:             H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1333:               ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list headers)
1334:               `POST ("/invalid-content-length-" ^ string_of_int index)
1335:           in
1336:           let outcome =
1337:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1338:                 await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:(index + 1) connection request)
1339:           in
1340:           match outcome with
1341:           | `Eof (status, body) ->
1342:               Alcotest.(check int) "invalid status" 400 status;
1343:               Alcotest.(check string) "invalid body" "bad request\n" body
1344:           | `Error (status, _body, _error) ->
1345:               Alcotest.(check bool) "stream rejected" true
1346:                 (status = 0 || status = 400))
1347:         invalid;
1348:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 0 !handler_calls;
1349:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1350:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
1351:       let stats =
1352:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1353:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1354:       in
1355:       Alcotest.(check bool) "protocol errors" true
1356:         (stats.protocol_errors >= 2))
1357: 
1358: let test_h2c_server_rejects_content_length_mismatch () =
1359:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1360:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1361:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1362:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1363:   let socket =
1364:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1365:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1366:   in
1367:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1368:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1369:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1370:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1371:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1372:     incr handler_calls;
1373:     Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
1374:     |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
1375:            Eta_http.Server.Response.text
1376:              (string_of_int (Bytes.length body) ^ "\n"))
1377:   in
1378:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1379:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop
1380:         ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
1381:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1382:         ~socket handler);
1383:   let flow =
1384:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1385:   in
1386:   let connection =
1387:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1388:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1389:       ()
1390:   in
1391:   Fun.protect
1392:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1393:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1394:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1395:     (fun () ->
1396:       let valid =
1397:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1398:           ~headers:
1399:             (H2.Headers.of_list
1400:                [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "content-length", "4" ])
1401:           `POST "/exact"
1402:       in
1403:       let status, body =
1404:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1405:             await_h2_response ~tag:1 ~request_body:"okay" connection valid)
1406:       in
1407:       Alcotest.(check int) "valid status" 200 status;
1408:       Alcotest.(check string) "valid body" "4\n" body;
1409:       let invalid =
1410:         [
1411:           ("underflow", "5", "abc");
1412:           ("overflow", "3", "abcd");
1413:         ]
1414:       in
1415:       List.iteri
1416:         (fun index (name, declared, body) ->
1417:           let request =
1418:             H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1419:               ~headers:
1420:                 (H2.Headers.of_list
1421:                    [
1422:                      ":authority", "127.0.0.1";
1423:                      "content-length", declared;
1424:                    ])
1425:               `POST ("/" ^ name)
1426:           in
1427:           let outcome =
1428:             Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1429:                 await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:(index + 2)
1430:                   ~request_body:body connection request)
1431:           in
1432:           match outcome with
1433:           | `Eof (status, response_body) ->
1434:               Alcotest.(check int) (name ^ " status") 400 status;
1435:               Alcotest.(check bool) (name ^ " rejected body") true
1436:                 (String.equal response_body "bad request\n"
1437:                 || String.equal response_body "")
1438:           | `Error (status, _body, _error) ->
1439:               Alcotest.(check bool) (name ^ " stream rejected") true
1440:                 (status = 0 || status = 400))
1441:         invalid;
1442:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 3 !handler_calls;
1443:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1444:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
1445:       let stats =
1446:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1447:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1448:       in
1449:       Alcotest.(check bool) "protocol errors" true
1450:         (stats.protocol_errors >= 2))
1451: 
1452: let test_h2c_server_rejects_response_header_limit () =
1453:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1454:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1455:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1456:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1457:   let socket =
1458:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1459:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1460:   in
1461:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1462:   let server_limits =
1463:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits with max_response_headers = 1 }
1464:   in
1465:   let server_config =
1466:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with limits = server_limits }
1467:   in
1468:   let config =
1469:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1470:   in
1471:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1472:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1473:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1474:     incr handler_calls;
1475:     Eta.Effect.pure
1476:       (Eta_http.Server.Response.text
1477:          ~headers:[ ("X-One", "1"); ("X-Two", "2") ]
1478:          "too many headers\n")
1479:   in
1480:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1481:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~config ~socket
1482:         handler);
1483:   let flow =
1484:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1485:   in
1486:   let connection =
1487:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1488:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1489:       ()
1490:   in
1491:   Fun.protect
1492:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1493:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1494:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1495:     (fun () ->
1496:       let request =
1497:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1498:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1499:           `GET "/too-many-response-headers"
1500:       in
1501:       let status, body =
1502:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1503:             await_h2_response connection request)
1504:       in
1505:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 500 status;
1506:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "internal server error\n" body;
1507:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 1 !handler_calls)
1508: 
1509: let test_h2c_server_rejects_connection_specific_response_header () =
1510:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1511:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1512:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1513:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1514:   let socket =
1515:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1516:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1517:   in
1518:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1519:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1520:   let handler_calls = ref 0 in
1521:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1522:     incr handler_calls;
1523:     Eta.Effect.pure
1524:       (Eta_http.Server.Response.text
1525:          ~headers:[ ("Connection", "close") ]
1526:          "invalid h2 header\n")
1527:   in
1528:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1529:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
1530:   let flow =
1531:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1532:   in
1533:   let connection =
1534:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1535:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1536:       ()
1537:   in
1538:   Fun.protect
1539:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1540:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1541:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1542:     (fun () ->
1543:       let request =
1544:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1545:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1546:           `GET "/bad-response-header"
1547:       in
1548:       let status, body =
1549:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1550:             await_h2_response connection request)
1551:       in
1552:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 500 status;
1553:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "internal server error\n" body;
1554:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler calls" 1 !handler_calls)
1555: 
1556: let expect_validation_error label = function
1557:   | Error _ -> ()
1558:   | Ok () -> Alcotest.failf "%s: validation unexpectedly succeeded" label
1559: 
1560: let expect_validation_ok label = function
1561:   | Ok () -> ()
1562:   | Error message -> Alcotest.failf "%s: validation failed: %s" label message
1563: 
1564: let test_h2_request_validation_allows_te_trailers () =
1565:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1566:   expect_validation_ok "H2 request TE trailers"
1567:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1568:        [
1569:          (":method", "GET");
1570:          (":scheme", "http");
1571:          (":authority", "127.0.0.1");
1572:          (":path", "/");
1573:          ("te", "trailers");
1574:        ])
1575: 
1576: let test_h2_request_rejects_invalid_method_and_path_values () =
1577:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1578:   expect_validation_error "invalid :method in request metadata"
1579:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request
1580:        ~connection_scheme:Eta_http.Core.Url.Https ~method_:"BAD METHOD"
1581:        ~scheme:"https" ~target:"/" ~authority:(Some "example.test"));
1582:   expect_validation_error "space in :path request metadata"
1583:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request
1584:        ~connection_scheme:Eta_http.Core.Url.Https ~method_:"GET"
1585:        ~scheme:"https" ~target:"/bad path" ~authority:(Some "example.test"));
1586:   expect_validation_error "invalid :method in header block"
1587:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1588:        [
1589:          (":method", "BAD METHOD");
1590:          (":scheme", "https");
1591:          (":authority", "example.test");
1592:          (":path", "/");
1593:        ]);
1594:   expect_validation_error "space in :path header block"
1595:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1596:        [
1597:          (":method", "GET");
1598:          (":scheme", "https");
1599:          (":authority", "example.test");
1600:          (":path", "/bad path");
1601:        ])
1602: 
1603: let test_h2_request_headers_require_mandatory_pseudo_headers () =
1604:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1605:   let base =
1606:     [
1607:       (":method", "GET");
1608:       (":scheme", "https");
1609:       (":authority", "example.test");
1610:       (":path", "/");
1611:     ]
1612:   in
1613:   let cases =
1614:     [
1615:       ("missing :method", List.remove_assoc ":method" base);
1616:       ("missing :scheme", List.remove_assoc ":scheme" base);
1617:       ("missing :authority", List.remove_assoc ":authority" base);
1618:       ("missing :path", List.remove_assoc ":path" base);
1619:     ]
1620:   in
1621:   List.iter
1622:     (fun (label, headers) ->
1623:       expect_validation_error label
1624:         (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1625:            headers))
1626:     cases
1627: 
1628: let test_h2_request_headers_reject_host_authority_conflict () =
1629:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1630:   expect_validation_error "conflicting host"
1631:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1632:        [
1633:          (":method", "GET");
1634:          (":scheme", "https");
1635:          (":authority", "api.example.test");
1636:          (":path", "/");
1637:          ("host", "attacker.example.test");
1638:        ]);
1639:   expect_validation_ok "matching host"
1640:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1641:        [
1642:          (":method", "GET");
1643:          (":scheme", "https");
1644:          (":authority", "api.example.test");
1645:          (":path", "/");
1646:          ("host", "api.example.test");
1647:        ]);
1648:   expect_validation_ok "matching host default port"
1649:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1650:        [
1651:          (":method", "GET");
1652:          (":scheme", "https");
1653:          (":authority", "api.example.test");
1654:          (":path", "/");
1655:          ("host", "api.example.test:443");
1656:        ]);
1657:   expect_validation_error "duplicate host"
1658:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request_headers ~limits
1659:        [
1660:          (":method", "GET");
1661:          (":scheme", "https");
1662:          (":authority", "api.example.test");
1663:          (":path", "/");
1664:          ("host", "api.example.test");
1665:          ("host", "api.example.test");
1666:        ])
1667: 
1668: let test_server_authority_rejects_invalid_ip_literals () =
1669:   expect_validation_error "H1 Host invalid IP literal"
1670:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h1_authority
1671:        ~connection_scheme:Eta_http.Core.Url.Http
1672:        ~version:Eta_http.Core.Version.H1_1 ~method_:"GET" ~target:"/"
1673:        ~target_authority:None ~headers:[ ("Host", "[not-an-ip]") ]);
1674:   expect_validation_error "H2 :authority invalid IP literal"
1675:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_request
1676:        ~connection_scheme:Eta_http.Core.Url.Https ~method_:"GET"
1677:        ~scheme:"https" ~target:"/" ~authority:(Some "[not-an-ip]"))
1678: 
1679: let test_h2_response_validation_rejects_te_header () =
1680:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1681:   expect_validation_error "H2 response TE"
1682:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_headers ~limits
1683:        (Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_of_list [ ("te", "trailers") ]))
1684: 
1685: let test_h2_response_validation_rejects_uppercase_header_names () =
1686:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1687:   expect_validation_error "uppercase response header"
1688:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_headers ~limits
1689:        (Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_of_list [ ("X-Foo", "bar") ]));
1690:   expect_validation_error "uppercase response trailer"
1691:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_trailers ~limits
1692:        (Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_of_list [ ("X-Trailer", "bar") ]))
1693: 
1694: let test_h2_response_trailers_reject_content_length () =
1695:   let limits = Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits in
1696:   expect_validation_error "H2 response trailer Content-Length"
1697:     (Eta_http.Server.Validation.validate_h2_response_trailers ~limits
1698:        (Eta_http.Core.Header.unsafe_of_list [ ("content-length", "0") ]))
1699: 
1700: let test_h2c_server_rejects_connection_specific_response_trailer () =
1701:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1702:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1703:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1704:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1705:   let socket =
1706:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
1707:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1708:   in
1709:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1710:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
1711:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1712:     let sent = ref false in
1713:     let body =
1714:       Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream (fun () ->
1715:           if !sent then Eta.Effect.pure None
1716:           else (
1717:             sent := true;
1718:             Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.of_string "body"))))
1719:     in
1720:     Eta.Effect.pure
1721:       (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body
1722:          ~trailers:(fun () -> Eta.Effect.pure [ ("Connection", "close") ])
1723:          ())
1724:   in
1725:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1726:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
1727:   let flow =
1728:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1729:   in
1730:   let connection =
1731:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1732:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1733:       ()
1734:   in
1735:   Fun.protect
1736:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1737:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1738:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
1739:     (fun () ->
1740:       let request =
1741:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1742:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
1743:           `GET "/bad-response-trailer"
1744:       in
1745:       let outcome =
1746:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1747:             await_h2_response_outcome connection request)
1748:       in
1749:       match outcome with
1750:       | `Error (status, _body, _error) ->
1751:           Alcotest.(check int) "status before reset" 200 status
1752:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
1753:           Alcotest.failf
1754:             "expected stream reset after invalid trailer, got EOF status=%d \
1755:              body=%S"
1756:             status body)
1757: 
1758: let test_h2c_server_fragmented_large_upload_echo () =
1759:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1760:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1761:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
1762:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1763:   let socket =
1764:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
1765:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
1766:   in
1767:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
1768:   let config =
1769:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with read_buffer_size = 64 }
1770:   in
1771:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1772:     Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
1773:     |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
1774:            Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
1775:              ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
1776:              ())
1777:   in
1778:   let server =
1779:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket handler
1780:   in
1781:   let flow =
1782:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
1783:   in
1784:   let connection =
1785:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
1786:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
1787:       ()
1788:   in
1789:   Fun.protect
1790:     ~finally:(fun () ->
1791:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
1792:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
1793:     (fun () ->
1794:       let upload = String.make (32 * 1024) 'x' in
1795:       let request =
1796:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
1797:           ~headers:
1798:             (H2.Headers.of_list
1799:                [
1800:                  ":authority", "127.0.0.1";
1801:                  "content-length", string_of_int (String.length upload);
1802:                ])
1803:           `POST "/echo"
1804:       in
1805:       let status, body =
1806:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () ->
1807:             await_h2_response ~request_body:upload connection request)
1808:       in
1809:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
1810:       Alcotest.(check int) "body length" (String.length upload)
1811:         (String.length body);
1812:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" upload body)
1813: 
1814: let test_h2c_server_request_body_timeout () =
1815:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1816:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1817:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1818:   let server_timeouts =
1819:     {
1820:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
1821:       request_body_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 20);
1822:     }
1823:   in
1824:   let server_config =
1825:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts = server_timeouts }
1826:   in
1827:   let config =
1828:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1829:   in
1830:   let request_bytes = h2_client_partial_request_bytes "/timeout" "partial" in
1831:   let state, flow = failing_server_flow (Blocking_read { request_bytes }) in
1832:   let timeout_seen, resolve_timeout_seen = Eio.Promise.create () in
1833:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1834:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
1835:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
1836:   in
1837:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1838:     match request.path with
1839:     | "/timeout" ->
1840:         let expected = "partial" in
1841:         let observed = Buffer.create (String.length expected) in
1842:         let resolve_result result =
1843:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_timeout_seen result)
1844:         in
1845:         let rec read_until_payload () =
1846:           Eta_http.Server.Body.read request.body
1847:           |> Eta.Effect.bind (function
1848:                | Some chunk ->
1849:                    Buffer.add_string observed (Bytes.to_string chunk);
1850:                    if Buffer.length observed >= String.length expected then
1851:                      Eta_http.Server.Body.read request.body
1852:                    else read_until_payload ()
1853:                | None ->
1854:                    Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
1855:                        resolve_result
1856:                          (`Ended_before_timeout (Buffer.contents observed)))
1857:                    |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () -> None))
1858:         in
1859:         read_until_payload ()
1860:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun next_chunk ->
1861:                resolve_result
1862:                  (`Unexpected_second_body
1863:                    ( Option.map Bytes.to_string next_chunk,
1864:                      Buffer.contents observed ));
1865:                Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:500
1866:                  "unexpected second body\n")
1867:         |> Eta.Effect.catch (fun error ->
1868:                Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
1869:                    resolve_result
1870:                      (`Timeout
1871:                        ( Buffer.contents observed,
1872:                          Eta_http.Server.Error.error_class error,
1873:                          Eta_http.Server.Error.layer_to_string
1874:                            (Eta_http.Server.Error.layer error) )))
1875:                |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () ->
1876:                       Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:408 "timeout\n"))
1877:     | _ ->
1878:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
1879:   in
1880:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1881:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
1882:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
1883:         ~config ~runtime_factory
1884:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
1885:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1886:         handler);
1887:   let timeout_result =
1888:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1889:         Eio.Promise.await timeout_seen)
1890:   in
1891:   (match timeout_result with
1892:   | `Timeout (observed, error_class, error_layer) ->
1893:       Alcotest.(check string) "observed body" "partial" observed;
1894:       Alcotest.(check string) "error class" "request_timeout" error_class;
1895:       Alcotest.(check string) "error layer" "request_body" error_layer
1896:   | `Ended_before_timeout observed ->
1897:       Alcotest.failf "request body ended before timeout after %S" observed
1898:   | `Unexpected_second_body (next_chunk, observed) ->
1899:       Alcotest.failf "expected timeout after %S, got second body chunk %S"
1900:         observed
1901:         (Option.value ~default:"<eof>" next_chunk));
1902:   Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All;
1903:   let stats =
1904:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1905:         Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1906:   in
1907:   Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
1908:   Alcotest.(check int) "request bytes" (String.length "partial")
1909:     stats.request_bytes;
1910:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
1911: 
1912: let test_h2c_server_request_body_too_large () =
1913:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1914:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1915:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1916:   let server_limits =
1917:     {
1918:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.limits with
1919:       max_request_body_bytes = Some 4;
1920:     }
1921:   in
1922:   let server_config =
1923:     { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with limits = server_limits }
1924:   in
1925:   let config =
1926:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1927:   in
1928:   let request_bytes =
1929:     h2_client_partial_request_bytes "/too-large" "12345"
1930:     ^ raw_h2_data ~end_stream:true ~stream_id:1 ""
1931:   in
1932:   let state, flow = failing_server_flow (Blocking_read { request_bytes }) in
1933:   let body_error, resolve_body_error = Eio.Promise.create () in
1934:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
1935:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
1936:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
1937:   in
1938:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
1939:     match request.path with
1940:     | "/too-large" ->
1941:         Eta_http.Server.Body.read request.body
1942:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun _ ->
1943:                Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:500 "unexpected body\n")
1944:         |> Eta.Effect.catch (fun error ->
1945:                Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
1946:                    ignore
1947:                      (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_body_error
1948:                         ( Eta_http.Server.Error.error_class error,
1949:                           Eta_http.Server.Error.layer_to_string
1950:                             (Eta_http.Server.Error.layer error) )))
1951:                |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () ->
1952:                       Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:413 "too large\n"))
1953:     | path -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected path %S" path
1954:   in
1955:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
1956:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
1957:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
1958:         ~config ~runtime_factory
1959:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
1960:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
1961:         handler);
1962:   let error_class, error_layer =
1963:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1964:         Eio.Promise.await body_error)
1965:   in
1966:   Alcotest.(check string) "error class" "request_body_too_large" error_class;
1967:   Alcotest.(check string) "error layer" "request_body" error_layer;
1968:   Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All;
1969:   let stats =
1970:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
1971:         Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
1972:   in
1973:   Alcotest.(check int) "request bytes" 5 stats.request_bytes;
1974:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
1975: 
1976: let test_h2c_server_unread_body_drain_timeout () =
1977:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
1978:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
1979:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
1980:   let server_timeouts =
1981:     {
1982:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
1983:       request_body_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 20);
1984:     }
1985:   in
1986:   let server_config =
1987:     {
1988:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default with
1989:       timeouts = server_timeouts;
1990:       unread_body_policy = Eta_http.Server.Config.Drain_up_to 64;
1991:     }
1992:   in
1993:   let config =
1994:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
1995:   in
1996:   let request_seen, resolve_request_seen = Eio.Promise.create () in
1997:   let state, flow =
1998:     failing_server_flow
1999:       (Blocking_read
2000:          {
2001:            request_bytes =
2002:              h2_client_partial_request_bytes "/ignored" "partial";
2003:          })
2004:   in
2005:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2006:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
2007:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
2008:   in
2009:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2010:     match request.path with
2011:     | "/ignored" ->
2012:         Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
2013:             ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_request_seen ()))
2014:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () -> Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ignored\n")
2015:     | path -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected path %S" path
2016:   in
2017:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
2018:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
2019:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
2020:         ~config ~runtime_factory
2021:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
2022:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
2023:         handler);
2024:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2025:       Eio.Promise.await request_seen);
2026:   Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.1;
2027:   Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All;
2028:   let stats =
2029:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2030:         Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2031:   in
2032:   Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 1 stats.completed_streams;
2033:   Alcotest.(check int) "reset streams" 0 stats.reset_streams;
2034:   Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
2035:   Alcotest.(check int) "request bytes" (String.length "partial")
2036:     stats.request_bytes;
2037:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
2038:

2075: let test_h2c_server_idle_timeout () =

2090:   in

2095:   in
2096:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2097:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
2098:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
2099:   in
2100:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2101:     match request.path with
2102:     | "/idle" ->
2103:         Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
2104:             ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_request_seen ()))
2105:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () -> Eta_http.Server.Response.text "idle\n")
2106:     | path -> Alcotest.failf "unexpected path %S" path
2107:   in
