````ocaml
2109:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw ~clock ~flow
2110:         ~peer:(`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 31337))
2111:         ~config ~runtime_factory
2112:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
2113:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
2114:         handler);
2115:   Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2116:       Eio.Promise.await request_seen);
2117:   let stats =
2118:     Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2119:         Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2120:   in
2121:   Alcotest.(check int) "opened streams" 1 stats.opened_streams;
2122:   Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams;
2123:   Alcotest.(check bool) "flow shutdown" true (state.shutdowns > 0)
2124: 
2125: let test_h2_server_connection_run_uses_connection_metadata () =
2126:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2127:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2128:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2129:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2130:   let socket =
2131:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
2132:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2133:   in
2134:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2135:   let peer : Eta_http.Server.Request.peer =
2136:     { address = Some "tls-peer.test"; port = Some 443 }
2137:   in
2138:   let connection_info : Eta_http_eio.Server.Connection_info.t =
2139:     {
2140:       id = "generic-h2-connection";
2141:       peer;
2142:       protocol = Eta_http.Server.Error.H2;
2143:       tls = true;
2144:       alpn_protocol = Some "h2";
2145:     }
2146:   in
2147:   let seen_request, resolve_seen_request = Eio.Promise.create () in
2148:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2149:   let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
2150:     Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
2151:   in
2152:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2153:     ignore
2154:       (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_seen_request
2155:          ( request.connection_id,
2156:            request.tls,
2157:            request.alpn_protocol,
2158:            request.peer.address,
2159:            request.peer.port,
2160:            Eta_http.Core.Version.to_string request.version ));
2161:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "generic-h2\n")
2162:   in
2163:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
2164:       Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
2165:       let flow, _addr = Eio.Net.accept ~sw:conn_sw socket in
2166:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run ~sw:conn_sw ~clock
2167:         ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.flow)
2168:         ~connection:connection_info ~config:Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default
2169:         ~runtime_factory
2170:         ~on_close:(fun stats ->
2171:           ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
2172:         handler);
2173:   let flow =
2174:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2175:   in
2176:   let connection =
2177:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2178:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2179:       ()
2180:   in
2181:   Fun.protect
2182:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
2183:     (fun () ->
2184:       let request =
2185:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"https"
2186:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "example.test" ])
2187:           `GET "/metadata"
2188:       in
2189:       let status, body = await_h2_response connection request in
2190:       let connection_id, tls, alpn_protocol, peer_address, peer_port, version =
2191:         Eio.Promise.await seen_request
2192:       in
2193:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
2194:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "generic-h2\n" body;
2195:       Alcotest.(check string) "connection id" "generic-h2-connection"
2196:         connection_id;
2197:       Alcotest.(check bool) "tls" true tls;
2198:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "alpn protocol" (Some "h2")
2199:         alpn_protocol;
2200:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "peer address" (Some "tls-peer.test")
2201:         peer_address;
2202:       Alcotest.(check (option int)) "peer port" (Some 443) peer_port;
2203:       Alcotest.(check string) "version" "h2" version;
2204:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2205:       let stats =
2206:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2207:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2208:       in
2209:       Alcotest.(check int) "opened streams" 1 stats.opened_streams;
2210:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 1 stats.completed_streams)
2211: 
2212: let test_h2c_server_drain_up_to_discard_waits_for_body () =
2213:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2214:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2215:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2216:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2217:   let socket =
2218:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2219:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2220:   in
2221:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2222:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
2223:   let discard_started, resolve_discard_started = Eio.Promise.create () in
2224:   let discard_returned, resolve_discard_returned = Eio.Promise.create () in
2225:   let config =
2226:     let open Eta_http_eio.Server.Config in
2227:     {
2228:       default with
2229:       server =
2230:         {
2231:           default.server with
2232:           unread_body_policy = Eta_http.Server.Config.Drain_up_to 4;
2233:         };
2234:     }
2235:   in
2236:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2237:     match request.path with
2238:     | "/discard" ->
2239:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_discard_started ());
2240:         Eta_http.Server.Body.discard ~drain:true request.body
2241:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () ->
2242:                ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_discard_returned ());
2243:                Eta_http.Server.Response.text "discarded\n")
2244:     | _ ->
2245:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "after\n")
2246:   in
2247:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
2248:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~config ~socket
2249:         handler);
2250:   let flow =
2251:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2252:   in
2253:   let connection =
2254:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2255:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2256:       ()
2257:   in
2258:   Fun.protect
2259:     ~finally:(fun () -> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
2260:     (fun () ->
2261:       let status = ref None in
2262:       let body = Buffer.create 32 in
2263:       let eof, resolve_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
2264:       let rec read_body response_body =
2265:         H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
2266:           ~on_eof:(fun () -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_eof ()))
2267:           ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
2268:             Buffer.add_string body (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
2269:             read_body response_body)
2270:       in
2271:       let request =
2272:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2273:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2274:           `POST "/discard"
2275:       in
2276:       let opened =
2277:         match
2278:           Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag:1 request
2279:             ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
2280:               Alcotest.failf "unexpected h2 stream error: %a"
2281:                 pp_h2_client_error error)
2282:             ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
2283:               status := Some (H2.Status.to_code response.status);
2284:               read_body response_body)
2285:         with
2286:         | Ok opened -> opened
2287:         | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
2288:             Alcotest.failf "request rejected by admission limit=%d" limit
2289:         | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
2290:             Alcotest.fail "connection closed before request"
2291:         | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
2292:             Alcotest.failf "request failed: %s" message
2293:       in
2294:       Eio.Promise.await discard_started;
2295:       let returned_before_body =
2296:         Eio.Fiber.first
2297:           (fun () ->
2298:             Eio.Promise.await discard_returned;
2299:             true)
2300:           (fun () ->
2301:             Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.01;
2302:             false)
2303:       in
2304:       Alcotest.(check bool) "discard waited for body" false returned_before_body;
2305:       H2.Body.Writer.write_string opened.request_body "0123456789";
2306:       H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body;
2307:       Eio.Promise.await eof;
2308:       Alcotest.(check bool) "discard returned" true
2309:         (Eio.Promise.is_resolved discard_returned);
2310:       Alcotest.(check (option int)) "discard status" (Some 200) !status;
2311:       Alcotest.(check string) "discard body" "discarded\n"
2312:         (Buffer.contents body);
2313:       let after =
2314:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2315:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2316:           `GET "/after"
2317:       in
2318:       let after_status, after_body =
2319:         await_h2_response ~tag:2 connection after
2320:       in
2321:       Alcotest.(check int) "after status" 200 after_status;
2322:       Alcotest.(check string) "after body" "after\n" after_body;
2323:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
2324: 
2325: let test_h2c_server_connection_close_fails_pending_body_read () =
2326:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2327:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2328:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2329:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2330:   let socket =
2331:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2332:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2333:   in
2334:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2335:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
2336:   let read_started, resolve_read_started = Eio.Promise.create () in
2337:   let body_error, resolve_body_error = Eio.Promise.create () in
2338:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2339:     match request.path with
2340:     | "/read" ->
2341:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_read_started ());
2342:         Eta_http.Server.Body.read request.body
2343:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun _ ->
2344:                Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected body\n")
2345:         |> Eta.Effect.catch (fun error ->
2346:                Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
2347:                    ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_body_error error))
2348:                |> Eta.Effect.map (fun () ->
2349:                       Eta_http.Server.Response.text ~status:499
2350:                         "connection closed\n"))
2351:     | _ ->
2352:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
2353:   in
2354:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
2355:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
2356:   let flow =
2357:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2358:   in
2359:   let connection =
2360:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2361:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2362:       ()
2363:   in
2364:   Fun.protect
2365:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2366:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ());
2367:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
2368:     (fun () ->
2369:       let request =
2370:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2371:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2372:           `POST "/read"
2373:       in
2374:       let opened =
2375:         match
2376:           Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag:1 request
2377:             ~error_handler:(fun _stream _error -> ())
2378:             ~response_handler:(fun _stream _response _response_body -> ())
2379:         with
2380:         | Ok opened -> opened
2381:         | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
2382:             Alcotest.failf "request rejected by admission limit=%d" limit
2383:         | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
2384:             Alcotest.fail "connection closed before request"
2385:         | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
2386:             Alcotest.failf "request failed: %s" message
2387:       in
2388:       ignore opened;
2389:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2390:           Eio.Promise.await read_started);
2391:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2392:       let error =
2393:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2394:             Eio.Promise.await body_error)
2395:       in
2396:       Alcotest.(check string) "error class" "connection_closed"
2397:         (Eta_http.Server.Error.error_class error);
2398:       Alcotest.(check string) "error layer" "request_body"
2399:         (Eta_http.Server.Error.layer_to_string
2400:            (Eta_http.Server.Error.layer error)))
2401: 
2402: let test_h2c_server_handle_graceful_shutdown_waits_for_stream () =
2403:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2404:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2405:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2406:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2407:   let socket =
2408:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2409:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2410:   in
2411:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2412:   let handler_started, resolve_handler_started = Eio.Promise.create () in
2413:   let release_handler, resolve_release_handler = Eio.Promise.create () in
2414:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2415:   let on_connection_close stats =
2416:     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
2417:   in
2418:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2419:     match request.path with
2420:     | "/wait" ->
2421:         Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
2422:             ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_handler_started ());
2423:             Eio.Promise.await release_handler;
2424:             Eta_http.Server.Response.text "done\n")
2425:     | _ ->
2426:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
2427:   in
2428:   let server =
2429:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~on_connection_close
2430:       ~socket handler
2431:   in
2432:   let flow =
2433:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2434:   in
2435:   let connection =
2436:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2437:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2438:       ()
2439:   in
2440:   Fun.protect
2441:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2442:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_release_handler ());
2443:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate;
2444:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection)
2445:     (fun () ->
2446:       let response, resolve_response = Eio.Promise.create () in
2447:       Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
2448:           let request =
2449:             H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2450:               ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2451:               `GET "/wait"
2452:           in
2453:           ignore
2454:             (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_response
2455:                (await_h2_response connection request)));
2456:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2457:           Eio.Promise.await handler_started);
2458:       let stats = Eta_http_eio.Server.stats server in
2459:       Alcotest.(check int) "active connections before shutdown" 1
2460:         stats.active_connections;
2461:       Alcotest.(check int) "opened connections before shutdown" 1
2462:         stats.opened_connections;
2463:       Alcotest.(check int) "closed connections before shutdown" 0
2464:         stats.closed_connections;
2465:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server (Graceful (Eta.Duration.ms 200));
2466:       let closed_before_release =
2467:         Eio.Fiber.first
2468:           (fun () ->
2469:             ignore (Eio.Promise.await closed_stats);
2470:             true)
2471:           (fun () ->
2472:             Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.02;
2473:             false)
2474:       in
2475:       Alcotest.(check bool) "graceful keeps active stream open" false
2476:         closed_before_release;
2477:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_release_handler ());
2478:       let status, body =
2479:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2480:             Eio.Promise.await response)
2481:       in
2482:       Alcotest.(check int) "status" 200 status;
2483:       Alcotest.(check string) "body" "done\n" body;
2484:       let connection_stats =
2485:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2486:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2487:       in
2488:       Alcotest.(check int) "connection active streams" 0
2489:         connection_stats.active_streams;
2490:       Alcotest.(check int) "connection completed streams" 1
2491:         connection_stats.completed_streams;
2492:       Alcotest.(check int) "connection reset streams" 0
2493:         connection_stats.reset_streams;
2494:       let stats = Eta_http_eio.Server.stats server in
2495:       Alcotest.(check int) "active connections after shutdown" 0
2496:         stats.active_connections;
2497:       Alcotest.(check int) "opened connections after shutdown" 1
2498:         stats.opened_connections;
2499:       Alcotest.(check int) "closed connections after shutdown" 1
2500:         stats.closed_connections)
2501: 
2502: let test_h2c_server_closes_on_ingress_security_error () =
2503:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2504:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2505:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2506:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2507:   let socket =
2508:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:1 net
2509:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2510:   in
2511:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2512:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2513:   let handler _request =
2514:     Alcotest.fail "settings flood should close before request dispatch"
2515:   in
2516:   let server =
2517:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock
2518:       ~on_connection_close:(fun stats ->
2519:         ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats))
2520:       ~socket handler
2521:   in
2522:   let flow =
2523:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2524:   in
2525:   Fun.protect
2526:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2527:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate;
2528:       try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ())
2529:     (fun () ->
2530:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
2531:         ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
2532:        ^ String.concat ""
2533:            (List.init 11 (fun _ -> Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings)))
2534:         flow;
2535:       let response =
2536:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2537:             read_raw_until_close flow)
2538:       in
2539:       Alcotest.(check bool) "security failure sends GOAWAY" true
2540:         (raw_h2_has_frame Goaway response);
2541:       let stats =
2542:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2543:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2544:       in
2545:       Alcotest.(check int) "protocol errors" 1 stats.protocol_errors)
2546: 
2547: let test_h2c_server_owns_response_framing () =
2548:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2549:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2550:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2551:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2552:   let socket =
2553:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:8 net
2554:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2555:   in
2556:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2557:   let head_stream_released = ref false in
2558:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2559:     match request.path with
2560:     | "/fixed" ->
2561:         Eta.Effect.pure
2562:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
2563:              ~body:
2564:                (Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed
2565:                   [ Bytes.of_string "fixed-body" ])
2566:              ())
2567:     | "/stream-known" ->
2568:         let chunks = ref [ Bytes.of_string "abc"; Bytes.of_string "de" ] in
2569:         let body =
2570:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:5 (fun () ->
2571:               match !chunks with
2572:               | [] -> Eta.Effect.pure None
2573:               | chunk :: rest ->
2574:                   chunks := rest;
2575:                   Eta.Effect.pure (Some chunk))
2576:         in
2577:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
2578:     | "/head" ->
2579:         let body =
2580:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:10
2581:             ~release:(fun () ->
2582:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () -> head_stream_released := true))
2583:             (fun () -> Alcotest.fail "HEAD response body must not be read")
2584:         in
2585:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
2586:     | "/no-content" ->
2587:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.empty ~status:204 ())
2588:     | "/not-modified" ->
2589:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.empty ~status:304 ())
2590:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
2591:   in
2592:   let server =
2593:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
2594:   in
2595:   let flow =
2596:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2597:   in
2598:   let connection =
2599:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2600:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2601:       ()
2602:   in
2603:   let make_request ?(meth = `GET) path =
2604:     H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2605:       ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2606:       meth path
2607:   in
2608:   let content_length headers =
2609:     Option.bind !headers (List.assoc_opt "content-length")
2610:   in
2611:   Fun.protect
2612:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2613:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2614:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2615:     (fun () ->
2616:       let fixed_headers = ref None in
2617:       let status, body =
2618:         await_h2_response ~tag:1 ~headers_ref:fixed_headers connection
2619:           (make_request "/fixed")
2620:       in
2621:       Alcotest.(check int) "fixed status" 200 status;
2622:       Alcotest.(check string) "fixed body" "fixed-body" body;
2623:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "fixed content-length" (Some "10")
2624:         (content_length fixed_headers);
2625:       let stream_headers = ref None in
2626:       let s_status, s_body =
2627:         await_h2_response ~tag:2 ~headers_ref:stream_headers connection
2628:           (make_request "/stream-known")
2629:       in
2630:       Alcotest.(check int) "stream status" 200 s_status;
2631:       Alcotest.(check string) "stream body" "abcde" s_body;
2632:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "stream content-length" (Some "5")
2633:         (content_length stream_headers);
2634:       let head_headers = ref None in
2635:       let h_status, h_body =
2636:         await_h2_response ~tag:3 ~headers_ref:head_headers connection
2637:           (make_request ~meth:`HEAD "/head")
2638:       in
2639:       Alcotest.(check int) "head status" 200 h_status;
2640:       Alcotest.(check string) "head body empty" "" h_body;
2641:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "head content-length" (Some "10")
2642:         (content_length head_headers);
2643:       Alcotest.(check bool) "ignored head stream released" true
2644:         !head_stream_released;
2645:       let nc_headers = ref None in
2646:       let nc_status, nc_body =
2647:         await_h2_response ~tag:4 ~headers_ref:nc_headers connection
2648:           (make_request "/no-content")
2649:       in
2650:       Alcotest.(check int) "204 status" 204 nc_status;
2651:       Alcotest.(check string) "204 body empty" "" nc_body;
2652:       Alcotest.(check (option string)) "204 has no content-length" None
2653:         (content_length nc_headers);
2654:       let nm_status, nm_body =
2655:         await_h2_response ~tag:5 connection (make_request "/not-modified")
2656:       in
2657:       Alcotest.(check int) "304 status" 304 nm_status;
2658:       Alcotest.(check string) "304 body empty" "" nm_body)
2659: 
2660: let test_h2c_server_rejects_handler_supplied_content_length () =
2661:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2662:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2663:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2664:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2665:   let socket =
2666:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2667:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2668:   in
2669:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2670:   let handler _request =
2671:     Eta.Effect.pure
2672:       (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
2673:          ~headers:[ "content-length", "5" ]
2674:          ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ Bytes.of_string "hello" ])
2675:          ())
2676:   in
2677:   let server =
2678:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
2679:   in
2680:   let flow =
2681:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2682:   in
2683:   let connection =
2684:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2685:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2686:       ()
2687:   in
2688:   Fun.protect
2689:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2690:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2691:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2692:     (fun () ->
2693:       let request =
2694:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2695:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2696:           `GET "/explicit-content-length"
2697:       in
2698:       let status, _body =
2699:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2700:             await_h2_response connection request)
2701:       in
2702:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler content-length becomes 500" 500 status)
2703: 
2704: let test_h2c_server_resets_short_stream_response () =
2705:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2706:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2707:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2708:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2709:   let socket =
2710:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2711:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2712:   in
2713:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2714:   let handler _request =
2715:     let sent = ref false in
2716:     let body =
2717:       Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:10 (fun () ->
2718:           if !sent then Eta.Effect.pure None
2719:           else (
2720:             sent := true;
2721:             Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.of_string "abc"))))
2722:     in
2723:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
2724:   in
2725:   let server =
2726:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
2727:   in
2728:   let flow =
2729:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2730:   in
2731:   let connection =
2732:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2733:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2734:       ()
2735:   in
2736:   Fun.protect
2737:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2738:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2739:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2740:     (fun () ->
2741:       let request =
2742:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2743:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2744:           `GET "/short-stream"
2745:       in
2746:       let outcome =
2747:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2748:             await_h2_response_outcome connection request)
2749:       in
2750:       match outcome with
2751:       | `Error (status, _body, _error) ->
2752:           Alcotest.(check int) "short stream partial status" 200 status
2753:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
2754:           Alcotest.failf
2755:             "expected reset for stream shorter than Content-Length, got EOF \
2756:              status=%d body=%S"
2757:             status body)
2758: 
2759: let test_h2c_server_resets_overflowing_stream_response () =
2760:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2761:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2762:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2763:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2764:   let socket =
2765:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2766:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2767:   in
2768:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2769:   let handler _request =
2770:     let chunks =
2771:       ref [ Bytes.of_string "abc"; Bytes.of_string "defgh" ]
2772:     in
2773:     let body =
2774:       Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:4 (fun () ->
2775:           match !chunks with
2776:           | [] -> Eta.Effect.pure None
2777:           | chunk :: rest ->
2778:               chunks := rest;
2779:               Eta.Effect.pure (Some chunk))
2780:     in
2781:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
2782:   in
2783:   let server =
2784:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
2785:   in
2786:   let flow =
2787:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2788:   in
2789:   let connection =
2790:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2791:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2792:       ()
2793:   in
2794:   Fun.protect
2795:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2796:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2797:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2798:     (fun () ->
2799:       let request =
2800:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2801:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2802:           `GET "/overflow-stream"
2803:       in
2804:       let outcome =
2805:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
2806:             await_h2_response_outcome connection request)
2807:       in
2808:       match outcome with
2809:       | `Error (status, body, _error) ->
2810:           Alcotest.(check int) "overflow stream partial status" 200 status;
2811:           Alcotest.(check bool) "overflow stream stops at declared length" true
2812:             (String.length body <= 4)
2813:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
2814:           Alcotest.failf
2815:             "expected reset for stream exceeding Content-Length, got EOF \
2816:              status=%d body=%S"
2817:             status body)
2818: 
2819: let test_h2c_server_multiplexes_slow_uploads () =
2820:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2821:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2822:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2823:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2824:   let socket =
2825:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:8 net
2826:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2827:   in
2828:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2829:   let closed_stats, resolve_closed_stats = Eio.Promise.create () in
2830:   let on_connection_close stats =
2831:     ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_closed_stats stats)
2832:   in
2833:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2834:     match request.path with
2835:     | "/echo" ->
2836:         Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
2837:         |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
2838:                Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
2839:                  ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
2840:                  ())
2841:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
2842:   in
2843:   let server =
2844:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~on_connection_close
2845:       ~socket handler
2846:   in
2847:   let flow =
2848:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2849:   in
2850:   let connection =
2851:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
2852:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
2853:       ()
2854:   in
2855:   let fragments tag =
2856:     [
2857:       Printf.sprintf "s%d-a-" tag;
2858:       Printf.sprintf "s%d-b-" tag;
2859:       Printf.sprintf "s%d-c" tag;
2860:     ]
2861:   in
2862:   let open_stream tag =
2863:     let body_buf = Buffer.create 32 in
2864:     let status = ref 0 in
2865:     let eof, resolve_eof = Eio.Promise.create () in
2866:     let rec read_body response_body =
2867:       H2.Body.Reader.schedule_read response_body
2868:         ~on_eof:(fun () -> ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_eof ()))
2869:         ~on_read:(fun bs ~off ~len ->
2870:           Buffer.add_string body_buf (Bigstringaf.substring bs ~off ~len);
2871:           read_body response_body)
2872:     in
2873:     let request =
2874:       H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
2875:         ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
2876:         `POST "/echo"
2877:     in
2878:     match
2879:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag request
2880:         ~error_handler:(fun _stream error ->
2881:           Alcotest.failf "slow upload stream %d failed: %a" tag
2882:             pp_h2_client_error error)
2883:         ~response_handler:(fun _stream response response_body ->
2884:           status := H2.Status.to_code response.status;
2885:           read_body response_body)
2886:     with
2887:     | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Admission_rejected { limit }) ->
2888:         Alcotest.failf "slow upload %d rejected by admission limit=%d" tag limit
2889:     | Error Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Connection_closed ->
2890:         Alcotest.failf "connection closed before slow upload %d" tag
2891:     | Error (Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.Request_failed message) ->
2892:         Alcotest.failf "slow upload %d failed: %s" tag message
2893:     | Ok (opened : Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.opened_request) ->
2894:         (tag, opened, body_buf, status, eof)
2895:   in
2896:   Fun.protect
2897:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2898:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2899:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2900:     (fun () ->
2901:       let tags = [ 1; 2; 3; 4 ] in
2902:       (* Open every stream first, then interleave their uploads round-robin so
2903:          the server is pumping four concurrent slow request bodies at once. *)
2904:       let streams = List.map open_stream tags in
2905:       let rounds = List.length (fragments 1) in
2906:       for round = 0 to rounds - 1 do
2907:         List.iter
2908:           (fun (tag, opened, _, _, _) ->
2909:             let fragment = List.nth (fragments tag) round in
2910:             H2.Body.Writer.write_string
2911:               opened.Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request_body fragment)
2912:           streams;
2913:         Eio.Time.sleep clock 0.005
2914:       done;
2915:       List.iter
2916:         (fun (_, opened, _, _, _) ->
2917:           H2.Body.Writer.close
2918:             opened.Eta_http_eio.H2.Multiplexer.request_body)
2919:         streams;
2920:       List.iter
2921:         (fun (tag, _, body_buf, status, eof) ->
2922:           Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 5.0 (fun () -> Eio.Promise.await eof);
2923:           Alcotest.(check int)
2924:             (Printf.sprintf "slow upload %d status" tag)
2925:             200 !status;
2926:           Alcotest.(check string)
2927:             (Printf.sprintf "slow upload %d echo" tag)
2928:             (String.concat "" (fragments tag))
2929:             (Buffer.contents body_buf))
2930:         streams;
2931:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
2932:       let stats =
2933:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () ->
2934:             Eio.Promise.await closed_stats)
2935:       in
2936:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed streams" 4 stats.completed_streams;
2937:       Alcotest.(check int) "reset streams" 0 stats.reset_streams;
2938:       Alcotest.(check int) "active streams" 0 stats.active_streams)
2939: 
2940: let test_h2c_server_half_close_resets_incomplete_body_without_blocking () =
2941:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
2942:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
2943:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
2944:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
2945:   let socket =
2946:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
2947:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
2948:   in
2949:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
2950:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
2951:     Eta_http.Server.Body.read_all request.body
2952:     |> Eta.Effect.map (fun body ->
2953:            Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200
2954:              ~body:(Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.fixed [ body ])
2955:              ())
2956:   in
2957:   let server =
2958:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
2959:   in
2960:   let flow =
2961:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
2962:   in
2963:   let request_headers stream_id =
2964:     let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
2965:     raw_h2_headers encoder ~stream_id ~end_stream:false
2966:       [
2967:         hpack_header ":method" "POST";
2968:         hpack_header ":scheme" "http";
2969:         hpack_header ":path" "/echo";
2970:         hpack_header ":authority" "127.0.0.1";
2971:       ]
2972:   in
2973:   Fun.protect
2974:     ~finally:(fun () ->
2975:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
2976:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
2977:     (fun () ->
2978:       let complete_streams =
2979:         List.init 9 (fun i ->
2980:             let stream_id = ((i + 2) * 2) - 1 in
2981:             request_headers stream_id
2982:             ^ raw_h2_data ~end_stream:true ~stream_id "done")
2983:       in
2984:       Eio.Flow.write flow
2985:         [
2986:           Cstruct.of_string
2987:             ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
2988:             ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
2989:             ^ request_headers 1
2990:             ^ String.concat "" complete_streams);
2991:         ];
2992:       Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `Send;
2993:       let response =
2994:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 2.0 (fun () ->
2995:             read_raw_until_h2_frame_count ~frame_type:Headers ~count:9 flow)
2996:       in
2997:       Alcotest.(check int) "completed stream responses" 9
2998:         (raw_h2_count_frames Headers response))
2999: 
3000: let test_h2c_server_streams_large_body_past_window () =
3001:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3002:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3003:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3004:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3005:   let socket =
3006:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3007:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3008:   in
3009:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3010:   let total = 512 * 1024 in
3011:   let chunk_size = 16 * 1024 in
3012:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3013:     match request.path with
3014:     | "/large" ->
3015:         let remaining = ref total in
3016:         let body =
3017:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:total (fun () ->
3018:               if !remaining = 0 then Eta.Effect.pure None
3019:               else
3020:                 let n = min chunk_size !remaining in
3021:                 remaining := !remaining - n;
3022:                 Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.make n 'z')))
3023:         in
3024:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
3025:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "unexpected\n")
3026:   in
3027:   let server =
3028:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket handler
3029:   in
3030:   let flow =
3031:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3032:   in
3033:   let connection =
3034:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3035:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3036:       ()
3037:   in
3038:   Fun.protect
3039:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3040:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3041:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3042:     (fun () ->
3043:       let request =
3044:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3045:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3046:           `GET "/large"
3047:       in
3048:       let status, body =
3049:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 10.0 (fun () ->
3050:             await_h2_response connection request)
3051:       in
3052:       Alcotest.(check int) "large stream status" 200 status;
3053:       Alcotest.(check int) "large stream body length" total
3054:         (String.length body))
3055: 
3056: let test_h2c_server_resets_stalled_reader_stream () =
3057:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3058:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3059:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3060:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3061:   let socket =
3062:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3063:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3064:   in
3065:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3066:   let timeouts =
3067:     {
3068:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
3069:       response_write_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 100);
3070:     }
3071:   in
3072:   let server_config = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts } in
3073:   let config =
3074:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config }
3075:   in
3076:   (* Body well past the default 65535 flow-control window so the server must
3077:      keep writing past the initial window. *)
3078:   let total = 256 * 1024 in
3079:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3080:     match request.path with
3081:     | "/big" ->
3082:         let remaining = ref total in
3083:         let body =
3084:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream ~length:total (fun () ->
3085:               if !remaining = 0 then Eta.Effect.pure None
3086:               else
3087:                 let n = min (16 * 1024) !remaining in
3088:                 remaining := !remaining - n;
3089:                 Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.make n 'z')))
3090:         in
3091:         Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
3092:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
3093:   in
3094:   let server =
3095:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~config ~socket handler
3096:   in
3097:   let flow =
3098:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3099:   in
3100:   let connection =
3101:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3102:       ~config:{ H2.Config.default with initial_window_size = 16384l }
3103:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3104:       ()
3105:   in
3106:   Fun.protect
3107:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3108:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3109:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3110:     (fun () ->
3111:       let reset, resolve_reset = Eio.Promise.create () in
3112:       let request =
3113:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3114:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3115:           `GET "/big"
3116:       in
3117:       (* Deliberately never schedule a body read, so the client never emits
3118:          WINDOW_UPDATE and the server's response stalls once the initial
3119:          flow-control window is exhausted. *)
3120:       (match
3121:          Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.request connection ~tag:1 request
3122:            ~error_handler:(fun _stream _error ->
3123:              ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_reset ()))
3124:            ~response_handler:(fun _stream _response _response_body -> ())
3125:        with
3126:       | Ok opened -> H2.Body.Writer.close opened.request_body
3127:       | Error _ -> Alcotest.fail "stalled-reader request not opened");
3128:       (* The server must not let a non-reading client pin the stream open: it
3129:          should reset the stream once it cannot make write progress within
3130:          response_write_timeout. *)
3131:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 3.0 (fun () ->
3132:           Eio.Promise.await reset))
3133: 
3134: let test_h2c_server_rejects_control_char_header_values () =
3135:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3136:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3137:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3138:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3139:   let socket =
3140:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3141:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3142:   in
3143:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3144:   let received : (string, string) Hashtbl.t = Hashtbl.create 8 in
3145:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
3146:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3147:     (match Eta_http.Core.Header.get "x-evil" request.headers with
3148:     | Some value -> Hashtbl.replace received request.path value
3149:     | None -> ());
3150:     Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
3151:   in
3152:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
3153:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
3154:   let flow =
3155:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3156:   in
3157:   let connection =
3158:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3159:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3160:       ()
3161:   in
3162:   Fun.protect
3163:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3164:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3165:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
3166:     (fun () ->
3167:       (* HPACK permits arbitrary octets in header values. The invariant an edge
3168:          server must hold is that no CR/LF/NUL ever reaches the handler, so a
3169:          client cannot smuggle extra header lines or split a response when the
3170:          request is proxied to an HTTP/1.1 upstream. CR/LF are rejected outright
3171:          (400) by header validation; NUL is stripped by the HPACK transport
3172:          before it reaches Eta. *)
3173:       let line_injection_cases =
3174:         [ "crlf in value", "a\r\nInjected: 1";
3175:           "bare lf in value", "a\nb";
3176:           "bare cr in value", "a\rb" ]
3177:       in
3178:       let all_cases = line_injection_cases @ [ "nul in value", "a\x00b" ] in
3179:       List.iteri
3180:         (fun index (_name, evil_value) ->
3181:           let request =
3182:             H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3183:               ~headers:
3184:                 (H2.Headers.of_list
3185:                    [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1"; "x-evil", evil_value ])
3186:               `GET (Printf.sprintf "/evil-%d" index)
3187:           in
3188:           ignore
3189:             (Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3190:                  await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:(index + 1) connection request)))
3191:         all_cases;
3192:       (* CR/LF requests must be rejected before dispatch. *)
3193:       List.iteri
3194:         (fun index (name, _) ->
3195:           Alcotest.(check bool)
3196:             (Printf.sprintf "%s rejected before handler" name)
3197:             false
3198:             (Hashtbl.mem received (Printf.sprintf "/evil-%d" index)))
3199:         line_injection_cases;
3200:       (* Whatever does reach the handler must contain no control bytes. *)
3201:       Hashtbl.iter
3202:         (fun path value ->
3203:           String.iter
3204:             (fun c ->
3205:               if c = '\r' || c = '\n' || c = '\000' then
3206:                 Alcotest.failf "control byte reached handler for %s" path)
3207:             value)
3208:         received)
3209: 
3210: let test_h2c_server_handler_exception_returns_500 () =
3211:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3212:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3213:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3214:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3215:   let socket =
3216:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3217:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3218:   in
3219:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3220:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3221:     if request.path = "/boom" then failwith "handler boom"
3222:     else Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
3223:   in
3224:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
3225:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
3226:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
3227:   let flow =
3228:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3229:   in
3230:   let connection =
3231:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3232:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3233:       ()
3234:   in
3235:   Fun.protect
3236:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3237:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3238:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
3239:     (fun () ->
3240:       let request =
3241:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3242:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3243:           `GET "/boom"
3244:       in
3245:       let status, body =
3246:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3247:             await_h2_response connection request)
3248:       in
3249:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler exception status" 500 status;
3250:       Alcotest.(check string) "handler exception body" "internal server error\n" body;
3251:       let request2 =
3252:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3253:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3254:           `GET "/ok"
3255:       in
3256:       let status2, body2 =
3257:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3258:             await_h2_response connection request2)
3259:       in
3260:       Alcotest.(check int) "subsequent request status" 200 status2;
3261:       Alcotest.(check string) "subsequent request body" "ok\n" body2)
3262: 
3263: 
3264: let test_h2c_server_handler_timeout_returns_503 () =
3265:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3266:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3267:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3268:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3269:   let socket =
3270:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3271:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3272:   in
3273:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3274:   let timeouts =
3275:     {
3276:       Eta_http.Server.Config.default.timeouts with
3277:       handler_timeout = Some (Eta.Duration.ms 50);
3278:     }
3279:   in
3280:   let server_config = { Eta_http.Server.Config.default with timeouts } in
3281:   let config = { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with server = server_config } in
3282:   let handler (_request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3283:     Eta.Effect.delay (Eta.Duration.seconds 1)
3284:       (Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "slow\n"))
3285:   in
3286:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
3287:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
3288:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~config ~socket handler);
3289:   let flow =
3290:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3291:   in
3292:   let connection =
3293:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3294:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3295:       ()
3296:   in
3297:   Fun.protect
3298:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3299:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3300:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
3301:     (fun () ->
3302:       let request =
3303:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3304:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3305:           `GET "/slow"
3306:       in
3307:       let status, body =
3308:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3309:             await_h2_response connection request)
3310:       in
3311:       Alcotest.(check int) "handler timeout status" 503 status;
3312:       Alcotest.(check string) "handler timeout body" "service unavailable\n" body)
3313: 
3314: let test_h2c_server_streaming_response_exception_resets_stream () =
3315:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3316:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3317:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3318:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3319:   let socket =
3320:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3321:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3322:   in
3323:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3324:   let released, resolve_released = Eio.Promise.create () in
3325:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3326:     match request.path with
3327:     | "/stream-boom" ->
3328:         let sent = ref false in
3329:         let body =
3330:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream
3331:             ~release:(fun () ->
3332:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
3333:                   ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_released ())))
3334:             (fun () ->
3335:               if !sent then Eta.Effect.pure None
3336:               else (
3337:                 sent := true;
3338:                 Eta.Effect.pure (Some (Bytes.of_string "chunk"))))
3339:         in
3340:         Eta.Effect.pure
3341:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
3342:     | "/stream-boom-on-read" ->
3343:         let body =
3344:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream
3345:             ~release:(fun () ->
3346:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
3347:                   ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_released ())))
3348:             (fun () -> failwith "stream read boom")
3349:         in
3350:         Eta.Effect.pure
3351:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
3352:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
3353:   in
3354:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
3355:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
3356:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
3357:   let flow =
3358:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3359:   in
3360:   let connection =
3361:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3362:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3363:       ()
3364:   in
3365:   Fun.protect
3366:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3367:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3368:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
3369:     (fun () ->
3370:       (* First request: headers go out, then the body read raises. *)
3371:       let request =
3372:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3373:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3374:           `GET "/stream-boom-on-read"
3375:       in
3376:       let outcome =
3377:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3378:             await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:1 connection request)
3379:       in
3380:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3381:           Eio.Promise.await released);
3382:       (match outcome with
3383:       | `Error (status, body, _error) ->
3384:           (* Headers may have been sent before the exception. *)
3385:           Alcotest.(check bool) "stream reset after headers" true
3386:             (status = 0 || status = 200);
3387:           Alcotest.(check string) "no body after reset" "" body
3388:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
3389:           Alcotest.(check bool) "stream reset after headers" true
3390:             (status = 0 || status = 200);
3391:           Alcotest.(check string) "no body after reset" "" body);
3392:       (* Connection must remain usable. *)
3393:       let ok =
3394:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3395:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3396:           `GET "/ok"
3397:       in
3398:       let status2, body2 =
3399:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3400:             await_h2_response ~tag:2 connection ok)
3401:       in
3402:       Alcotest.(check int) "subsequent request status" 200 status2;
3403:       Alcotest.(check string) "subsequent request body" "ok\n" body2)
3404: 
3405: let test_h2c_server_response_body_cancellation_resets_stream () =
3406:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3407:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3408:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3409:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3410:   let socket =
3411:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3412:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3413:   in
3414:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3415:   let released, resolve_released = Eio.Promise.create () in
3416:   let handler (request : Eta_http.Server.Request.t) =
3417:     match request.path with
3418:     | "/stream-cancel" ->
3419:         let body =
3420:           Eta_http.Server.Response.Body.stream
3421:             ~release:(fun () ->
3422:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
3423:                   ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_released ())))
3424:             (fun () ->
3425:               Eta.Effect.sync (fun () ->
3426:                   Eio.Cancel.sub (fun ctx ->
3427:                       Eio.Cancel.cancel ctx
3428:                         (Failure "response body cancellation");
3429:                       Eio.Cancel.check ctx;
3430:                       assert false)))
3431:         in
3432:         Eta.Effect.pure
3433:           (Eta_http.Server.Response.make ~status:200 ~body ())
3434:     | _ -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n")
3435:   in
3436:   let stop, resolve_stop = Eio.Promise.create () in
3437:   Eio.Fiber.fork ~sw (fun () ->
3438:       Eta_http_eio.Server.run_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~stop ~socket handler);
3439:   let flow =
3440:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3441:   in
3442:   let connection =
3443:     Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.create ~sw
3444:       ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.flow)
3445:       ()
3446:   in
3447:   Fun.protect
3448:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3449:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Connection.shutdown connection;
3450:       ignore (Eio.Promise.try_resolve resolve_stop ()))
3451:     (fun () ->
3452:       let request =
3453:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3454:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3455:           `GET "/stream-cancel"
3456:       in
3457:       let outcome =
3458:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3459:             await_h2_response_outcome ~tag:1 connection request)
3460:       in
3461:       Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3462:           Eio.Promise.await released);
3463:       (match outcome with
3464:       | `Error (status, body, _error) ->
3465:           Alcotest.(check bool) "stream reset after headers" true
3466:             (status = 0 || status = 200);
3467:           Alcotest.(check string) "no body after reset" "" body
3468:       | `Eof (status, body) ->
3469:           Alcotest.failf
3470:             "expected stream reset after cancellation, got EOF status=%d body=%S"
3471:             status body);
3472:       let ok =
3473:         H2.Request.create ~scheme:"http"
3474:           ~headers:(H2.Headers.of_list [ ":authority", "127.0.0.1" ])
3475:           `GET "/ok"
3476:       in
3477:       let status2, body2 =
3478:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3479:             await_h2_response ~tag:2 connection ok)
3480:       in
3481:       Alcotest.(check int) "subsequent request status" 200 status2;
3482:       Alcotest.(check string) "subsequent request body" "ok\n" body2)
3483: 
3484: let test_h2c_server_rejects_data_after_peer_reset () =
3485:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3486:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3487:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3488:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3489:   let socket =
3490:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3491:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3492:   in
3493:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3494:   let server =
3495:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket
3496:       (fun _request -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n"))
3497:   in
3498:   let flow =
3499:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3500:   in
3501:   Fun.protect
3502:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3503:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
3504:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3505:     (fun () ->
3506:       let request_headers stream_id path ~end_stream =
3507:         let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
3508:         raw_h2_headers encoder ~stream_id ~end_stream
3509:           [
3510:             hpack_header ":method" "GET";
3511:             hpack_header ":scheme" "http";
3512:             hpack_header ":path" path;
3513:             hpack_header ":authority" "127.0.0.1";
3514:           ]
3515:       in
3516:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
3517:         ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
3518:         ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
3519:         ^ request_headers 1 "/reset" ~end_stream:false
3520:         ^ raw_h2_rst_stream ~stream_id:1 8
3521:         ^ raw_h2_data ~stream_id:1 "x")
3522:         flow;
3523:       Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `Send;
3524:       let response =
3525:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3526:             read_raw_until_h2_frame ~frame_type:Goaway flow)
3527:       in
3528:       Alcotest.(check bool) "GOAWAY uses STREAM_CLOSED" true
3529:         (raw_h2_has_goaway_error 5 response))
3530: 
3531: let test_h2c_server_rejects_oversized_incomplete_frame () =
3532:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3533:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3534:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3535:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3536:   let socket =
3537:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3538:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3539:   in
3540:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3541:   let h2_config =
3542:     { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default.h2_config with read_buffer_size = 16384 }
3543:   in
3544:   let config = { Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with h2_config } in
3545:   let server =
3546:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket ~config
3547:       (fun _request -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n"))
3548:   in
3549:   let flow =
3550:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3551:   in
3552:   Fun.protect
3553:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3554:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
3555:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3556:     (fun () ->
3557:       let oversized =
3558:         Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:16385 ~frame_type:Data ~flags:0
3559:           ~stream_id:1
3560:       in
3561:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
3562:         ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
3563:         ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
3564:         ^ oversized)
3565:         flow;
3566:       let response =
3567:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3568:             read_raw_until_h2_frame ~frame_type:Goaway flow)
3569:       in
3570:       Alcotest.(check bool) "oversized frame sends GOAWAY" true
3571:         (raw_h2_has_frame Goaway response))
3572: 
3573: let test_h2c_server_goaway_on_incomplete_headers_eof () =
3574:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3575:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3576:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3577:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3578:   let socket =
3579:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3580:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3581:   in
3582:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3583:   let server =
3584:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket
3585:       (fun _request -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n"))
3586:   in
3587:   let flow =
3588:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3589:   in
3590:   Fun.protect
3591:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3592:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
3593:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3594:     (fun () ->
3595:       let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
3596:       let block =
3597:         hpack_block encoder
3598:           [
3599:             hpack_header ":method" "GET";
3600:             hpack_header ":scheme" "http";
3601:             hpack_header ":path" "/";
3602:             hpack_header ":authority" "127.0.0.1";
3603:           ]
3604:       in
3605:       let incomplete_headers =
3606:         Eta_http.H2.Frame.header ~length:(String.length block)
3607:           ~frame_type:Headers ~flags:0x1
3608:           ~stream_id:1
3609:         ^ block
3610:       in
3611:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
3612:         ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
3613:         ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
3614:         ^ incomplete_headers)
3615:         flow;
3616:       Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `Send;
3617:       let response =
3618:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3619:             read_raw_until_h2_frame ~frame_type:Goaway flow)
3620:       in
3621:       Alcotest.(check bool) "incomplete HEADERS EOF sends GOAWAY" true
3622:         (raw_h2_has_frame Goaway response))
3623: 
3624: let test_h2c_server_closes_on_rapid_reset_limit () =
3625:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3626:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3627:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3628:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3629:   let socket =
3630:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3631:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3632:   in
3633:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3634:   let h2_security_config =
3635:     {
3636:       Eta_http.H2.Security.default_config with
3637:       max_rst_stream_per_connection = 2;
3638:     }
3639:   in
3640:   let config =
3641:     {
3642:       Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default with
3643:       h2_security_config = Some h2_security_config;
3644:     }
3645:   in
3646:   let server =
3647:     Eta_http_eio.Server.start_h2c_on_socket ~sw ~clock ~socket ~config
3648:       (fun _request -> Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n"))
3649:   in
3650:   let flow =
3651:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3652:   in
3653:   Fun.protect
3654:     ~finally:(fun () ->
3655:       (try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ());
3656:       Eta_http_eio.Server.shutdown server Immediate)
3657:     (fun () ->
3658:       let request_headers stream_id =
3659:         let encoder = Hpack.Encoder.create 4096 in
3660:         raw_h2_headers encoder ~stream_id ~end_stream:false
3661:           [
3662:             hpack_header ":method" "GET";
3663:             hpack_header ":scheme" "http";
3664:             hpack_header ":path" "/";
3665:             hpack_header ":authority" "127.0.0.1";
3666:           ]
3667:       in
3668:       let reset_stream index =
3669:         let stream_id = (index * 2) + 1 in
3670:         request_headers stream_id ^ raw_h2_rst_stream ~stream_id 8
3671:       in
3672:       Eio.Flow.copy_string
3673:         ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n"
3674:         ^ Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
3675:         ^ String.concat "" (List.init 3 reset_stream))
3676:         flow;
3677:       let response =
3678:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3679:             read_raw_until_h2_frame ~frame_type:Goaway flow)
3680:       in
3681:       Alcotest.(check bool) "rapid reset limit sends GOAWAY" true
3682:         (raw_h2_has_frame Goaway response))
3683: 
3684: let test_h2c_connection_closes_on_default_rapid_reset_limit () =
3685:   run_eio @@ fun env ->
3686:   Eio.Switch.run @@ fun sw ->
3687:   let net = Eio.Stdenv.net env in
3688:   let clock = Eio.Stdenv.clock env in
3689:   let socket =
3690:     Eio.Net.listen ~sw ~reuse_addr:true ~backlog:4 net
3691:       (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, 0))
3692:   in
3693:   let port = tcp_port (Eio.Net.listening_addr socket) in
3694:   Eio.Fiber.fork_daemon ~sw
3695:     (fun () ->
3696:       Eio.Switch.run @@ fun conn_sw ->
3697:       let flow, peer = Eio.Net.accept ~sw:conn_sw socket in
3698:       let runtime_factory ~sw ~connection:_ () =
3699:         Eta_eio.Runtime.create ~sw ~clock ()
3700:       in
3701:       Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.run_h2c ~sw:conn_sw ~clock
3702:         ~flow:(flow :> Eta_http_eio.H2.Server_connection.flow)
3703:         ~peer ~config:Eta_http_eio.Server.Config.default ~runtime_factory
3704:         (fun _request ->
3705:           Eta.Effect.pure (Eta_http.Server.Response.text "ok\n"));
3706:       `Stop_daemon);
3707:   let flow =
3708:     Eio.Net.connect ~sw net (`Tcp (Eio.Net.Ipaddr.V4.loopback, port))
3709:   in
3710:   Fun.protect
3711:     ~finally:(fun () -> try Eio.Flow.shutdown flow `All with _ -> ())
3712:     (fun () ->
3713:       let reset_stream index =
3714:         let stream_id = (index * 2) + 1 in
3715:         malicious_h2_request_headers ~end_stream:false ~stream_id ()
3716:         ^ raw_h2_rst_stream ~stream_id 8
3717:       in
3718:       let payload =
3719:         Eta_http.H2.Frame.settings
3720:         ^ String.concat "" (List.init 101 reset_stream)
3721:       in
3722:       let scanner = Eta_http.H2.Security.create () in
3723:       let scanner_result =
3724:         Eta_http.H2.Security.observe scanner
3725:           (Bigstringaf.of_string ~off:0 ~len:(String.length payload) payload)
3726:           ~off:0 ~len:(String.length payload)
3727:       in
3728:       (match scanner_result with
3729:       | Some (Rst_count_exceeded { observed_count = 101; limit = 100 }) ->
3730:           ()
3731:       | Some kind ->
3732:           Alcotest.failf "unexpected scanner error: %s"
3733:             (Eta_http.Error.kind_name kind)
3734:       | None -> Alcotest.fail "scanner missed rapid reset");
3735:       Eio.Flow.write flow
3736:         [ Cstruct.of_string ("PRI * HTTP/2.0\r\n\r\nSM\r\n\r\n" ^ payload) ];
3737:       let closed =
3738:         Eio.Time.with_timeout_exn clock 1.0 (fun () ->
3739:             let scratch = Cstruct.create 1024 in
3740:             let rec loop () =
3741:               match Eio.Flow.single_read flow scratch with
3742:               | 0 -> true
3743:               | _ -> loop ()
3744:               | exception End_of_file -> true
3745:             in
3746:             loop ())
3747:       in
3748:       Alcotest.(check bool) "default rapid reset limit closed connection" true
3749:         closed)
````

# Instruction
# Request for GPT Pro: Eta HTTP/2 / H2-over-TLS Conformance Review

We are building Eta HTTP as a public-internet-capable OCaml HTTP server. The current project phase is HTTP/2 correctness and h2spec conformance before returning to performance work.

Please review the included source and tests as a focused HTTP/2 package. The package includes Eta core pieces needed to understand effects/runtime/cancellation, Eta HTTP protocol validation, Eta Eio server/TLS/H2 adapters, selected HTTP/2 tests, adversarial H2/TLS probes, the h2spec runner, and selected installed `ocaml-h2` dependency source files. It intentionally excludes `.reference`, docs, prior audits, markdown findings, and generated result folders.

## Current Active Failure

The latest strict h2spec gate behaves as follows:

- `h2c` passes: 147/147 strict h2spec tests.
- `h2-tls` fails in the Dune h2spec alias.
- The visible failure is `Generic tests for HTTP/2 server -> 5. HPACK -> 1: Sends a indexed header field representation` with `context deadline exceeded`.
- The failure happens after `Generic -> 4. HTTP Message Exchanges -> 4: Sends a POST request with trailers` passes.
- Latest failing generated result directory: `http-testsuite/results/2026-06-13T13:48:13Z-24e3b9740/`.
- The h2spec runner runs one fresh Eta server for `h2c`, then one fresh Eta HTTPS/H2 server for `h2-tls`.
- The h2spec fixture currently special-cases requests containing the `Trailer` header and returns an early response without `Server.Body.read_all`, because request-trailer delivery through `ocaml-h2` appears incomplete for handlers.

## Recent Fixes Already Attempted

These changes are present in the code package:

- `lib/http_eio/tls/tls_eio.ml`
  - TLS `single_write` no longer performs raw reads on `SSL_ERROR_WANT_READ`; it waits for read-owner rbio progress.
  - TLS read/write locking and rbio progress notification were added.
  - TLS read/write Cstruct subrange tests exist.
  - `single_read` currently feeds the BIO on `WANT_READ`; please assess whether lack of `SSL_pending` / `SSL_has_pending` handling can still race or block incorrectly.
- `lib/http_eio/h2_server_connection.ml`
  - H2 owner loop now marks the Eta connection closed when `H2.Server_connection.next_write_operation` returns `Close`.
  - Direct focused h2spec sequence `generic/4/4 generic/5/1` passes after this change.
  - Manual full `h2spec generic` over TLS passed when run against a debug/manual server, but the Dune `@h2spec` alias still fails in the full strict h2-tls run.
- `test/http/test_eta_http_tls.ml`
  - Added an H2-over-TLS regression for late request trailers followed by a fresh connection.
  - The TLS suite passes locally after that regression.

## What We Need From You

Please provide a code-review style response with:

1. The most likely root cause of the remaining h2spec `h2-tls` timeout, grounded in exact files/functions.
2. A real fix strategy, not a test workaround and not a smaller h2spec configuration.
3. Specific red tests to add before or while fixing the bug.
4. Any suspicious H2/TLS/H2C bugs visible from the included code that we have not called out yet.
5. Any `ocaml-h2` adapter boundary problems where Eta should compensate, isolate, or upstream a fix.
6. Whether the h2spec fixture’s early response on request trailers is acceptable as an h2spec fixture behavior, and what production Eta should do for request trailers.
7. Whether the current TLS memory-BIO ownership model is still fundamentally risky, even after writer-side raw reads were removed.
8. Any tests from the included adversarial probes that should be promoted into normal regression tests.

Please include severity for each finding, exact code locations, minimal repro idea, and a concrete implementation outline.
